Stata外部命令：史上最全的SSC外部命令清单-按字母排序

命令清单-按字母排序   2024.11.09   |   数量经济学&计量经济学服务中心微信公众号

命令清单-按时间排序   2024.11.09   |   数量经济学&计量经济学服务中心微信公众号

A

  • A2REG: Stata module to estimate models with two fixed effects A2REG: Stata module to estimate models with two fixed effects
  • AANIV: Stata module to compute unbiased IV regression AANIV: Stata module to compute unbiased IV regression
  • AAPLOT: Stata module for scatter plot with linear and/or quadratic fit, automatically annotated AAPLOT: Stata module for scatter plot with linear and/or quadratic fit, automatically annotated
  • AB2022: Stata module to provide Gradient Solver for Ahlfeldt & Barr (2022): The economics of skyscrapers AB2022: Stata module to provide Gradient Solver for Ahlfeldt & Barr (2022): The economics of skyscrapers
  • ABAR: Stata module to perform Arellano-Bond test for autocorrelation ABAR: Stata module to perform Arellano-Bond test for autocorrelation
  • ABG: Stata module to implement the Alpha-Beta-Gamma Method of Distributional Analysis ABG: Stata module to implement the Alpha-Beta-Gamma Method of Distributional Analysis
  • ABOUTREG: Stata module providing tutorial on regression diagnostics ABOUTREG: Stata module providing tutorial on regression diagnostics
  • ABRS: Stata module to provide Toolkit for counterfactuals based on a spatial equilibrium framework with heterogenous preferences by Ahlfeldt, Bald, Roth, Seidel: “Measuring quality of life under spatial frictions” ABRS: Stata module to provide Toolkit for counterfactuals based on a spatial equilibrium framework with heterogenous preferences by Ahlfeldt, Bald, Roth, Seidel: “Measuring quality of life under spatial frictions”
  • ABRSQOL: Stata module providing Quality-of-life solver for “Measuring quality of life under spatial frictions” ABRSQOL: Stata module providing Quality-of-life solver for “Measuring quality of life under spatial frictions”
  • ABSDID: Stata module to estimate treatment effect with Abadie semiparametric DID estimator ABSDID: Stata module to estimate treatment effect with Abadie semiparametric DID estimator
  • ACELONG: Stata module to fit multilevel mixed-effects ACE, AE and ADE variance decomposition models ACELONG: Stata module to fit multilevel mixed-effects ACE, AE and ADE variance decomposition models
  • ACREG: Stata module to perform Arbitrary Correlation Regression ACREG: Stata module to perform Arbitrary Correlation Regression
  • ACTEST: GAUSS module to Apply Asymmetric Causality Tests ACTEST: GAUSS module to Apply Asymmetric Causality Tests
  • ACTEST: Stata module to perform Cumby-Huizinga general test for autocorrelation in time series ACTEST: Stata module to perform Cumby-Huizinga general test for autocorrelation in time series
  • ADDBEFORE: Stata module to add number or character before a variable ADDBEFORE: Stata module to add number or character before a variable
  • ADDINBY: Stata module to add in data from a disk dataset using a foreign key ADDINBY: Stata module to add in data from a disk dataset using a foreign key
  • ADDNOTES: Stata program to add notes to the end of text files ADDNOTES: Stata program to add notes to the end of text files
  • ADDPLOT: Stata module to add twoway plot objects to an existing twoway graph ADDPLOT: Stata module to add twoway plot objects to an existing twoway graph
  • ADDTEX: Stata module to display text on a graph ADDTEX: Stata module to display text on a graph
  • ADDTXT: Stata module to add text to graphs ADDTXT: Stata module to add text to graphs
  • ADECOMP: Stata module to estimate Shapley Decomposition by Components of a Welfare Measure ADECOMP: Stata module to estimate Shapley Decomposition by Components of a Welfare Measure
  • ADFMAXUR: Stata module to calculate Leybourne (1995) ADFmax unit root test statistic along with 1, 5 and 10% finite-sample critical values and associated p-values ADFMAXUR: Stata module to calculate Leybourne (1995) ADFmax unit root test statistic along with 1, 5 and 10% finite-sample critical values and associated p-values
  • ADFREG: MATLAB module to calculate augmented Dickey-Fuller regression ADFREG: MATLAB module to calculate augmented Dickey-Fuller regression
  • ADFTEST: Stata module to perform ADF and Breusch-Godfrey tests ADFTEST: Stata module to perform ADF and Breusch-Godfrey tests
  • ADJACENT: Stata module to list adjacent values of variables ADJACENT: Stata module to list adjacent values of variables
  • ADJKSM: Stata module to perform adjusted “ksm” for robust scatterplot smoothing ADJKSM: Stata module to perform adjusted “ksm” for robust scatterplot smoothing
  • ADJMEAN: Stata module to calculate variables’ means adjusted for covariates ADJMEAN: Stata module to calculate variables’ means adjusted for covariates
  • ADJPROP: Stata module to calculate adjusted probabilities from logistic regression estimates ADJPROP: Stata module to calculate adjusted probabilities from logistic regression estimates
  • ADJUST: Stata module (corrected) to compute adjusted predictions and probabilities after estimation ADJUST: Stata module (corrected) to compute adjusted predictions and probabilities after estimation
  • ADMETAN: Stata module to provide comprehensive meta-analysis ADMETAN: Stata module to provide comprehensive meta-analysis
  • ADODEV: Stata module to reorder ado-path for developers and other independent-minded users ADODEV: Stata module to reorder ado-path for developers and other independent-minded users
  • ADODOWN: Stata module making Stata packages easier to develop and document using modern tools ADODOWN: Stata module making Stata packages easier to develop and document using modern tools
  • ADOEDIT: Stata module to edit ado file in Stata’s do-file editor ADOEDIT: Stata module to edit ado file in Stata’s do-file editor
  • ADOINSTALL: Stata module to install Stata packages in a specified path ADOINSTALL: Stata module to install Stata packages in a specified path
  • ADOLIST: Stata module to manage lists of ado packages ADOLIST: Stata module to manage lists of ado packages
  • ADOSTORE: Stata module to store and restore the current ado-path ADOSTORE: Stata module to store and restore the current ado-path
  • ADOTYPE: Stata module to type ado file ADOTYPE: Stata module to type ado file
  • AEDOT: Stata module to produce dot plot for adverse event data AEDOT: Stata module to produce dot plot for adverse event data
  • AEFDR: Stata module to perform false discovery rate p-value adjustment for adverse event data AEFDR: Stata module to perform false discovery rate p-value adjustment for adverse event data
  • AEVOLCANO: Stata module to produce volcano plot for adverse event data AEVOLCANO: Stata module to produce volcano plot for adverse event data
  • AEXTLOGIT: Stata module to compute average elasticities for fixed effects logit AEXTLOGIT: Stata module to compute average elasticities for fixed effects logit
  • AFFILIATIONEXPOSURE: Stata module to compute an affiliation exposure model using two-mode actor(row)-by-event(column) network data AFFILIATIONEXPOSURE: Stata module to compute an affiliation exposure model using two-mode actor(row)-by-event(column) network data
  • AFORMAT: Stata module to condense the display format of a variable AFORMAT: Stata module to condense the display format of a variable
  • AGGIND: Stata module to aggregate indicators among units within a specified radius AGGIND: Stata module to aggregate indicators among units within a specified radius
  • AGRM: Stata module to calculate van der Eijk’s measure of agreement “A” AGRM: Stata module to calculate van der Eijk’s measure of agreement “A”
  • AIC_MODEL_SELECTION: Stata module to perform Forward Model Selection using AIC or BIC AIC_MODEL_SELECTION: Stata module to perform Forward Model Selection using AIC or BIC
  • AINEQUAL: Stata module to compute measures of inequality AINEQUAL: Stata module to compute measures of inequality
  • AIRNET: Stata module to create networks from airline traffic data AIRNET: Stata module to create networks from airline traffic data
  • AKDENSITY: Stata module to perform adaptive kernel density estimation AKDENSITY: Stata module to perform adaptive kernel density estimation
  • ALBATROSS: Stata module to create albatross plots ALBATROSS: Stata module to create albatross plots
  • ALIGNEDPAIRS: Stata module to perform the aligned ranks test for matched pairs (Hodges-Lehmann) ALIGNEDPAIRS: Stata module to perform the aligned ranks test for matched pairs (Hodges-Lehmann)
  • ALIGNEDRANKS: Stata module to perform a two-sample aligned rank-sum (Hodges-Lehmann) test with exact statistics for small samples ALIGNEDRANKS: Stata module to perform a two-sample aligned rank-sum (Hodges-Lehmann) test with exact statistics for small samples
  • ALIGNEDSETS: Stata module to perform aligned ranks test for matched sets (Hodges-Lehmann) ALIGNEDSETS: Stata module to perform aligned ranks test for matched sets (Hodges-Lehmann)
  • ALIGNMICRO: Stata module to perform alignment in microsimulation ALIGNMICRO: Stata module to perform alignment in microsimulation
  • ALLCATPLOT: Stata module to ensure that all predefined response categories for a variable, including those that are not present in the dataset are included in a graph ALLCATPLOT: Stata module to ensure that all predefined response categories for a variable, including those that are not present in the dataset are included in a graph
  • ALLPOSSIBLE: Stata module to fit all possible models with subsets of predictors ALLPOSSIBLE: Stata module to fit all possible models with subsets of predictors
  • ALLSUBSETS: Stata module to perform all subsets (combinatorial) meta-analysis in a set of studies ALLSUBSETS: Stata module to perform all subsets (combinatorial) meta-analysis in a set of studies
  • ALLSYNTH: Stata module to automate estimation of (i) bias-corrected synthetic control gaps (“treatment effects”) ALLSYNTH: Stata module to automate estimation of (i) bias-corrected synthetic control gaps (“treatment effects”)
  • ALLUVIAL: Stata module for Alluvial graphs ALLUVIAL: Stata module for Alluvial graphs
  • ALMON1: Stata module to estimate Shirley Almon Polynomial Distributed Lag Model ALMON1: Stata module to estimate Shirley Almon Polynomial Distributed Lag Model
  • ALMON: Stata Module to Estimate Shirley Almon Generalized Polynomial Distributed Lag Model ALMON: Stata Module to Estimate Shirley Almon Generalized Polynomial Distributed Lag Model
  • ALOGIT: Stata module to estimate (In)attentive logit regression from Abaluck and Adams ALOGIT: Stata module to estimate (In)attentive logit regression from Abaluck and Adams
  • ALORENZ: Stata module to produce Pen’s Parade, Lorenz and Generalised Lorenz curve ALORENZ: Stata module to produce Pen’s Parade, Lorenz and Generalised Lorenz curve
  • ALPHAWGT: Stata module to compute Cronbach’s alpha for weighted data ALPHAWGT: Stata module to compute Cronbach’s alpha for weighted data
  • ALSMLE: Stata module to perform Beach-Mackinnon AR(1) Autoregressive Maximum Likelihood Estimation ALSMLE: Stata module to perform Beach-Mackinnon AR(1) Autoregressive Maximum Likelihood Estimation
  • AMCMC: Stata module to provide Mata functions and structures for adaptive Markov chain Monte Carlo sampling AMCMC: Stata module to provide Mata functions and structures for adaptive Markov chain Monte Carlo sampling
  • AMETA: Stata module to perform alternative and Bayesian meta-analysis AMETA: Stata module to perform alternative and Bayesian meta-analysis
  • ANKETEST: Stata module to perform diagnostic tests for spatial autocorrelation in the residuals of OLS, SAR, IV, and IV-SAR models ANKETEST: Stata module to perform diagnostic tests for spatial autocorrelation in the residuals of OLS, SAR, IV, and IV-SAR models
  • ANNEAL: Ox module to perform simulated annealing ANNEAL: Ox module to perform simulated annealing
  • ANNEARLY: MATLAB function to forecast univariate time series ANNEARLY: MATLAB function to forecast univariate time series
  • ANNINPTSIGTEST: MATLAB function to test the statistical significance of inputs ANNINPTSIGTEST: MATLAB function to test the statistical significance of inputs
  • ANNLYAP: MATLAB function to calculate Lyapunov exponents ANNLYAP: MATLAB function to calculate Lyapunov exponents
  • ANNNONLINTST: MATLAB function to perform nonlinearity test for univariate and multivariate time series ANNNONLINTST: MATLAB function to perform nonlinearity test for univariate and multivariate time series
  • ANOGI: Stata module to generate Analysis of Gini ANOGI: Stata module to generate Analysis of Gini
  • ANYMATCH: Stata module to perform distance matching based on any metric ANYMATCH: Stata module to perform distance matching based on any metric
  • ANYTHINGTODATE: Stata module to convert all types of date variables to Stata date variables ANYTHINGTODATE: Stata module to convert all types of date variables to Stata date variables
  • APC: Stata module for estimating age-period-cohort effects APC: Stata module for estimating age-period-cohort effects
  • APCD: Stata module for estimating age-period-cohort effects with detrended coefficients APCD: Stata module for estimating age-period-cohort effects with detrended coefficients
  • APCGO: Stata module to calculate age-period-cohort effects for the gap between two groups (based on a Blinder-Oaxaca decomposition), including trends for each parameter APCGO: Stata module to calculate age-period-cohort effects for the gap between two groups (based on a Blinder-Oaxaca decomposition), including trends for each parameter
  • APCH: Stata module for estimating age-period-cohort and hysteresis effects APCH: Stata module for estimating age-period-cohort and hysteresis effects
  • APOVERTY: Stata module to compute poverty measures APOVERTY: Stata module to compute poverty measures
  • APPENDFILE: Stata module to append text files APPENDFILE: Stata module to append text files
  • ARCH: MATLAB function to compute ARCH test ARCH: MATLAB function to compute ARCH test
  • ARCHLM: Stata module to calculate LM test for ARCH effects ARCHLM: Stata module to calculate LM test for ARCH effects
  • ARCHQQ: Stata module to generate Q-Q plot and distribution tests for ARCH models ARCHQQ: Stata module to generate Q-Q plot and distribution tests for ARCH models
  • ARCHTEST: MATLAB module to calculate test for autoregressive conditional heteroskedasticity ARCHTEST: MATLAB module to calculate test for autoregressive conditional heteroskedasticity
  • ARCPLOT: Stata module for arc plots ARCPLOT: Stata module for arc plots
  • ARDL: Stata module to perform autoregressive distributed lag model estimation ARDL: Stata module to perform autoregressive distributed lag model estimation
  • ARFIMAFC: RATS modules to forecast fractionally differenced timeseries ARFIMAFC: RATS modules to forecast fractionally differenced timeseries
  • ARFSIM: RATS module to simulate ARFIMA(0,d,0) fractionally integrated series ARFSIM: RATS module to simulate ARFIMA(0,d,0) fractionally integrated series
  • ARHOMME: Stata module to estimate Arellano and Bonhomme quantile selection model ARHOMME: Stata module to estimate Arellano and Bonhomme quantile selection model
  • ARIMAAUTO: Stata module to find the best ARIMA model with the help of a Stata-adjusted Hyndman-Khandakar (2008) algorithm ARIMAAUTO: Stata module to find the best ARIMA model with the help of a Stata-adjusted Hyndman-Khandakar (2008) algorithm
  • ARIMAFIT: Stata module to calculate AIC, SIC for ARIMA model ARIMAFIT: Stata module to calculate AIC, SIC for ARIMA model
  • ARIMASEL: Stata module to compute selection criteria for ARMA(p,q) models ARIMASEL: Stata module to compute selection criteria for ARMA(p,q) models
  • ARMADIAG: Stata module to compute post-estimation residual diagnostics for time series ARMADIAG: Stata module to compute post-estimation residual diagnostics for time series
  • ARMAROOTS: Stata module to compute roots of AR- and MA-polynomials ARMAROOTS: Stata module to compute roots of AR- and MA-polynomials
  • ARRAY: Stata package to support arrays of variables ARRAY: Stata package to support arrays of variables
  • ARROWPLOT: Stata module to produce combined plot for graphing inter-group and intra-group trends ARROWPLOT: Stata module to produce combined plot for graphing inter-group and intra-group trends
  • ART: Stata module to compute sample size and power for complex randomised trial designs with binary or time-to-event outcomes ART: Stata module to compute sample size and power for complex randomised trial designs with binary or time-to-event outcomes
  • ARTBIN: Stata module to calculate sample size or power for randomized trials with binary outcomes ARTBIN: Stata module to calculate sample size or power for randomized trials with binary outcomes
  • ARTCAT: Stata module to calculate sample size or power for a two-group trial with ordered categorical outcome ARTCAT: Stata module to calculate sample size or power for a two-group trial with ordered categorical outcome
  • ASCII: Stata module to display the ASCII character set ASCII: Stata module to display the ASCII character set
  • ASCIIPLOT: Stata module to generate ASCII character map ASCIIPLOT: Stata module to generate ASCII character map
  • ASCOL: Stata module to convert frequency of stock returns or stock prices ASCOL: Stata module to convert frequency of stock returns or stock prices
  • ASCOMP: GAUSS module to Transform Data into Cumulative Positive and Negative Components ASCOMP: GAUSS module to Transform Data into Cumulative Positive and Negative Components
  • ASCVD: Stata module to compute ACC/AHA 10-year risk for an initial hard atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease (ASCVD) event ASCVD: Stata module to compute ACC/AHA 10-year risk for an initial hard atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease (ASCVD) event
  • ASDOC: Stata module to create high-quality tables in MS Word from Stata output ASDOC: Stata module to create high-quality tables in MS Word from Stata output
  • ASGEN: Stata module to generate weighted average mean using an existing variable as weight ASGEN: Stata module to generate weighted average mean using an existing variable as weight
  • ASHELL: Stata module to capture output from OS shell command ASHELL: Stata module to capture output from OS shell command
  • ASL_NORM: Stata module computing bootstrap Gaussianity tests ASL_NORM: Stata module computing bootstrap Gaussianity tests
  • ASREG: Stata module to estimate rolling window regressions, Fama-MacBeth and by(group) regressions ASREG: Stata module to estimate rolling window regressions, Fama-MacBeth and by(group) regressions
  • ASROL: Stata module to generate rolling window / groups descriptive statistics ASROL: Stata module to generate rolling window / groups descriptive statistics
  • ASSERTKY: Stata module to assert unique dataset keys ASSERTKY: Stata module to assert unique dataset keys
  • ASTILE: Stata module to provide a faster and byable alternative for xtile ASTILE: Stata module to provide a faster and byable alternative for xtile
  • ASTX: Stata module to create a table of descriptive statistics and t-statistics by a grouping variable ASTX: Stata module to create a table of descriptive statistics and t-statistics by a grouping variable
  • ASYM_CAUS: C++ module for Transforming an Integrated Variable with Deterministic Trend Parts into Negative and Positive Cumulative Partial Sums ASYM_CAUS: C++ module for Transforming an Integrated Variable with Deterministic Trend Parts into Negative and Positive Cumulative Partial Sums
  • ATKPLOT: Stata module to generate Atkinson residual normality plots ATKPLOT: Stata module to generate Atkinson residual normality plots
  • ATTREGTEST: Stata module to implement the regression-based attrition tests proposed in Ghanem et al. (2022) ATTREGTEST: Stata module to implement the regression-based attrition tests proposed in Ghanem et al. (2022)
  • AUDIT_CC: Stata module for analysis of matched case-control audits of cervical cancer screening AUDIT_CC: Stata module for analysis of matched case-control audits of cervical cancer screening
  • AUTOFILL: Stata module to fill missing values with existing values AUTOFILL: Stata module to fill missing values with existing values
  • AUTOFMT: Stata module to automatically format a significant number of digits AUTOFMT: Stata module to automatically format a significant number of digits
  • AUTOLOG: Stata module to generate dialog to create log files AUTOLOG: Stata module to generate dialog to create log files
  • AUTORENAME: Stata module to automatically rename variables AUTORENAME: Stata module to automatically rename variables
  • AUTOSUM: Stata module to produce automatic generation of a comparison table AUTOSUM: Stata module to produce automatic generation of a comparison table
  • AVAR: Stata module to perform asymptotic covariance estimation for iid and non-iid data robust to heteroskedasticity, autocorrelation, 1- and 2-way clustering, and common cross-panel autocorrelated disturbances AVAR: Stata module to perform asymptotic covariance estimation for iid and non-iid data robust to heteroskedasticity, autocorrelation, 1- and 2-way clustering, and common cross-panel autocorrelated disturbances
  • AVCIPLOT: Stata module to produce added-variable plot with confidence intervals AVCIPLOT: Stata module to produce added-variable plot with confidence intervals
  • AVG_EFFECT: Stata module to calculate mean (standardized) effect size across multiple outcomes AVG_EFFECT: Stata module to calculate mean (standardized) effect size across multiple outcomes
  • AVPLOT2: Stata modules for added variable plots AVPLOT2: Stata modules for added variable plots
  • AVPLOT3: Stata module to generate partial regression plots for subsamples AVPLOT3: Stata module to generate partial regression plots for subsamples
  • AVPLOTS4: Stata module to graph added-variable plots for specified regressors in a single image AVPLOTS4: Stata module to graph added-variable plots for specified regressors in a single image

B

  • B1X2: Stata module to account for changes when X2 is added to a base model with X1 B1X2: Stata module to account for changes when X2 is added to a base model with X1
  • BABIBPLOT: Stata module to plot two graph types which are rooted in Bland-Altman plots using journal and paper percentiles BABIBPLOT: Stata module to plot two graph types which are rooted in Bland-Altman plots using journal and paper percentiles
  • BACKRASCH: Stata module to implement a backward procedure with a Rasch model BACKRASCH: Stata module to implement a backward procedure with a Rasch model
  • BACKUP: Stata module to make daily backup of important files (Windows only) BACKUP: Stata module to make daily backup of important files (Windows only)
  • BACONDECOMP: Stata module to perform a Bacon decomposition of difference-in-differences estimation BACONDECOMP: Stata module to perform a Bacon decomposition of difference-in-differences estimation
  • BAING: Stata module to determine and estimate the number of common factors following Bai and Ng BAING: Stata module to determine and estimate the number of common factors following Bai and Ng
  • BALANCETABLE: Stata module to build a balance table and print it in a LaTeX file or an Excel file BALANCETABLE: Stata module to build a balance table and print it in a LaTeX file or an Excel file
  • BANDPLOT: Stata module to plot summary statistics of responses for bands of predictors BANDPLOT: Stata module to plot summary statistics of responses for bands of predictors
  • BAP: Stata module to generate a Bland-Altman plot BAP: Stata module to generate a Bland-Altman plot
  • BAPLOT: Stata module to produce Bland-Altman plots BAPLOT: Stata module to produce Bland-Altman plots
  • BARPLOT2: Stata module to produce bar plot with optional error bars BARPLOT2: Stata module to produce bar plot with optional error bars
  • BARPLOT: Stata module to plot varlist against xvar BARPLOT: Stata module to plot varlist against xvar
  • BASETABLE: Stata module to compare a set of risk factors or effects with respect to a categorical variable BASETABLE: Stata module to compare a set of risk factors or effects with respect to a categorical variable
  • BATCHER: Stata module to parallelize tasks (Windows only) BATCHER: Stata module to parallelize tasks (Windows only)
  • BATPLOT: Stata module to produce Bland-Altman plots accounting for trend BATPLOT: Stata module to produce Bland-Altman plots accounting for trend
  • BAYERHANCK: Stata module to compute test for non-cointegration BAYERHANCK: Stata module to compute test for non-cointegration
  • BAYESMIXEDLOGIT: Stata module to perform Bayesian estimation of mixed logit models BAYESMIXEDLOGIT: Stata module to perform Bayesian estimation of mixed logit models
  • BAYESMIXEDLOGITWTP: Stata module for Bayesian estimation of mixed logit model in willingness-to-pay (WTP) space BAYESMIXEDLOGITWTP: Stata module for Bayesian estimation of mixed logit model in willingness-to-pay (WTP) space
  • BCII: Stata module to to estimate the number needed to treat (NNT) and confidence intervals for patients improving, or ‘benefiting’ (either improvements gained or deteriorations prevented), in a randomised controlled trial BCII: Stata module to to estimate the number needed to treat (NNT) and confidence intervals for patients improving, or ‘benefiting’ (either improvements gained or deteriorations prevented), in a randomised controlled trial
  • BCOEFF: Stata module to save regression coefficients to new variable BCOEFF: Stata module to save regression coefficients to new variable
  • BCOEFFS: Stata module to save regression coefficients to new variable BCOEFFS: Stata module to save regression coefficients to new variable
  • BCSS: Stata module to create graphs to show how baseline data (prospective or retrospective) affect sample size for a cluster randomised trial BCSS: Stata module to create graphs to show how baseline data (prospective or retrospective) affect sample size for a cluster randomised trial
  • BCSTATS: Stata module to analyze back check (field audit) data and compare it to the original survey data BCSTATS: Stata module to analyze back check (field audit) data and compare it to the original survey data
  • BCTOBIT: Stata module to produce a test of the tobit specification BCTOBIT: Stata module to produce a test of the tobit specification
  • BCUSE: Stata module to access instructional datasets on Boston College server BCUSE: Stata module to access instructional datasets on Boston College server
  • BDIFF: Stata module to compute Bootstrap and Permutation tests for difference in coefficients between two groups BDIFF: Stata module to compute Bootstrap and Permutation tests for difference in coefficients between two groups
  • BDINDTEST: RATS procedure to perform battery of independence tests BDINDTEST: RATS procedure to perform battery of independence tests
  • BDS: MATLAB module to calculate Brock, Dechert & Scheinkman test for independence BDS: MATLAB module to calculate Brock, Dechert & Scheinkman test for independence
  • BDSSIG: MATLAB module to calculate Brock, Dechert & Scheinkman test significance BDSSIG: MATLAB module to calculate Brock, Dechert & Scheinkman test significance
  • BDSTEST: RATS procedure to compute Brock-Decher-Scheinkman test for i.i.d BDSTEST: RATS procedure to compute Brock-Decher-Scheinkman test for i.i.d
  • BEAMPLOT: Stata module to draw horizontal dotplots using beams BEAMPLOT: Stata module to draw horizontal dotplots using beams
  • BENFORD: Stata module to test Benford’s Law on a variable BENFORD: Stata module to test Benford’s Law on a variable
  • BETACOEF: Stata module to calculate beta coefficients from regression BETACOEF: Stata module to calculate beta coefficients from regression
  • BETAFIT: Stata module to fit a two-parameter beta distribution BETAFIT: Stata module to fit a two-parameter beta distribution
  • BETAPARMS: RATS procedure to compute parameters required for beta distribution BETAPARMS: RATS procedure to compute parameters required for beta distribution
  • BETAPRIOR: Stata module to calculate the parameters of a Beta distribution given the mean and variance BETAPRIOR: Stata module to calculate the parameters of a Beta distribution given the mean and variance
  • BETSIM: C module to compute simulations of betting market equilibrium BETSIM: C module to compute simulations of betting market equilibrium
  • BETTERBAR: Stata module to produce bar graphs with optional standard error bars and cross-group comparisons BETTERBAR: Stata module to produce bar graphs with optional standard error bars and cross-group comparisons
  • BFMCORR: Stata module for correcting surveys using tax data BFMCORR: Stata module for correcting surveys using tax data
  • BGSHADE: Stata module to add background shading to twoway plots using either dummy variable(s) denoting shaded areas and/or precoded NBER recessions BGSHADE: Stata module to add background shading to twoway plots using either dummy variable(s) denoting shaded areas and/or precoded NBER recessions
  • BGTEST: Stata module to calculate Breusch-Godfrey test for serial correlation BGTEST: Stata module to calculate Breusch-Godfrey test for serial correlation
  • BHAPKAR: Stata module to compute Bhapkar’s test of marginal homogeneity between two raters for categorical observations BHAPKAR: Stata module to compute Bhapkar’s test of marginal homogeneity between two raters for categorical observations
  • BHATT: Stata module to compute Bhattacharyya Coefficient and Bhattacharyya Distance statistics of distribution overlap BHATT: Stata module to compute Bhattacharyya Coefficient and Bhattacharyya Distance statistics of distribution overlap
  • BIASEPI: Stata module to perform simple bias analysis, multidimensional bias analysis, and multiple bias modeling BIASEPI: Stata module to perform simple bias analysis, multidimensional bias analysis, and multiple bias modeling
  • BIBREP: Stata module to produce a bibliometric report on a single senior researcher BIBREP: Stata module to produce a bibliometric report on a single senior researcher
  • BIC: Stata module to evaluate the statistical significance of variables in a model BIC: Stata module to evaluate the statistical significance of variables in a model
  • BICDROP1: Stata module to estimate the probability a model is more likely without each explanatory variable BICDROP1: Stata module to estimate the probability a model is more likely without each explanatory variable
  • BICORRTEST: RATS procedure to compute Hinich bi-correlations test for autocorrelation BICORRTEST: RATS procedure to compute Hinich bi-correlations test for autocorrelation
  • BIDENSITY: Stata module to produce and graph bivariate density estimates BIDENSITY: Stata module to produce and graph bivariate density estimates
  • BIGTAB: Stata module to produce frequency tables for “too many values” BIGTAB: Stata module to produce frequency tables for “too many values”
  • BIHIST: Stata module to produce bihistograms BIHIST: Stata module to produce bihistograms
  • BIMAP: Stata module to produce bivariate maps BIMAP: Stata module to produce bivariate maps
  • BINEQ: Stata module to analyze multidimensional inequality in two dimensions of wellbeing BINEQ: Stata module to analyze multidimensional inequality in two dimensions of wellbeing
  • BINSCATTER: Stata module to generate binned scatterplots BINSCATTER: Stata module to generate binned scatterplots
  • BINSCATTERHIST: Stata module to produce binned scatterplot with marginal histograms BINSCATTERHIST: Stata module to produce binned scatterplot with marginal histograms
  • BIOPROBIT: Stata module for bivariate ordered probit regression BIOPROBIT: Stata module for bivariate ordered probit regression
  • BIPLOT: Stata module to generate biplots BIPLOT: Stata module to generate biplots
  • BIPLOTVLAB: Stata module to produce biplot with variable labels BIPLOTVLAB: Stata module to produce biplot with variable labels

  • BITOBIT: Stata module to perform bivariate Tobit regression BITOBIT: Stata module to perform bivariate Tobit regression
  • BIVPOISSON: Stata module to perform seemingly unrelated count regression BIVPOISSON: Stata module to perform seemingly unrelated count regression
  • BIVPOISSON_ATE: Stata module to estimate Average Treatment Effects in Seemingly Unrelated Count Regression BIVPOISSON_ATE: Stata module to estimate Average Treatment Effects in Seemingly Unrelated Count Regression

  • BJTRANS: RATS procedure to aid in selection of preliminary transformation BJTRANS: RATS procedure to aid in selection of preliminary transformation

  • BLIST: Stata module to list values of variables in as small a space as possible BLIST: Stata module to list values of variables in as small a space as possible

  • BOOST: Stata module to perform boosted regression BOOST: Stata module to perform boosted regression

  • BOXPANEL: Stata module to produce box plots for panel data BOXPANEL: Stata module to produce box plots for panel data
  • BOXTID: Stata module to fit Box-Tidwell and exponential regression models BOXTID: Stata module to fit Box-Tidwell and exponential regression models
  • BOX_LOGSCALE: Stata module to create box plots on the log scale (generalising Tukey’s definition of whiskers) BOX_LOGSCALE: Stata module to create box plots on the log scale (generalising Tukey’s definition of whiskers)
  • BPAGAN: Stata module to perform Breusch-Pagan test for heteroskedasticity BPAGAN: Stata module to perform Breusch-Pagan test for heteroskedasticity
  • BPASS: Stata module to compute band pass filter for time series data BPASS: Stata module to compute band pass filter for time series data
  • BPMEDIAN: Stata module to compute Bonett-Price confidence intervals for medians and their contrasts BPMEDIAN: Stata module to compute Bonett-Price confidence intervals for medians and their contrasts
  • BPPANELTESTS: RATS procedure to perform Breusch-Pagan (and related) tests for random effects BPPANELTESTS: RATS procedure to perform Breusch-Pagan (and related) tests for random effects
  • BQDODRAWS: RATS procedure to implement Monte Carlo draws from a VAR with Blanchard-Quah factorization BQDODRAWS: RATS procedure to implement Monte Carlo draws from a VAR with Blanchard-Quah factorization
  • BRAIN: Stata module to provide neural network BRAIN: Stata module to provide neural network
  • BREITUNG: RATS procedure to perform Breitung test for unit roots in panel data BREITUNG: RATS procedure to perform Breitung test for unit roots in panel data
  • BREWSCHEME: Stata module for generating customized graph scheme files BREWSCHEME: Stata module for generating customized graph scheme files
  • BRGLM: Stata module to perform bias-reduced estimation of binary response models BRGLM: Stata module to perform bias-reduced estimation of binary response models
  • BRMUNID: Stata module to standardize geocodes for Brazilian municipalities BRMUNID: Stata module to standardize geocodes for Brazilian municipalities
  • BRONCH: Stata module to describe bronchiolitis severity BRONCH: Stata module to describe bronchiolitis severity
  • BRYBOSCHAN: RATS procedure to implement Bry-Boschan business cycle dating BRYBOSCHAN: RATS procedure to implement Bry-Boschan business cycle dating
  • BSENS: Stata module to compute Sensitivity metric using McNemar’s test BSENS: Stata module to compute Sensitivity metric using McNemar’s test

  • BSOPTION: RATS procedure to execute Black-Scholes option pricing procedure BSOPTION: RATS procedure to execute Black-Scholes option pricing procedure
  • BSPLINE: Stata modules to compute B-splines parameterized by their values at reference points BSPLINE: Stata modules to compute B-splines parameterized by their values at reference points
  • BSTUT: Stata module providing tutorial on bootstrapping BSTUT: Stata module providing tutorial on bootstrapping
  • BTA2SCORE: Stata module to generate beta to score BTA2SCORE: Stata module to generate beta to score
  • BUCKLEY: Stata module to implement Buckley-James method for analysing censored data BUCKLEY: Stata module to implement Buckley-James method for analysing censored data
  • BUGSDAT: Stata module to convert a Stata datafile into the S-plus format used in Winbugs BUGSDAT: Stata module to convert a Stata datafile into the S-plus format used in Winbugs
  • BUGWRITE: Stata module to write data from Stata into a format compatible with WinBUGS BUGWRITE: Stata module to write data from Stata into a format compatible with WinBUGS
  • BUMPAREA: Stata module to produce bump area graphs BUMPAREA: Stata module to produce bump area graphs
  • BUMPLINE: Stata module to produce bump line graphs BUMPLINE: Stata module to produce bump line graphs
  • BUNCHING: Stata module to use bunching to partially and point identify the elasticity of income with respect to tax rates BUNCHING: Stata module to use bunching to partially and point identify the elasticity of income with respect to tax rates
  • BUNDLE: Stata module to bundle image files in a web page using base64 encoding BUNDLE: Stata module to bundle image files in a web page using base64 encoding

  • BYGAP: Stata module to insert by-gap observation at the start of each by-group BYGAP: Stata module to insert by-gap observation at the start of each by-group
  • BYHIST: Stata module to produce interlaced histograms BYHIST: Stata module to produce interlaced histograms
  • BYNOTE: Stata module to create a note with a user-specified format for use with the by option BYNOTE: Stata module to create a note with a user-specified format for use with the by option
  • BYS: Stata module to automatically sort on the bylist (version 5) BYS: Stata module to automatically sort on the bylist (version 5)
  • BYSTORE: Stata module to repeat estimation commands and store estimates BYSTORE: Stata module to repeat estimation commands and store estimates
  • BYVAR: Stata module to repeat a command by variable BYVAR: Stata module to repeat a command by variable

C

  • CAL: Stata module to generate calendar CAL: Stata module to generate calendar

  • CLUSTSE: Stata module to estimate the statistical significance of parameters when the data is clustered with a small number of clusters CLUSTSE: Stata module to estimate the statistical significance of parameters when the data is clustered with a small number of clusters
  • CLUSTSENS: Stata module to perform sensitivity analysis for cluster commands CLUSTSENS: Stata module to perform sensitivity analysis for cluster commands
  • CLUS_NWAY: Stata module to perform Multi-way Clustering for Various Model Specifications CLUS_NWAY: Stata module to perform Multi-way Clustering for Various Model Specifications
  • CLV: Stata module to implement a clustering of variables around latent components CLV: Stata module to implement a clustering of variables around latent components
  • CM2IN: Stata module to provide conversion between inch/cm and others CM2IN: Stata module to provide conversion between inch/cm and others
  • CMATCH: Stata module to tabulate matched pairs in 1:1 case control study by exposure status CMATCH: Stata module to tabulate matched pairs in 1:1 case control study by exposure status
  • CMAXUSE: Stata module to access Cmax instructional datasets CMAXUSE: Stata module to access Cmax instructional datasets
  • CME: Stata program to estimate generalized linear models with covariate measurement error CME: Stata program to estimate generalized linear models with covariate measurement error
  • CMITEST: Stata module to implement testing and inference methods for conditional moment inequalities/equalities models CMITEST: Stata module to implement testing and inference methods for conditional moment inequalities/equalities models
  • CMOGRAM: Stata module to plot histogram-style conditional mean or median graphs CMOGRAM: Stata module to plot histogram-style conditional mean or median graphs
  • CMP: Stata module to implement conditional (recursive) mixed process estimator CMP: Stata module to implement conditional (recursive) mixed process estimator
  • CNAR: Stata module to retrieve Chinese listed firms’ financial data CNAR: Stata module to retrieve Chinese listed firms’ financial data
  • CNBORDER: Stata module to analyze locations in China vs geography CNBORDER: Stata module to analyze locations in China vs geography
  • CNBREG: Stata module to estimate negative binomial regression - canonical parameterization CNBREG: Stata module to estimate negative binomial regression - canonical parameterization
  • CNDNMB3: Stata module to calculate condition number of regressor matrix CNDNMB3: Stata module to calculate condition number of regressor matrix
  • CNEVENT: Stata module to carry out an event study with Chinese publicly listed firms CNEVENT: Stata module to carry out an event study with Chinese publicly listed firms

  • CNGDF: Stata module to calculate any base period GDP deflator for China CNGDF: Stata module to calculate any base period GDP deflator for China
  • CNINDEX: Stata module to download historical stock quotations from Chinese market CNINDEX: Stata module to download historical stock quotations from Chinese market
  • CNINTRADAY: Stata module to Download intraday stock quotations for a list of stock codes in a given date from SinaFinance CNINTRADAY: Stata module to Download intraday stock quotations for a list of stock codes in a given date from SinaFinance
  • CNKCHART: Stata module to draw candlestick chart with Chinese stock prices CNKCHART: Stata module to draw candlestick chart with Chinese stock prices
  • CNMAPSEARCH: Stata module to extract the specified information by keyword in a certain geographic range CNMAPSEARCH: Stata module to extract the specified information by keyword in a certain geographic range
  • CNORMP: Stata module to evaluate censored normal distribution CNORMP: Stata module to evaluate censored normal distribution
  • CNPOI: Stata module to extract the specified information by keywords or types in a Chinese city CNPOI: Stata module to extract the specified information by keywords or types in a Chinese city

  • CNSTOCK: Stata module to download stock names and codes for Chinese listed companies CNSTOCK: Stata module to download stock names and codes for Chinese listed companies
  • CNSTROKE: Stata module to return the stroke count of Chinese characters CNSTROKE: Stata module to return the stroke count of Chinese characters

  • COMBINATORICS: Stata module to evaluate the performance of all possible 2^n models generated with a given set of n possible explanatory variables COMBINATORICS: Stata module to evaluate the performance of all possible 2^n models generated with a given set of n possible explanatory variables

D

  • D3NETWORK: Stata module to create network visualizations using D3.js to view in browser D3NETWORK: Stata module to create network visualizations using D3.js to view in browser
  • DADJOKE: Stata module to produce terrible dad jokes DADJOKE: Stata module to produce terrible dad jokes
  • DAG: SAS routine to perform jackknife estimation DAG: SAS routine to perform jackknife estimation
  • DAG: Stata module to provide utilities for directed acyclic graphs DAG: Stata module to provide utilities for directed acyclic graphs
  • DAGFIT: Stata module to fit a Generalized Beta (Type 2) distribution to grouped data via ML DAGFIT: Stata module to fit a Generalized Beta (Type 2) distribution to grouped data via ML
  • DAGUMFIT: Stata module to fit a Dagum distribution by maximum likelihood DAGUMFIT: Stata module to fit a Dagum distribution by maximum likelihood
  • DASCT01: Gauss Module for estimating Dynamic Asymmetric and Symmetric Causality Tests DASCT01: Gauss Module for estimating Dynamic Asymmetric and Symmetric Causality Tests
  • DASH: Stata module to score Disabilities of the Arm, Shoulder and Hand DASH: Stata module to score Disabilities of the Arm, Shoulder and Hand
  • DASHGPH: Stata module to construct dashed lines in scatterplots DASHGPH: Stata module to construct dashed lines in scatterplots
  • DASHLN: Stata module to add dashed lines to graphs DASHLN: Stata module to add dashed lines to graphs
  • DASP: Stata modules for distributive analysis DASP: Stata modules for distributive analysis
  • DATACHECK: Stata module to perform data checks and produce informative output DATACHECK: Stata module to perform data checks and produce informative output
  • DATAEX: Stata module to generate a properly formatted data example for Statalist DATAEX: Stata module to generate a properly formatted data example for Statalist
  • DATANET: Stata module to facilitate dataset organization for network analysis purposes DATANET: Stata module to facilitate dataset organization for network analysis purposes
  • DATAOUT: Stata module to export a dataset or tab-delimited file into various formats DATAOUT: Stata module to export a dataset or tab-delimited file into various formats
  • DATAPLINK: Stata module to import data from plink DATAPLINK: Stata module to import data from plink
  • DATEFRAC: Stata module to convert calendar dates to fractional years DATEFRAC: Stata module to convert calendar dates to fractional years
  • DATESUM: Stata module to display summary statistics for date variables DATESUM: Stata module to display summary statistics for date variables
  • DATMAT: Stata module to multiply variables via matrix multiplication DATMAT: Stata module to multiply variables via matrix multiplication
  • DBMSCOPYBATCH: Stata module to produce a batch file for DBMS/Copy DBMSCOPYBATCH: Stata module to produce a batch file for DBMS/Copy
  • DBNOMICS: Stata module for DB.nomics, the world’s economic database DBNOMICS: Stata module for DB.nomics, the world’s economic database
  • DCREATE: Stata module to create efficient designs for discrete choice experiments DCREATE: Stata module to create efficient designs for discrete choice experiments
  • DCT: GAUSS module to read and write Stata numeric file dictionaries DCT: GAUSS module to read and write Stata numeric file dictionaries
  • DDF2DCT: Stata module to facilitate infiling US Government data distributed with a DDF DDF2DCT: Stata module to facilitate infiling US Government data distributed with a DDF
  • DDML: Stata module for Double/Debiased Machine Learning DDML: Stata module for Double/Debiased Machine Learning
  • DEATON: Stata modules to analyze household surveys DEATON: Stata modules to analyze household surveys
  • DECI: Stata module to perform Variable Base conversion DECI: Stata module to perform Variable Base conversion
  • DECOMP: Stata module to compute decompositions of earnings gaps DECOMP: Stata module to compute decompositions of earnings gaps
  • DECOMPOSE: Stata module to compute decompositions of wage differentials DECOMPOSE: Stata module to compute decompositions of wage differentials
  • DELAUNAY: Stata module for Delaunay triangulation DELAUNAY: Stata module for Delaunay triangulation
  • DELTA: Stata module to compute the Delta index of scale discrimination DELTA: Stata module to compute the Delta index of scale discrimination
  • DEMOTIVATE: Stata module to remind users of the harsh reality of econometric & statistical practice DEMOTIVATE: Stata module to remind users of the harsh reality of econometric & statistical practice
  • DENORMIX: Stata module to perform decomposition of normal mixture DENORMIX: Stata module to perform decomposition of normal mixture
  • DENTON: RATS procedure to distribute a series to a higher frequency using proportional Denton method DENTON: RATS procedure to distribute a series to a higher frequency using proportional Denton method
  • DENTON: Stata module to interpolate a flow or stock series from low-frequency totals via proportional Denton method DENTON: Stata module to interpolate a flow or stock series from low-frequency totals via proportional Denton method
  • DEP4ASM: Stata module to create [in]dependent variable for alternative-specific models DEP4ASM: Stata module to create [in]dependent variable for alternative-specific models

  • EGENMORE: Stata modules to extend the generate function EGENMORE: Stata modules to extend the generate function

  • ELTMLE: Stata module to provide Ensemble Learning Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation ELTMLE: Stata module to provide Ensemble Learning Targeted Maximum Likelihood Estimation
  • EMAIL: Stata module to send emails from Stata via Python EMAIL: Stata module to send emails from Stata via Python
  • EMAILME: Stata module to facilitate sending mail on Windows systems EMAILME: Stata module to facilitate sending mail on Windows systems

  • EMH: Stata module to compute extended Mantel-Haenszel statistics EMH: Stata module to compute extended Mantel-Haenszel statistics
  • ENCODEFROM: Stata module to rename and encode variables using an external crosswalk ENCODEFROM: Stata module to rename and encode variables using an external crosswalk
  • ENCODELABEL: Stata module to encode string variable into categorical variable ENCODELABEL: Stata module to encode string variable into categorical variable
  • ENCODER: Stata module to encode strings into numerics with the option to replace ENCODER: Stata module to encode strings into numerics with the option to replace
  • ENDERSIKLOS: RATS procedure to perform Enders-Siklos test for cointegration with threshold effect ENDERSIKLOS: RATS procedure to perform Enders-Siklos test for cointegration with threshold effect
  • ENFORCE: Stata module to force variables to satisfy a set of accounting identities ENFORCE: Stata module to force variables to satisfy a set of accounting identities
  • ENLARGE: Stata module to propagate constant values through group ENLARGE: Stata module to propagate constant values through group
  • ENTROPY: Stata module to compute Shannon, Renyi, HCT entropy & Hill numbers ENTROPY: Stata module to compute Shannon, Renyi, HCT entropy & Hill numbers
  • ENTROPYETC: Stata module for entropy and related measures for categories ENTROPYETC: Stata module for entropy and related measures for categories
  • ENWEI: Stata module to implement the entropy method ENWEI: Stata module to implement the entropy method
  • EOFPLOT: Stata module to plot coefficients or loadings after principal component or factor analysis EOFPLOT: Stata module to plot coefficients or loadings after principal component or factor analysis
  • EPERIOD: Stata module to calculate elapsed time between dates EPERIOD: Stata module to calculate elapsed time between dates
  • EPICONF: Stata module to assess confounding effects in epidemiological studies EPICONF: Stata module to assess confounding effects in epidemiological studies
  • EPIDATA: Data entry system for use with Stata, SPSS, SAS, Excel, text formats EPIDATA: Data entry system for use with Stata, SPSS, SAS, Excel, text formats
  • EPIMODELS: Stata module to implement epidemiological models and simulations EPIMODELS: Stata module to implement epidemiological models and simulations
  • EPISENS: Stata module for basic sensitivity analysis of epidemiological results EPISENS: Stata module for basic sensitivity analysis of epidemiological results
  • EPISENSRRI: Stata module for basic sensitivity analysis for unmeasured confounders EPISENSRRI: Stata module for basic sensitivity analysis for unmeasured confounders
  • EPITABLE: Stata module to more easily create table 2 and table 3 for epidemiological studies EPITABLE: Stata module to more easily create table 2 and table 3 for epidemiological studies
  • EPIWEEK: Stata module to create epidemiological week and equivalent epidemiological year EPIWEEK: Stata module to create epidemiological week and equivalent epidemiological year
  • EPRESENT: Stata module to present non-linear relationships in regression models with log or logit-link EPRESENT: Stata module to present non-linear relationships in regression models with log or logit-link
  • EPSIGR: Stata module to save graph in EPSF format in UNIX environment EPSIGR: Stata module to save graph in EPSF format in UNIX environment
  • EQNTOACF: RATS procedure to create an ACF from an ARMA equation EQNTOACF: RATS procedure to create an ACF from an ARMA equation
  • EQPRHISTOGRAM: Stata module for equal probability histogram EQPRHISTOGRAM: Stata module for equal probability histogram
  • EQUATION: Stata module to Output The Equation of a Regression EQUATION: Stata module to Output The Equation of a Regression
  • ER: Stata module to compute Esteban and Ray measure of polarization ER: Stata module to compute Esteban and Ray measure of polarization
  • ERATE: Stata module to import up-to-date exchange rates for any currency pairs ERATE: Stata module to import up-to-date exchange rates for any currency pairs
  • EREPLACE: Stata module to extend egen and egenmore to permit replacing EREPLACE: Stata module to extend egen and egenmore to permit replacing
  • EREPOST: Stata module to repost the estimation results EREPOST: Stata module to repost the estimation results
  • ERET2: Stata module to save results in e() ERET2: Stata module to save results in e()
  • ERSTEST: RATS procedure to perform Elliott-Rothenberg-Stock unit root tests ERSTEST: RATS procedure to perform Elliott-Rothenberg-Stock unit root tests
  • ERSUR: Stata module to calculate Elliott, Rothenberg & Stock DF-GLS unit root test statistic along with 1, 5 and 10% finite-sample critical values and associated p-values ERSUR: Stata module to calculate Elliott, Rothenberg & Stock DF-GLS unit root test statistic along with 1, 5 and 10% finite-sample critical values and associated p-values
  • ESETRAN: Stata module to transform estimates and standard errors in parmest resultssets ESETRAN: Stata module to transform estimates and standard errors in parmest resultssets
  • ESIZEREG: Stata module for computing the effect size based on a linear regression coefficient ESIZEREG: Stata module for computing the effect size based on a linear regression coefficient
  • ESLI: Stata module to calculate the equation of a straight line ESLI: Stata module to calculate the equation of a straight line
  • EST2TEX: Stata module to create LaTeX tables from estimation results EST2TEX: Stata module to create LaTeX tables from estimation results
  • ESTETA: Stata module to estimate long-run effects using historical instruments ESTETA: Stata module to estimate long-run effects using historical instruments
  • ESTOUT1: Stata module to export estimation results from estimates table ESTOUT1: Stata module to export estimation results from estimates table
  • ESTOUT: Stata module to make regression tables ESTOUT: Stata module to make regression tables
  • ESTPARM: Stata module to save results from a parmest resultsset and test equality ESTPARM: Stata module to save results from a parmest resultsset and test equality
  • ESTQUANT: Stata module to implement Quantile approach by Combes et al ESTQUANT: Stata module to implement Quantile approach by Combes et al
  • ESTRAT: Stata module to perform Endogenous Stratification for Randomized Experiments ESTRAT: Stata module to perform Endogenous Stratification for Randomized Experiments
  • ESTSAVE: Stata module to save estimation results with current dataset ESTSAVE: Stata module to save estimation results with current dataset
  • ESTUDY: Stata module to perform an event study ESTUDY: Stata module to perform an event study
  • ESTWRITE: Stata module to store estimation results on disk ESTWRITE: Stata module to store estimation results on disk
  • ETH2GRECAL: Stata module to convert dates from the Ethiopian calendar to the Gregorian calendar ETH2GRECAL: Stata module to convert dates from the Ethiopian calendar to the Gregorian calendar
  • ETIME: Stata module to time how long a program runs ETIME: Stata module to time how long a program runs
  • EUROSTATUSE: Stata module to import data from Eurostat repository into Stata EUROSTATUSE: Stata module to import data from Eurostat repository into Stata
  • EUROUSE: Stata module to import data from Eurostat EUROUSE: Stata module to import data from Eurostat
  • EVALUE: Stata module for conducting sensitivity analyses for unmeasured confounding in observational studies EVALUE: Stata module for conducting sensitivity analyses for unmeasured confounding in observational studies
  • EVALUES: Stata module to calculate E-values EVALUES: Stata module to calculate E-values
  • EVALUE_ESTAT: Stata module for conducting postestimation sensitivity analyses of unmeasured confounding in observational studies EVALUE_ESTAT: Stata module for conducting postestimation sensitivity analyses of unmeasured confounding in observational studies
  • EVENTBASELINE: Stata module to correct event study after xthdidregress EVENTBASELINE: Stata module to correct event study after xthdidregress
  • EVENTCOEFPLOT: Stata module to produce advanced event-study graphical analysis EVENTCOEFPLOT: Stata module to produce advanced event-study graphical analysis
  • EVENTDD: Stata module to panel event study models and generate event study plots EVENTDD: Stata module to panel event study models and generate event study plots
  • EVENTSTUDY2: Stata module to perform event studies with complex test statistics EVENTSTUDY2: Stata module to perform event studies with complex test statistics
  • EVENTSTUDY: Stata module to perform event studies in finance EVENTSTUDY: Stata module to perform event studies in finance
  • EVENTSTUDYINTERACT: Stata module to implement the interaction weighted estimator for an event study EVENTSTUDYINTERACT: Stata module to implement the interaction weighted estimator for an event study
  • EVENTSTUDYWEIGHTS: Stata module to estimate the implied weights on the cohort-specific average treatment effects on the treated (CATTs) (event study specifications) EVENTSTUDYWEIGHTS: Stata module to estimate the implied weights on the cohort-specific average treatment effects on the treated (CATTs) (event study specifications)
  • EVENT_PLOT: Stata module to plot the staggered-adoption diff-in-diff (“event study”) estimates EVENT_PLOT: Stata module to plot the staggered-adoption diff-in-diff (“event study”) estimates
  • EVHISTPLOT: Stata module to produce event history plot EVHISTPLOT: Stata module to produce event history plot
  • EVI: Stata module to compute Epidemic Volatility Index (EVI) for detecting epidemic waves EVI: Stata module to compute Epidemic Volatility Index (EVI) for detecting epidemic waves
  • EVSTUDYDD: Stata module to estimate event studies in D-i-D settings EVSTUDYDD: Stata module to estimate event studies in D-i-D settings
  • EWMA: Stata module to calculate exponentially weighted moving average EWMA: Stata module to calculate exponentially weighted moving average
  • EXACTINVERSE: RATS procedure to compute exact (limit) inverse with “infinite” components EXACTINVERSE: RATS procedure to compute exact (limit) inverse with “infinite” components
  • EXAMPLEOBS: Stata module to prints example observations EXAMPLEOBS: Stata module to prints example observations
  • EXAMPLES: Stata module to show examples from on-line help files EXAMPLES: Stata module to show examples from on-line help files
  • EXBSAMPLE: Stata module to compute exchangeably weighted (or Bayesian) bootstraps EXBSAMPLE: Stata module to compute exchangeably weighted (or Bayesian) bootstraps
  • EXCEL2LATEX: Stata module to convert Excel table to LaTeX table EXCEL2LATEX: Stata module to convert Excel table to LaTeX table
  • EXCELCLEAN: Stata module to clean and integrate excel files EXCELCLEAN: Stata module to clean and integrate excel files
  • EXCELCOL: Stata module to convert a column index into a name of an Excel column EXCELCOL: Stata module to convert a column index into a name of an Excel column
  • EXCELOUTPUT: Stata module to output regression results directly to specific cells in excel file EXCELOUTPUT: Stata module to output regression results directly to specific cells in excel file
  • EXCELSAVE: Stata module to provide a convenient way to export matched Stata datasets from a specified input directory (also including, if wanted, additionally recursively matched subsets of files within distinctly matched offspring-directories) to Excel-files EXCELSAVE: Stata module to provide a convenient way to export matched Stata datasets from a specified input directory (also including, if wanted, additionally recursively matched subsets of files within distinctly matched offspring-directories) to Excel-files
  • EXITMA: Stata module to define the exit status of a meta-analysis EXITMA: Stata module to define the exit status of a meta-analysis
  • EXPANDBY: Stata module to duplicate observations by variable EXPANDBY: Stata module to duplicate observations by variable
  • EXPANDIHLP: Stata module to expand the help file preprocessor directive for substituting repeated material in a given help file EXPANDIHLP: Stata module to expand the help file preprocessor directive for substituting repeated material in a given help file
  • EXPANDRANK: Stata module to expand and rank observations EXPANDRANK: Stata module to expand and rank observations
  • EXPAND_N: Stata module to expand dataset EXPAND_N: Stata module to expand dataset
  • EXPGEN: Stata module to duplicate observations sorted in original order with generated variables EXPGEN: Stata module to duplicate observations sorted in original order with generated variables
  • EXPL: Stata module to explore folders and files EXPL: Stata module to explore folders and files
  • EXPLIST: Stata module to generate an exponentially-spaced list of numbers EXPLIST: Stata module to generate an exponentially-spaced list of numbers
  • EXPLORELABS: Stata module to explore the use of value labels in the dataset EXPLORELABS: Stata module to explore the use of value labels in the dataset

  • EXQUANTILE: Stata module for estimation and inference for (conditional) extremal quantiles EXQUANTILE: Stata module for estimation and inference for (conditional) extremal quantiles

  • EXTREME: Stata module to fit models used in univariate extreme value theory EXTREME: Stata module to fit models used in univariate extreme value theory
  • EXTREMES: Stata module to list extreme values of a variable EXTREMES: Stata module to list extreme values of a variable

F

  • FAAM: Stata module to score Foot and Ankle Ability Measure FAAM: Stata module to score Foot and Ankle Ability Measure
  • FABPLOT: Stata module for plots for each subset with rest of the data as backdrop FABPLOT: Stata module for plots for each subset with rest of the data as backdrop

  • FACTORN: Stata module to calculate the factors of an integer FACTORN: Stata module to calculate the factors of an integer
  • FACTORTEST: Stata module to perform tests for appropriateness of factor analysis FACTORTEST: Stata module to perform tests for appropriateness of factor analysis
  • FACTREF: Stata module to insert new observations with reference values for factors FACTREF: Stata module to insert new observations with reference values for factors
  • FAGAN: Stata module for Fagan’s Bayesian nomoigram FAGAN: Stata module for Fagan’s Bayesian nomoigram
  • FAIRLIE: Stata module to generate nonlinear decomposition of binary outcome differentials FAIRLIE: Stata module to generate nonlinear decomposition of binary outcome differentials
  • FAR5: Stata module to compute floating absolute risk for Cox and conditional logit regression FAR5: Stata module to compute floating absolute risk for Cox and conditional logit regression
  • FASTCD: Stata module to automate changing directories FASTCD: Stata module to automate changing directories
  • FASTGINI: Stata module to calculate Gini coefficient with jackknife standard errors FASTGINI: Stata module to calculate Gini coefficient with jackknife standard errors
  • FASTRESHAPE: Stata module for efficient implementation of reshape for big datasets FASTRESHAPE: Stata module for efficient implementation of reshape for big datasets
  • FASTXTILE: Stata module to generate a variable of quantile categories FASTXTILE: Stata module to generate a variable of quantile categories
  • FAVPLOTS: Stata module for formatted added-variable plot(s) FAVPLOTS: Stata module for formatted added-variable plot(s)
  • FBAR: Stata module to produce bar charts showing frequencies of categorical variables FBAR: Stata module to produce bar charts showing frequencies of categorical variables

  • FEDISTR: Stata module for plotting distributions after absorbing fixed effects FEDISTR: Stata module for plotting distributions after absorbing fixed effects
  • FEDIT: Stata module to find and edit text file from within Stata FEDIT: Stata module to find and edit text file from within Stata
  • FELDTI: Stata module to compare two independent coefficients of reliability FELDTI: Stata module to compare two independent coefficients of reliability
  • FESE: Stata module to calculate standard errors for fixed effects FESE: Stata module to calculate standard errors for fixed effects
  • FFRAMEAPPEND: Stata module to append data frames to currently active data frame FFRAMEAPPEND: Stata module to append data frames to currently active data frame

  • FIELLER: Stata module to calculate confidence intervals of quotients of normal variates FIELLER: Stata module to calculate confidence intervals of quotients of normal variates

  • FILESEARCH: Stata module to recursively list files matching to a pattern or regular expression FILESEARCH: Stata module to recursively list files matching to a pattern or regular expression
  • FILEUTILS: Stata module for faster file navigation FILEUTILS: Stata module for faster file navigation
  • FILLMISSING: Stata module to fill missing values in numeric or string variables FILLMISSING: Stata module to fill missing values in numeric or string variables
  • FILTERTRACE: Stata module to trace filter or contingency questions FILTERTRACE: Stata module to trace filter or contingency questions
  • FIND: Stata module to find matching strings across files in the current directory FIND: Stata module to find matching strings across files in the current directory
  • FINDDUP: Stata module to find non-unique values or observations FINDDUP: Stata module to find non-unique values or observations
  • FINDNAME: Stata module to list variables matching name patterns or other properties FINDNAME: Stata module to list variables matching name patterns or other properties
  • FINDREGEX: Stata module to find variable names matching a regular expression pattern FINDREGEX: Stata module to find variable names matching a regular expression pattern
  • FINDSYSMIS: Stata module to find system missing values in a list of variables FINDSYSMIS: Stata module to find system missing values in a list of variables
  • FINDUNIQUE: Stata module to display combinations of unique identifiers in a dataset FINDUNIQUE: Stata module to display combinations of unique identifiers in a dataset
  • FINDVAL: Stata module to find a specific value FINDVAL: Stata module to find a specific value
  • FIND_DENOM: Stata module to find minimum sample size from percentages FIND_DENOM: Stata module to find minimum sample size from percentages
  • FIND_INDEX: Stata module to determine the index (observation number) of an observation that satisfies a specified condition FIND_INDEX: Stata module to determine the index (observation number) of an observation that satisfies a specified condition

  • HALFNORM_DIST: Stata module for computing half-normal distribution functions HALFNORM_DIST: Stata module for computing half-normal distribution functions
  • HALLT-SKEWT: Stata module to compute skewness-adjusted bootstrap t-statistics HALLT-SKEWT: Stata module to compute skewness-adjusted bootstrap t-statistics
  • HALTON: RATS procedure to generate Halton sequences HALTON: RATS procedure to generate Halton sequences
  • HAMILTONFILTER: Stata module to calculate the Hamilton Filter for a Single Time Series or for a Panel Dataset HAMILTONFILTER: Stata module to calculate the Hamilton Filter for a Single Time Series or for a Panel Dataset
  • HAMMOCK: Stata module to implement Hammock plot, visualizing categorical (and continuous) data HAMMOCK: Stata module to implement Hammock plot, visualizing categorical (and continuous) data
  • HANGROOT: Stata module creating a hanging rootogram comparing an empirical distribution to the best fitting theoretical distribution HANGROOT: Stata module creating a hanging rootogram comparing an empirical distribution to the best fitting theoretical distribution
  • HANNARISSANEN: RATS procedure to estimate an ARIMA model using the Hannan-Rissanen algorithm HANNARISSANEN: RATS procedure to estimate an ARIMA model using the Hannan-Rissanen algorithm
  • HANOITOWER: Stata module to play Towers of Hanoi HANOITOWER: Stata module to play Towers of Hanoi
  • HANSEN2: Stata module for Hansen’s test for parameter instability HANSEN2: Stata module for Hansen’s test for parameter instability
  • HAPBLOCK: Stata module to perform haplotype analysis to identify the edges of haplotype blocks HAPBLOCK: Stata module to perform haplotype analysis to identify the edges of haplotype blocks
  • HAPIPF: Stata module to perform haplotype analysis HAPIPF: Stata module to perform haplotype analysis
  • HARMBY: Stata module to harmonize values of variables within by-groups HARMBY: Stata module to harmonize values of variables within by-groups
  • HARMMULTICOLINTST: MATLAB function to analyze collinearity HARMMULTICOLINTST: MATLAB function to analyze collinearity

  • HDQUANTILE: Stata module for Harrell-Davis estimator of quantiles HDQUANTILE: Stata module for Harrell-Davis estimator of quantiles

  • HEAD: Stata module to print the head observations (first observations in data set) HEAD: Stata module to print the head observations (first observations in data set)

  • HEART: Stata module to make coding fun and accessible HEART: Stata module to make coding fun and accessible
  • HEATMAPGRAPH: Stata module to measure the evolution of risks to financial stability over the financial cycle HEATMAPGRAPH: Stata module to measure the evolution of risks to financial stability over the financial cycle
  • HEATPLOT: Stata module to create heat plots and hexagon plots HEATPLOT: Stata module to create heat plots and hexagon plots

  • HECKROC: Stata module to plot ROC curves HECKROC: Stata module to plot ROC curves

  • HESTONVANILLALIPTON: MATLAB function to evaluate European FX option prices in the Heston (1993) model using the approach of Lipton (2002) HESTONVANILLALIPTON: MATLAB function to evaluate European FX option prices in the Heston (1993) model using the approach of Lipton (2002)
  • HESTONVANILLASMILE: MATLAB function to compute the volatility smile implied by the Heston (1993) option pricing model HESTONVANILLASMILE: MATLAB function to compute the volatility smile implied by the Heston (1993) option pricing model

  • HETPROB: Stata module to estimate heteroskedastic probit model HETPROB: Stata module to estimate heteroskedastic probit model

  • HETSAR: Stata module to estimate spatial autoregressive models with heterogeneous coefficients HETSAR: Stata module to estimate spatial autoregressive models with heterogeneous coefficients

  • HISTPLOT: Stata module to produce histogram for frequency distribution HISTPLOT: Stata module to produce histogram for frequency distribution

I

  • IATI: Stata module to import International Aid Transparency Initiative data IATI: Stata module to import International Aid Transparency Initiative data

  • IGENCOX: Stata module to fit generalized Cox models IGENCOX: Stata module to fit generalized Cox models
  • IGENERATE: Stata module to apply a variety of coding schemes, including weighted effect coded interactions IGENERATE: Stata module to apply a variety of coding schemes, including weighted effect coded interactions
  • IGESET: Stata module to estimate intergenerational income elasticities (IGEs) with a single set of instruments IGESET: Stata module to estimate intergenerational income elasticities (IGEs) with a single set of instruments

  • INSINGAP: Stata module to insert a single gap observation at the top of each by-group INSINGAP: Stata module to insert a single gap observation at the top of each by-group

  • INTEGRATE_AQ: Stata module to do adaptive quadrature for integrals INTEGRATE_AQ: Stata module to do adaptive quadrature for integrals

  • INTGPH: Stata module to interpret interaction effects and present graphically INTGPH: Stata module to interpret interaction effects and present graphically
  • INTREG2: Stata module to perform interval regression with multiplicative heteroskedasticity INTREG2: Stata module to perform interval regression with multiplicative heteroskedasticity

  • INT_UTILS: Stata module to perform interval computations in Mata INT_UTILS: Stata module to perform interval computations in Mata
