  • IPDMETAN: Stata module for performing two-stage IPD meta-analysis IPDMETAN: Stata module for performing two-stage IPD meta-analysis
  • IPDPOWER: Stata module to perform simulation based power calculations for mixed effects modelling IPDPOWER: Stata module to perform simulation based power calculations for mixed effects modelling
  • IPF: Stata module to perform log-linear modelling using Iterative Proportional Fitting IPF: Stata module to perform log-linear modelling using Iterative Proportional Fitting
  • IPFRAKING: Stata module to perform iterative proportional fitting, aka raking IPFRAKING: Stata module to perform iterative proportional fitting, aka raking
  • IPFWEIGHT: Stata module to create adjustment weights for surveys IPFWEIGHT: Stata module to create adjustment weights for surveys
  • IPSHIN: RATS procedure to implement Im, Pesaran and Shin panel unit root test IPSHIN: RATS procedure to implement Im, Pesaran and Shin panel unit root test
  • IPSHIN: Stata module to perform Im-Pesaran-Shin panel unit root test IPSHIN: Stata module to perform Im-Pesaran-Shin panel unit root test
  • IPWBREG: Stata module to compute inverse propensity weights from Bernoulli regression IPWBREG: Stata module to compute inverse propensity weights from Bernoulli regression
  • IPWLOGIT: Stata module to fit marginal logistic regression by inverse probability weighting IPWLOGIT: Stata module to fit marginal logistic regression by inverse probability weighting
  • IQUANTILE: Stata module to calculate interpolated quantiles IQUANTILE: Stata module to calculate interpolated quantiles
  • IRA: Stata module to calculate rwg and related interrater agreement indices IRA: Stata module to calculate rwg and related interrater agreement indices
  • IRAX: Stata module to perform isotonic regression analysis IRAX: Stata module to perform isotonic regression analysis
  • IRR: Stata module to calculate the (periodic) internal rate of return for a series of periodic cash flows IRR: Stata module to calculate the (periodic) internal rate of return for a series of periodic cash flows
  • IRREPRO: Stata module to produce a simulation of irreproducible results IRREPRO: Stata module to produce a simulation of irreproducible results
  • IRSCHARITIES: Stata module to import and format IRS Exempt Organization Business Master File Data IRSCHARITIES: Stata module to import and format IRS Exempt Organization Business Master File Data
  • ISA: Stata module to perform Imbens’ (2003) sensitivity analysis ISA: Stata module to perform Imbens’ (2003) sensitivity analysis
  • ISCO: Stata module to recode 4 digit ISCO-68 occupational codes ISCO: Stata module to recode 4 digit ISCO-68 occupational codes
  • ISCOGEN: Stata module to translate ISCO codes ISCOGEN: Stata module to translate ISCO codes
  • ISCOIL: Stata module to recode Israeli CBS occupation standard classification into ISCO-08 occupational classification ISCOIL: Stata module to recode Israeli CBS occupation standard classification into ISCO-08 occupational classification
  • ISKO: Stata module to recode 4 digit ISCO-88 occupational codes ISKO: Stata module to recode 4 digit ISCO-88 occupational codes
  • ISOCODES: Stata module to generate standardized country codes and names ISOCODES: Stata module to generate standardized country codes and names
  • ISOGINI: Stata module to estimate isogini measures at different percentiles ISOGINI: Stata module to estimate isogini measures at different percentiles
  • ISOGRAPH: Stata module to compute inequality over logit ranks of social hierarchy ISOGRAPH: Stata module to compute inequality over logit ranks of social hierarchy
  • ISOPOVERTY: Stata module to generate data for Inequality-Poverty and Iso-Poverty curves ISOPOVERTY: Stata module to generate data for Inequality-Poverty and Iso-Poverty curves
  • ISVAR: Stata module to filter names into variable names and others ISVAR: Stata module to filter names into variable names and others
  • ITPSCORE: Stata module to implement Iterative Propensity Score Logistic Regression Model Search Procedure ITPSCORE: Stata module to implement Iterative Propensity Score Logistic Regression Model Search Procedure
  • ITSA: Stata module to perform interrupted time series analysis for single and multiple groups ITSA: Stata module to perform interrupted time series analysis for single and multiple groups
  • ITSAMATCH: Stata module to perform matching in multiple group interrupted time-series analysis ITSAMATCH: Stata module to perform matching in multiple group interrupted time-series analysis
  • ITSAPERM: Stata module to perform permutation tests for matched multiple group interrupted time series analysis ITSAPERM: Stata module to perform permutation tests for matched multiple group interrupted time series analysis
  • ITSARAND: Stata module for conducting randomization tests for single-case and multiple-baseline AB phase designs ITSARAND: Stata module for conducting randomization tests for single-case and multiple-baseline AB phase designs
  • ITSPOWER: Stata module for simulation based power calculations for linear interrupted time series (ITS) designs ITSPOWER: Stata module for simulation based power calculations for linear interrupted time series (ITS) designs
  • ITSP_ADO: Stata module to accompany Introduction to Stata Programming book ITSP_ADO: Stata module to accompany Introduction to Stata Programming book
  • ITVALPCTILE: Stata module for estimation of interval-valued percentiles (quantiles) for interval-valued data ITVALPCTILE: Stata module for estimation of interval-valued percentiles (quantiles) for interval-valued data
  • IVACTEST: Stata module to perform Cumby-Huizinga test for autocorrelation after IV/OLS estimation IVACTEST: Stata module to perform Cumby-Huizinga test for autocorrelation after IV/OLS estimation
  • IVBOUNDS: Stata module providing instrumental variable method to bound treatment-effects estimates with potentially misreported and endogenous program participation IVBOUNDS: Stata module providing instrumental variable method to bound treatment-effects estimates with potentially misreported and endogenous program participation
  • IVCHECK: Stata module to choose between OLS and contaminated IV IVCHECK: Stata module to choose between OLS and contaminated IV
  • IVCLOGLOG: Stata module to estimate a complementary log-log model with endogenous covariates, instrumented via the control function approach (i.e., 2SRI) IVCLOGLOG: Stata module to estimate a complementary log-log model with endogenous covariates, instrumented via the control function approach (i.e., 2SRI)
  • IVCRC: Stata module to implement the instrumental variables correlated random coefficients estimator IVCRC: Stata module to implement the instrumental variables correlated random coefficients estimator
  • IVDESC: Stata module to profile compliers and non-compliers for instrumental variable analysis IVDESC: Stata module to profile compliers and non-compliers for instrumental variable analysis
  • IVENDOG: Stata module to calculate Durbin-Wu-Hausman endogeneity test after ivreg IVENDOG: Stata module to calculate Durbin-Wu-Hausman endogeneity test after ivreg
  • IVGAUSS2: Stata module to estimate two-parameter log-inverse Gaussian regression IVGAUSS2: Stata module to estimate two-parameter log-inverse Gaussian regression
  • IVGLOG: Stata module to estimate inverse Gaussian distribution-log link MLE model IVGLOG: Stata module to estimate inverse Gaussian distribution-log link MLE model
  • IVGMM0: Stata module to perform instrumental variables via GMM IVGMM0: Stata module to perform instrumental variables via GMM
  • IVGRAVITY: Stata module containing method-of-moment IV estimators of exponential-regression models with two-way fixed effects from a cross-section of data on dyadic interactions and endogenous covariates IVGRAVITY: Stata module containing method-of-moment IV estimators of exponential-regression models with two-way fixed effects from a cross-section of data on dyadic interactions and endogenous covariates
  • IVHETTEST: Stata module to perform Pagan-Hall and related heteroskedasticity tests after IV IVHETTEST: Stata module to perform Pagan-Hall and related heteroskedasticity tests after IV
  • IVMEDIATE: Stata module to perform causal mediation analysis in instrumental-variables regressions IVMEDIATE: Stata module to perform causal mediation analysis in instrumental-variables regressions
  • IVOLSDEC: Stata module to produce decomposition of the IV-OLS coefficient gap IVOLSDEC: Stata module to produce decomposition of the IV-OLS coefficient gap
  • IVPERMUTE: Stata module to estimate nearly collinear robust instrumental variables regression IVPERMUTE: Stata module to estimate nearly collinear robust instrumental variables regression
  • IVPOIS: Stata module to estimate an instrumental variables Poisson regression via GMM IVPOIS: Stata module to estimate an instrumental variables Poisson regression via GMM
  • IVPROB-IVTOBIT6: Stata modules to estimate instrumental variables probit and tobit IVPROB-IVTOBIT6: Stata modules to estimate instrumental variables probit and tobit
  • IVQREG2: Stata module to provide structural quantile function estimation IVQREG2: Stata module to provide structural quantile function estimation
  • IVREG210: Stata module for extended instrumental variables/2SLS and GMM estimation (v10) IVREG210: Stata module for extended instrumental variables/2SLS and GMM estimation (v10)
  • IVREG28: Stata module for extended instrumental variables/2SLS and GMM estimation (v8) IVREG28: Stata module for extended instrumental variables/2SLS and GMM estimation (v8)
  • IVREG29: Stata module for extended instrumental variables/2SLS and GMM estimation (v9) IVREG29: Stata module for extended instrumental variables/2SLS and GMM estimation (v9)
  • IVREG2: Stata module for extended instrumental variables/2SLS and GMM estimation IVREG2: Stata module for extended instrumental variables/2SLS and GMM estimation
  • IVREG2H: Stata module to perform instrumental variables estimation using heteroskedasticity-based instruments IVREG2H: Stata module to perform instrumental variables estimation using heteroskedasticity-based instruments
  • IVREG2HDFE: Stata module to estimate an Instrumental Variable Linear Regression Model with two High Dimensional Fixed Effects IVREG2HDFE: Stata module to estimate an Instrumental Variable Linear Regression Model with two High Dimensional Fixed Effects
  • IVREG2M: Stata module to identify treatment-effects estimates with potentially misreported and endogenous program participation IVREG2M: Stata module to identify treatment-effects estimates with potentially misreported and endogenous program participation
  • IVREGHDFE: Stata module for extended instrumental variable regressions with multiple levels of fixed effects IVREGHDFE: Stata module for extended instrumental variable regressions with multiple levels of fixed effects
  • IVREGRESS2: Stata module to export first and second-stage results similar to ivregress IVREGRESS2: Stata module to export first and second-stage results similar to ivregress
  • IVREG_SS: Stata module to compute confidence intervals, standard errors, and p-values in an IV regression in which the excluded instrumental variable has a shift-share structure IVREG_SS: Stata module to compute confidence intervals, standard errors, and p-values in an IV regression in which the excluded instrumental variable has a shift-share structure
  • IVRESET: Stata module to perform Ramsey/Pesaran-Taylor/Pagan-Hall RESET specification test after IV/GMM/OLS estimation IVRESET: Stata module to perform Ramsey/Pesaran-Taylor/Pagan-Hall RESET specification test after IV/GMM/OLS estimation
  • IVTREATREG: Stata module to estimate binary treatment models with idiosyncratic average effect IVTREATREG: Stata module to estimate binary treatment models with idiosyncratic average effect
  • IVVIF: Stata module to report variance inflation factors after IV IVVIF: Stata module to report variance inflation factors after IV

J

  • JACCARD: Stata module to calculate Jaccard similarity or dissimilarity of sets JACCARD: Stata module to calculate Jaccard similarity or dissimilarity of sets
  • JAROWINKLER: Stata module to calculate the Jaro-Winkler distance between strings JAROWINKLER: Stata module to calculate the Jaro-Winkler distance between strings
  • JB6: Stata modules to perform Jarque-Bera test for normality JB6: Stata modules to perform Jarque-Bera test for normality
  • JB: Stata module to perform Jarque-Bera test for normality on series JB: Stata module to perform Jarque-Bera test for normality on series
  • JC: Stata module to dynamically load and call Java plugins JC: Stata module to dynamically load and call Java plugins
  • JFORMAT: Stata module to justify formats for a list of variables JFORMAT: Stata module to justify formats for a list of variables
  • JMPIERCE2: Stata module to compute trend decomposition of outcome differentials JMPIERCE2: Stata module to compute trend decomposition of outcome differentials
  • JMPIERCE: Stata module to perform Juhn-Murphy-Pierce decomposition JMPIERCE: Stata module to perform Juhn-Murphy-Pierce decomposition
  • JNSN: Stata module to fit Johnson distributions JNSN: Stata module to fit Johnson distributions
  • JOHANS: Stata module to perform Johansen-Juselius ML estimates of cointegration JOHANS: Stata module to perform Johansen-Juselius ML estimates of cointegration
  • JOHMLE: RATS procedure to perform Johansen ML Cointegration analysis JOHMLE: RATS procedure to perform Johansen ML Cointegration analysis
  • JOINVARS: Stata module to join values of variables JOINVARS: Stata module to join values of variables
  • JONTER: Stata module to perform Jonckheere-Terpstra test JONTER: Stata module to perform Jonckheere-Terpstra test
  • JOYPLOT: Stata module to produce joyplots or ridgeline plots JOYPLOT: Stata module to produce joyplots or ridgeline plots
  • JOY_PLOT: Stata module to produce joy plots JOY_PLOT: Stata module to produce joy plots
  • JRULE: Stata module to detect model misspecifications in SEM JRULE: Stata module to detect model misspecifications in SEM
  • JSONIO: Stata module for I/O operations on JSON data JSONIO: Stata module for I/O operations on JSON data
  • JULIA: Stata module to provide interface to Julia JULIA: Stata module to provide interface to Julia
  • JWDID: Stata module to estimate Difference-in-Difference models using Mundlak approach JWDID: Stata module to estimate Difference-in-Difference models using Mundlak approach

K

  • KALPHA: Stata module to compute Krippendorff’s Alpha-Reliability KALPHA: Stata module to compute Krippendorff’s Alpha-Reliability
  • KANOM: Stata module to estimate Krippendorff’s alpha for nominal variables KANOM: Stata module to estimate Krippendorff’s alpha for nominal variables
  • KAPLANSKY: Stata module to graph examples of distributions of varying kurtosis KAPLANSKY: Stata module to graph examples of distributions of varying kurtosis
  • KAPPA2: Stata module to produce Generalizations of weighted kappa for incomplete designs KAPPA2: Stata module to produce Generalizations of weighted kappa for incomplete designs
  • KAPPAETC: Stata module to evaluate interrater agreement KAPPAETC: Stata module to evaluate interrater agreement
  • KAPPALATE: Stata module to estimate the local average treatment effect (LATE) using Abadie’s kappa approach and other weighting estimators KAPPALATE: Stata module to estimate the local average treatment effect (LATE) using Abadie’s kappa approach and other weighting estimators
  • KAPPREVI: Stata module to plot the dependence of kappa statistic on true prevalence KAPPREVI: Stata module to plot the dependence of kappa statistic on true prevalence
  • KAPUTIL: Stata module to generate confidence intervals and sample size calculations for the kappa-statistic KAPUTIL: Stata module to generate confidence intervals and sample size calculations for the kappa-statistic
  • KATEGO: Stata module to split a continuous numerical variable in custom categories KATEGO: Stata module to split a continuous numerical variable in custom categories
  • KDBOX: Stata module to generate kernel density plot with boxplot KDBOX: Stata module to generate kernel density plot with boxplot
  • KDENS2: Stata module to estimate bivariate kernel density KDENS2: Stata module to estimate bivariate kernel density
  • KDENS: Stata module for univariate kernel density estimation KDENS: Stata module for univariate kernel density estimation
  • KDMANY: Stata module to perform kernel density estimation for several variables KDMANY: Stata module to perform kernel density estimation for several variables
  • KEEPORDER: Stata module to keep and order a set of variables KEEPORDER: Stata module to keep and order a set of variables
  • KEEPVAR: Stata module to keep a list of variables in the order of their appearance in the list KEEPVAR: Stata module to keep a list of variables in the order of their appearance in the list
  • KERNEL: Stata module to compute various kernels KERNEL: Stata module to compute various kernels
  • KERNLDEN2D: MATLAB function to estimate bivariate empirical kernel density function KERNLDEN2D: MATLAB function to estimate bivariate empirical kernel density function
  • KERNREG1: Stata module to compute kernel regression (Nadaraya-Watson estimator) KERNREG1: Stata module to compute kernel regression (Nadaraya-Watson estimator)
  • KERNREG2: Stata module to compute kernel regression (Nadaraya-Watson estimator) KERNREG2: Stata module to compute kernel regression (Nadaraya-Watson estimator)
  • KEYBY: Stata module to key the dataset by a variable list KEYBY: Stata module to key the dataset by a variable list
  • KEYPLOT: Stata module to generate scatter plot with keys in user-chosen positions KEYPLOT: Stata module to generate scatter plot with keys in user-chosen positions
  • KFOLDCLASS: Stata module for generating classification statistics of k-fold cross-validation for binary outcomes KFOLDCLASS: Stata module for generating classification statistics of k-fold cross-validation for binary outcomes
  • KHB: Stata module to decompose total effects into direct and indirect via KHB-method KHB: Stata module to decompose total effects into direct and indirect via KHB-method
  • KINKYREG: Stata module to perform kinky least squares estimation and inference KINKYREG: Stata module to perform kinky least squares estimation and inference
  • KITCHENSINK: Stata module to return the model with the highest number of statistically significant predictors KITCHENSINK: Stata module to return the model with the highest number of statistically significant predictors
  • KIT_LIVINGINCOME: Stata module providing Tables and Bar charts of the Gap to the Living Income Benchmark KIT_LIVINGINCOME: Stata module providing Tables and Bar charts of the Gap to the Living Income Benchmark
  • KMATCH: Stata module module for multivariate-distance and propensity-score matching, including entropy balancing, inverse probability weighting, (coarsened) exact matching, and regression adjustment KMATCH: Stata module module for multivariate-distance and propensity-score matching, including entropy balancing, inverse probability weighting, (coarsened) exact matching, and regression adjustment
  • KMEST: Stata module to compute Kaplan-Meier survival probabilities as estimation results KMEST: Stata module to compute Kaplan-Meier survival probabilities as estimation results
  • KNAPSACK: Stata module to solve the knapsack problem KNAPSACK: Stata module to solve the knapsack problem
  • KOBO2STATA: Stata module to create labelled Stata datasets from KoboToolbox KOBO2STATA: Stata module to create labelled Stata datasets from KoboToolbox
  • KONFOUND: Stata module to quantify robustness of causal inferences KONFOUND: Stata module to quantify robustness of causal inferences
  • KOTLARSKI: Stata module to execute deconvolution kernel density estimation and produce a robust construction of its uniform confidence band KOTLARSKI: Stata module to execute deconvolution kernel density estimation and produce a robust construction of its uniform confidence band
  • KOUNTRY: Stata module to standardize country names across various datasets KOUNTRY: Stata module to standardize country names across various datasets
  • KPSS: RATS procedure to perform KPSS (Kwiatowski, Phillips, Schmidt, and Shin) stationarity test KPSS: RATS procedure to perform KPSS (Kwiatowski, Phillips, Schmidt, and Shin) stationarity test
  • KPSS: Stata module to compute Kwiatkowski-Phillips-Schmidt-Shin test for stationarity KPSS: Stata module to compute Kwiatkowski-Phillips-Schmidt-Shin test for stationarity
  • KR20: Stata module to calculate Kuder-Richardson coefficient of reliability KR20: Stata module to calculate Kuder-Richardson coefficient of reliability
  • KRIPPALPHA: Stata module to compute Krippendorff’s alpha intercoder reliability coefficient KRIPPALPHA: Stata module to compute Krippendorff’s alpha intercoder reliability coefficient
  • KRLS: Stata module to perform Kernel–Based Regularized Least Squares KRLS: Stata module to perform Kernel–Based Regularized Least Squares
  • KSCPOSTDRAW: RATS procedure to draw from posterior density needed in stochastic volatility model KSCPOSTDRAW: RATS procedure to draw from posterior density needed in stochastic volatility model
  • KSI: Stata module to compute Krugman specialization index KSI: Stata module to compute Krugman specialization index
  • KSMIRNOV2VAR: Stata module to perform the Kolmogorov-Smirnov test of the equality of distributions for two variables KSMIRNOV2VAR: Stata module to perform the Kolmogorov-Smirnov test of the equality of distributions for two variables
  • KSSUR: Stata module to calculate Kapetanios, Shin & Snell unit root test statistic along with critical values and p-values KSSUR: Stata module to calculate Kapetanios, Shin & Snell unit root test statistic along with critical values and p-values
  • KSUR: Stata module to calculate Kapetanios & Shin unit root test statistic along with finite-sample critical values and p-values KSUR: Stata module to calculate Kapetanios & Shin unit root test statistic along with finite-sample critical values and p-values
  • KWALLIS2: Stata module to perform Kruskal-Wallis Test for equality of populations KWALLIS2: Stata module to perform Kruskal-Wallis Test for equality of populations
  • KWSTAT: Stata module to compute kernel weighted sample statistics KWSTAT: Stata module to compute kernel weighted sample statistics
  • KY_FIT: Stata module to fit mixture models of the Kapteyn-Ypma type to linked survey and administrative data KY_FIT: Stata module to fit mixture models of the Kapteyn-Ypma type to linked survey and administrative data

L

  • LABCENSWDI: Stata module to automatically manage datasets obtained from US Census 2000 and World Development Indicators databases LABCENSWDI: Stata module to automatically manage datasets obtained from US Census 2000 and World Development Indicators databases
  • LABELDATASYNTAX: Stata module to produce syntax to label variables and values, given a data dictionary LABELDATASYNTAX: Stata module to produce syntax to label variables and values, given a data dictionary
  • LABELLACKING: Stata module to report numeric variables with values lacking value labels LABELLACKING: Stata module to report numeric variables with values lacking value labels
  • LABELLIST: Stata module to list value labels LABELLIST: Stata module to list value labels
  • LABELMISS: Stata module to label missing data LABELMISS: Stata module to label missing data
  • LABELSOF: Stata module to obtain a list of labeled values LABELSOF: Stata module to obtain a list of labeled values
  • LABELUTIL: Stata programs to create multiple value labels LABELUTIL: Stata programs to create multiple value labels
  • LABGEN: Stata module to generate or replace variables with definitions in variable labels LABGEN: Stata module to generate or replace variables with definitions in variable labels
  • LABGRAPH: Stata module to place text labels on two-way graphs LABGRAPH: Stata module to place text labels on two-way graphs
  • LABLIST: Stata module to list value labels (if present) for one or more variables LABLIST: Stata module to list value labels (if present) for one or more variables
  • LABMATCH: Stata module to find observations by label values LABMATCH: Stata module to find observations by label values
  • LABMM: Stata module to modify multiple value labels simultaneously LABMM: Stata module to modify multiple value labels simultaneously
  • LABMV: Stata module to change numeric values to extended missing values preserving value labels LABMV: Stata module to change numeric values to extended missing values preserving value labels
  • LABONE: Stata module to label variables after import excel LABONE: Stata module to label variables after import excel
  • LABREC: Stata module to recode variables according to value label LABREC: Stata module to recode variables according to value label
  • LABSORT: Stata module to recode a grouping variable according to a group statistic and reorder its value labels LABSORT: Stata module to recode a grouping variable according to a group statistic and reorder its value labels
  • LABUP: Stata module to module to order/move variables based on label contents LABUP: Stata module to module to order/move variables based on label contents
  • LABUTIL2: Stata module to manage value and variable labels LABUTIL2: Stata module to manage value and variable labels
  • LABUTIL: Stata modules for managing value and variable labels LABUTIL: Stata modules for managing value and variable labels
  • LABVALCH3: Stata module to change value labels LABVALCH3: Stata module to change value labels
  • LABVALCL: Stata module to clear value labels of null strings LABVALCL: Stata module to clear value labels of null strings
  • LABVALPOOL: Stata module to change value labels LABVALPOOL: Stata module to change value labels
  • LABVARS: Stata module to attach a list of labels to varlist LABVARS: Stata module to attach a list of labels to varlist
  • LAGPOLYROOTS: RATS procedure to create table of the roots of a lag polynomial LAGPOLYROOTS: RATS procedure to create table of the roots of a lag polynomial
  • LAMBDA: Stata module for Goodman and Kruskal’s lambda measures for two-way tables LAMBDA: Stata module for Goodman and Kruskal’s lambda measures for two-way tables
  • LANDEMETS: Stata module to compute boundaries for group sequential clinical trials using alpha spending functions LANDEMETS: Stata module to compute boundaries for group sequential clinical trials using alpha spending functions
  • LANY: Stata module to list values of variables for all observations in subsets of the data LANY: Stata module to list values of variables for all observations in subsets of the data
  • LAPLACEREG: Stata module to perform Laplace regression for censored data LAPLACEREG: Stata module to perform Laplace regression for censored data
  • LARS: Stata module to perform least angle regression LARS: Stata module to perform least angle regression
  • LASAGNA: Stata module to produce lasagna plots LASAGNA: Stata module to produce lasagna plots
  • LASSOPACK: Stata module for lasso, square-root lasso, elastic net, ridge, adaptive lasso estimation and cross-validation LASSOPACK: Stata module for lasso, square-root lasso, elastic net, ridge, adaptive lasso estimation and cross-validation
  • LASTUPTO: Stata module to collapse a dataset to have 1 observation for each of a list of X-values LASTUPTO: Stata module to collapse a dataset to have 1 observation for each of a list of X-values
  • LATAB: Stata module to generate LaTeX output from tabulate LATAB: Stata module to generate LaTeX output from tabulate
  • LBPOWER: Stata module to calculate approximate power (or sample size) for longitudinal studies with binary response and two equally sized treatment groups LBPOWER: Stata module to calculate approximate power (or sample size) for longitudinal studies with binary response and two equally sized treatment groups
  • LBSVMAT: Stata module to create labeled variables from a matrix LBSVMAT: Stata module to create labeled variables from a matrix
  • LCAENTROPY: Stata module to calculate entropy for models with categorical latent variables LCAENTROPY: Stata module to calculate entropy for models with categorical latent variables
  • LCLOGIT2: Stata module to estimate latent class conditional logit models LCLOGIT2: Stata module to estimate latent class conditional logit models
  • LCLOGIT: Stata module to fit latent class conditional logit models via EM algorithm LCLOGIT: Stata module to fit latent class conditional logit models via EM algorithm
  • LCMC: Stata module to estimate latent class missing covariate model for continous main response, ordinal covariate with missing values, and informative selection LCMC: Stata module to estimate latent class missing covariate model for continous main response, ordinal covariate with missing values, and informative selection
  • LDECOMP: Stata module decomposing the total effects in a logistic regression into direct and indirect effects LDECOMP: Stata module decomposing the total effects in a logistic regression into direct and indirect effects
  • LDEV: Stata Program to Compute Deviance after logistic LDEV: Stata Program to Compute Deviance after logistic
  • LDTEST: Stata module to compute Lorenz Dominance tests LDTEST: Stata module to compute Lorenz Dominance tests
  • LE8: Stata module to compute cardiovascular health score based on the American Heart Association’s Life’s Essential 8 metrics LE8: Stata module to compute cardiovascular health score based on the American Heart Association’s Life’s Essential 8 metrics
  • LEANOUT: Stata module to produce lean output formatting for estimation results LEANOUT: Stata module to produce lean output formatting for estimation results
  • LEEBOUNDS: Stata module for estimating Lee (2009) treatment effect bounds LEEBOUNDS: Stata module for estimating Lee (2009) treatment effect bounds
  • LEEDTWOWAY: Stata module to solve two way labor models LEEDTWOWAY: Stata module to solve two way labor models
  • LEFTALIGN: Stata module to left-align (or right-align) variables LEFTALIGN: Stata module to left-align (or right-align) variables
  • LEVELS: Stata module to report distinct levels of integer or string variable LEVELS: Stata module to report distinct levels of integer or string variable
  • LEVENE: Stata module to test for equal population variances LEVENE: Stata module to test for equal population variances
  • LEVINLIN: RATS procedure to perform Levin-Lin-Chu test for unit roots in panel data LEVINLIN: RATS procedure to perform Levin-Lin-Chu test for unit roots in panel data
  • LEVINLIN: Stata module to perform Levin-Lin-Chu panel unit root test LEVINLIN: Stata module to perform Levin-Lin-Chu panel unit root test
  • LEVPREDICT: Stata module to compute log-linear level predictions reducing retransformation bias LEVPREDICT: Stata module to compute log-linear level predictions reducing retransformation bias
  • LFK: Stata module to compute LFK index and Doi plot for detection of publication bias in meta-analysis LFK: Stata module to compute LFK index and Doi plot for detection of publication bias in meta-analysis
  • LFSUM: Stata modules to describe variables located by name fragments LFSUM: Stata modules to describe variables located by name fragments
  • LGAMMA2: Stata module to estimate two-parameter log-gamma regression LGAMMA2: Stata module to estimate two-parameter log-gamma regression
  • LGRAPH: Stata module to draw line graphs with optional error bars LGRAPH: Stata module to draw line graphs with optional error bars
  • LIANXH: Stata module to Search and share Stata resources and blogs within Stata Command Window LIANXH: Stata module to Search and share Stata resources and blogs within Stata Command Window
  • LIBD3: Stata module providing D3js Mata library LIBD3: Stata module providing D3js Mata library
  • LIBHTML: Stata module providing an object oriented implementation of HTML in Mata LIBHTML: Stata module providing an object oriented implementation of HTML in Mata
  • LIBJSON: Stata module to provide Mata class library for obtaining and parsing JSON strings into object trees LIBJSON: Stata module to provide Mata class library for obtaining and parsing JSON strings into object trees
  • LIML: RATS procedure to perform limited information maximum likelihood estimation LIML: RATS procedure to perform limited information maximum likelihood estimation
  • LINCHECK: Stata module to graphically assess the linearity of a continuous covariate in a regression model LINCHECK: Stata module to graphically assess the linearity of a continuous covariate in a regression model
  • LINCOM2: Stata module to compute multiple linear combinations LINCOM2: Stata module to compute multiple linear combinations
  • LINCOMEST: Stata module to generate linear combinations of estimators saved as estimation results LINCOMEST: Stata module to generate linear combinations of estimators saved as estimation results
  • LINEQUATE: Stata module to calculate linear equating constants using the Tucker and Levine Methods LINEQUATE: Stata module to calculate linear equating constants using the Tucker and Levine Methods
  • LINKPLOT: Stata module for linked (connected) scatter plots LINKPLOT: Stata module for linked (connected) scatter plots

  • LPRPLOT: Stata module to produce logistic regression partial residual plots LPRPLOT: Stata module to produce logistic regression partial residual plots

  • LRCHG: Stata module to calculate change in coefficients between logistic models LRCHG: Stata module to calculate change in coefficients between logistic models
  • LRDROP1: Stata module to calculate likelihood-ratio test after dropping one term LRDROP1: Stata module to calculate likelihood-ratio test after dropping one term
  • LRMATX: Stata module to make logistic regression estimates available LRMATX: Stata module to make logistic regression estimates available
  • LRPLOT: Stata module to plot coefficients from a logistic regression LRPLOT: Stata module to plot coefficients from a logistic regression
  • LRSEQ: Stata module to calculate sequential likelihood-ratio test after model estimation LRSEQ: Stata module to calculate sequential likelihood-ratio test after model estimation

  • LSDVC: RATS procedure to estimate a dynamic FE model with correction for bias LSDVC: RATS procedure to estimate a dynamic FE model with correction for bias

  • LSTRFUN: Stata module to modify long local macros LSTRFUN: Stata module to modify long local macros

  • LTIMBIMATA: Stata module containing six general-purpose Mata functions LTIMBIMATA: Stata module containing six general-purpose Mata functions
  • LTOP: Stata module to divide a dataset list into pages without splitting internal by-groups LTOP: Stata module to divide a dataset list into pages without splitting internal by-groups
  • LUVAIN: Stata module to find communities in weighted graph LUVAIN: Stata module to find communities in weighted graph
  • LVALUES: Stata module for letter value calculation LVALUES: Stata module for letter value calculation
  • LVR2PLOT2: Stata module to produce leverage versus squared residual plot with Cook’s D LVR2PLOT2: Stata module to produce leverage versus squared residual plot with Cook’s D
  • LXHGET: Stata module to download datasets of lianxh.cn blogs or network LXHGET: Stata module to download datasets of lianxh.cn blogs or network
  • LXHUSE: Stata module to access Stata datasets of lianxh.cn blogs LXHUSE: Stata module to access Stata datasets of lianxh.cn blogs
  • LXPCT_2: Stata module to calculate multistate life expectancies LXPCT_2: Stata module to calculate multistate life expectancies
  • LYAPEXPAN: MATLAB function to calculate Lyapunov exponents with Taylor expansion LYAPEXPAN: MATLAB function to calculate Lyapunov exponents with Taylor expansion
  • LYAPROSEN: MATLAB function to calculate Lyapunov exponent LYAPROSEN: MATLAB function to calculate Lyapunov exponent
  • LagOrder: GAUSS module to determine the optimal lag order in the VAR model based on Information Criteria LagOrder: GAUSS module to determine the optimal lag order in the VAR model based on Information Criteria

M

  • MAAUTOLAGS: RATS procedure to compute Information Criteria for MA models using innovations algorithm MAAUTOLAGS: RATS procedure to compute Information Criteria for MA models using innovations algorithm
  • MACKINNONCV: RATS procedure to compute Mackinnon’s Critical values for DF and EG tests MACKINNONCV: RATS procedure to compute Mackinnon’s Critical values for DF and EG tests
  • MACROF: Stata module to compute the macroF evaluation criterion for multi-class outcomes MACROF: Stata module to compute the macroF evaluation criterion for multi-class outcomes
  • MAC_UNAB: Stata module to unabbreviate Global Macro Lists MAC_UNAB: Stata module to unabbreviate Global Macro Lists
  • MADFULLER: Stata module to perform Dickey-Fuller test on panel data MADFULLER: Stata module to perform Dickey-Fuller test on panel data
  • MADOT: Stata module to create dot plot for summarizing pooled estimates of multiple outcomes from meta-analysis MADOT: Stata module to create dot plot for summarizing pooled estimates of multiple outcomes from meta-analysis
  • MADS: Stata module to calculate Median Absolute Deviations MADS: Stata module to calculate Median Absolute Deviations
  • MAGREG: Stata module to calculate maximum agreement regression MAGREG: Stata module to calculate maximum agreement regression
  • MAHAPICK: Stata module to select matching observations based on a Mahalanobis distance measure MAHAPICK: Stata module to select matching observations based on a Mahalanobis distance measure
  • MAIL: Stata module to send progress reports (Mac OSX/Linux/Unix) MAIL: Stata module to send progress reports (Mac OSX/Linux/Unix)
  • MAJORITY: Stata module for majority calculations for real or hypothetical elections MAJORITY: Stata module for majority calculations for real or hypothetical elections
  • MAKEDDI: Stata module to improve the quality and efficiency of meta-data documentation production MAKEDDI: Stata module to improve the quality and efficiency of meta-data documentation production
  • MAKEHLP: Stata module to automatically create a help file MAKEHLP: Stata module to automatically create a help file
  • MAKEID: Stata module to create a unique ID for every observation in the dataset MAKEID: Stata module to create a unique ID for every observation in the dataset
  • MAKEMATRIX: Stata module to make a matrix of results from other commands MAKEMATRIX: Stata module to make a matrix of results from other commands
  • MAKETEX: Stata module to generate LaTeX code from a text file MAKETEX: Stata module to generate LaTeX code from a text file
  • MALMQ2: Stata module to compute Malmquist Productivity Index MALMQ2: Stata module to compute Malmquist Productivity Index
  • MANNWHITNEY: RATS procedure to perform Mann-Whitney test for comparison of samples MANNWHITNEY: RATS procedure to perform Mann-Whitney test for comparison of samples
  • MANSKI_CI: Stata module to use Manski type bounds (Manski 2003) to calculate confidence intervals around a treatment variable’s regression coefficient in a (covariate-adjusted) regression MANSKI_CI: Stata module to use Manski type bounds (Manski 2003) to calculate confidence intervals around a treatment variable’s regression coefficient in a (covariate-adjusted) regression
  • MANYWEAKIV: Stata module to implement the weak-identification robust jackknife AR test from Mikusheva and Sun (2022) MANYWEAKIV: Stata module to implement the weak-identification robust jackknife AR test from Mikusheva and Sun (2022)
  • MAP: Stata module to map string variables using an external dictionary file MAP: Stata module to map string variables using an external dictionary file
  • MAPCH: Stata module map chains of events MAPCH: Stata module map chains of events
  • MAPSM: Stata module to perform multiple arms propensity score matching MAPSM: Stata module to perform multiple arms propensity score matching
  • MAPTILE: Stata module to map a variable MAPTILE: Stata module to map a variable
  • MARGDISTFIT: Stata module to check the distributional assumptions underlying a parametric regression model MARGDISTFIT: Stata module to check the distributional assumptions underlying a parametric regression model
  • MARGEFF: Stata module to compute average marginal effects for categorical and limited dependent variable models MARGEFF: Stata module to compute average marginal effects for categorical and limited dependent variable models
  • MARGINSCONTPLOT2: Stata module to graph margins for continuous predictors MARGINSCONTPLOT2: Stata module to graph margins for continuous predictors
  • MARGINTEGRATE: Stata module to estimate non-parametric smooth functions for generalized additive models MARGINTEGRATE: Stata module to estimate non-parametric smooth functions for generalized additive models
  • MARGLMEAN: Stata module to compute marginal log means from regression models MARGLMEAN: Stata module to compute marginal log means from regression models
  • MARGPREV: Stata module to compute marginal prevalences from binary regression models MARGPREV: Stata module to compute marginal prevalences from binary regression models
  • MARHIS: Stata module to produce predictive margins and marginal effects plots with histogram after regress, logit, xtmixed and mixed MARHIS: Stata module to produce predictive margins and marginal effects plots with histogram after regress, logit, xtmixed and mixed
  • MARIMEKKO: Stata module for marikmekko charts MARIMEKKO: Stata module for marikmekko charts
  • MARKOV: Stata module to generate Markov probabilities MARKOV: Stata module to generate Markov probabilities
  • MARKSTAT: Stata module to support literate data analysis using Stata and Markdown MARKSTAT: Stata module to support literate data analysis using Stata and Markdown
  • MARKTOUSE: Stata module to mark the observations to be used MARKTOUSE: Stata module to mark the observations to be used
  • MARKUPEST: Stata module for markup estimation via Micro and Macro approaches MARKUPEST: Stata module for markup estimation via Micro and Macro approaches
  • MARK_CHANGES: Stata module to generate a variable indicating where one or more variables changes value MARK_CHANGES: Stata module to generate a variable indicating where one or more variables changes value
  • MAT2TXT: Stata module to write matrix to ASCII file MAT2TXT: Stata module to write matrix to ASCII file
  • MATAMATRIX: Stata module to enable using Mata functions on Stata matrices MATAMATRIX: Stata module to enable using Mata functions on Stata matrices
  • MATCHIT: Stata module to match two datasets based on similar text patterns MATCHIT: Stata module to match two datasets based on similar text patterns
  • MATDROP: Stata module to delete multiple row and/or column using labels from matrix MATDROP: Stata module to delete multiple row and/or column using labels from matrix
  • MATIN4-MATOUT4: Stata module to import and export matrices MATIN4-MATOUT4: Stata module to import and export matrices
  • MATMAP: Stata module to perform elementwise calculations for matrices MATMAP: Stata module to perform elementwise calculations for matrices
  • MATNAMES: Stata module to return matrix row and column names MATNAMES: Stata module to return matrix row and column names
  • MATODD: Stata modules to produce various matrix tasks MATODD: Stata modules to produce various matrix tasks
  • MATPWCORR: Stata module to takes the output from pwcorr and creates the corresponding matrices MATPWCORR: Stata module to takes the output from pwcorr and creates the corresponding matrices
  • MATRIXOF: Stata module to produce matrix or vector of results for paired or single variables MATRIXOF: Stata module to produce matrix or vector of results for paired or single variables
  • MATRIXTOOLS: Stata module to build, present and style Stata matrices MATRIXTOOLS: Stata module to build, present and style Stata matrices
  • MATSAVE: Stata module to save and load matrices MATSAVE: Stata module to save and load matrices
  • MATSORT: Stata module to sort a matrix by a given column MATSORT: Stata module to sort a matrix by a given column
  • MATSTAT: Stata module to format tabstat, assembling of results in one matrix MATSTAT: Stata module to format tabstat, assembling of results in one matrix
  • MATVSORT: Stata module for sorting vectors or rows or columns of matrices MATVSORT: Stata module for sorting vectors or rows or columns of matrices
  • MATWRITE: Stata module to write Stata variables as MATLAB matrices MATWRITE: Stata module to write Stata variables as MATLAB matrices
  • MAUCHLY: Stata module to compute Mauchly’s sphericity test for repeated measures ANOVA models MAUCHLY: Stata module to compute Mauchly’s sphericity test for repeated measures ANOVA models
  • MAXDRAWDOWN: Stata module to calculate the maximum drawdown of a stock, fund or other financial product MAXDRAWDOWN: Stata module to calculate the maximum drawdown of a stock, fund or other financial product
  • MAXSUM: Stata module to compute the maximum value of a rolling sum MAXSUM: Stata module to compute the maximum value of a rolling sum
  • MAXWELL: Stata module for computing Maxwell’s random error (RE) coefficient of agreement between 2 raters for binary data MAXWELL: Stata module for computing Maxwell’s random error (RE) coefficient of agreement between 2 raters for binary data
  • MBITOBIT: Stata module to fit bivariate Tobit regression MBITOBIT: Stata module to fit bivariate Tobit regression
  • MBSENS: Stata module to compute Sensitivity metric for matched sample using McNemar’s test MBSENS: Stata module to compute Sensitivity metric for matched sample using McNemar’s test
  • MC: Stata module to calculate a matched concordance index MC: Stata module to calculate a matched concordance index
  • MCA: Stata module to perform multiple correspondence analysis MCA: Stata module to perform multiple correspondence analysis
  • MCD: RATS module to compute robust mean vector and covariance matrix MCD: RATS module to compute robust mean vector and covariance matrix
  • MCENTER: Stata module to center variables at their means MCENTER: Stata module to center variables at their means
  • MCES: Stata module for Marginal Comparison Effect Sizes MCES: Stata module for Marginal Comparison Effect Sizes
  • MCFEVDTABLE: RATS procedure to organize tables of FEVD’s with confidence bands MCFEVDTABLE: RATS procedure to organize tables of FEVD’s with confidence bands
  • MCGRAPHIRF: RATS procedure to organize graphs of IRF’s with confidence bands MCGRAPHIRF: RATS procedure to organize graphs of IRF’s with confidence bands
  • MCIB: Stata module to estimate income distribution and inequality statistics from grouped data MCIB: Stata module to estimate income distribution and inequality statistics from grouped data
  • MCL: Stata module to estimate multinomial conditional logit models MCL: Stata module to estimate multinomial conditional logit models
  • MCLEODLI: RATS procedure to perform a McLeod-Li test for 2nd order dependence MCLEODLI: RATS procedure to perform a McLeod-Li test for 2nd order dependence
  • MCMCCQREG: Stata module to perform simulation assisted estimation of censored quantile regression using adaptive Markov chain Monte Carlo MCMCCQREG: Stata module to perform simulation assisted estimation of censored quantile regression using adaptive Markov chain Monte Carlo
  • MCMCLINEAR: Stata module for MCMC sampling of linear models MCMCLINEAR: Stata module for MCMC sampling of linear models
  • MCMCPOSTPROC: RATS procedure to calculate sample statistics from MCMC realizations MCMCPOSTPROC: RATS procedure to calculate sample statistics from MCMC realizations
  • MCMCSTATS: Stata module to compute convergence and summary statistics for MCMC estimation MCMCSTATS: Stata module to compute convergence and summary statistics for MCMC estimation
  • MCPROCESSIRF: RATS procedure to organize error bands for IRF’s based upon MC results MCPROCESSIRF: RATS procedure to organize error bands for IRF’s based upon MC results
  • MCQSCORE: Stata module to score the Monetary Choice Questionnaire using logistic regression MCQSCORE: Stata module to score the Monetary Choice Questionnaire using logistic regression
  • MCVARDODDRAWS: RATS procedure to perform Monte Carlo draws from a VAR to generate IRF’s MCVARDODDRAWS: RATS procedure to perform Monte Carlo draws from a VAR to generate IRF’s
  • MCWR: Stata module to compute Markov chain with rewards calculations MCWR: Stata module to compute Markov chain with rewards calculations
  • MDENSITY: Stata module for univariate kernel density estimation, for variables or groups MDENSITY: Stata module for univariate kernel density estimation, for variables or groups
  • MDEPRIV: Stata module to compute synthetic indicators of multiple deprivation MDEPRIV: Stata module to compute synthetic indicators of multiple deprivation
  • MDESC: Stata module to tabulate prevalence of missing values MDESC: Stata module to tabulate prevalence of missing values
  • MEAN2: Stata module to make a table of estimate means with subpopulation differences MEAN2: Stata module to make a table of estimate means with subpopulation differences
  • MEANGROUP: RATS procedure to perform mean group estimator for panel data MEANGROUP: RATS procedure to perform mean group estimator for panel data
  • MEANING: Stata module to use internet search for the meaning for a word or phrase MEANING: Stata module to use internet search for the meaning for a word or phrase
  • MEAN_CI_PLOT: Stata module to plot means and confidence intervals MEAN_CI_PLOT: Stata module to plot means and confidence intervals
  • MEDIAN: Stata module to perform the median test MEDIAN: Stata module to perform the median test
  • MEDIATION: Stata module for causal mediation analysis and sensitivity analysis MEDIATION: Stata module for causal mediation analysis and sensitivity analysis
  • MEDOID: Stata module to calculate medoids MEDOID: Stata module to calculate medoids
  • MEDSEM: Stata module to perform mediation analysis using structural equation modelling MEDSEM: Stata module to perform mediation analysis using structural equation modelling
  • MEDSURV: Stata module to calculate the median survival time after Cox/Poisson regression MEDSURV: Stata module to calculate the median survival time after Cox/Poisson regression
  • MEHETPROB: Stata module to compute marginal effects at means and their standard errors after hetprob MEHETPROB: Stata module to compute marginal effects at means and their standard errors after hetprob
  • MELOREG2: Stata module to perform Minimum Expected Loss (MELO) Instrumental Variables Regression MELOREG2: Stata module to perform Minimum Expected Loss (MELO) Instrumental Variables Regression
  • MELT: Stata module to melt variables into a dataset containing aggregated data by variable MELT: Stata module to melt variables into a dataset containing aggregated data by variable
  • MEOPROBIT: Stata module to compute marginal effects after estimation of ordered probit MEOPROBIT: Stata module to compute marginal effects after estimation of ordered probit
  • MEQUATE: Stata module to calculate equating constants using the Mean/Mean and Mean/Sigma methods MEQUATE: Stata module to calculate equating constants using the Mean/Mean and Mean/Sigma methods
  • MERESC: Stata module to rescale the results of mixed nonlinear probability models MERESC: Stata module to rescale the results of mixed nonlinear probability models
  • MERGEALL: Stata module to merge multiple files MERGEALL: Stata module to merge multiple files
  • MERGEMANY: Stata module to merge many files MERGEMANY: Stata module to merge many files
  • MERGEPOLY: Stata module to merge adjacent polygons from a shapefile MERGEPOLY: Stata module to merge adjacent polygons from a shapefile
  • MERLIN: Stata module to fit mixed effects regression for linear and non-linear models MERLIN: Stata module to fit mixed effects regression for linear and non-linear models
  • MESA: RATS procedure to compute and graph a spectrum using Maximum Entropy Method MESA: RATS procedure to compute and graph a spectrum using Maximum Entropy Method
  • METAAN: Stata module to perform fixed- or random-effects meta-analyses METAAN: Stata module to perform fixed- or random-effects meta-analyses
  • METABIAS: Stata module to test for small-study effects in meta-analysis METABIAS: Stata module to test for small-study effects in meta-analysis
  • METACUM: Stata module to perform cumulative meta-analysis, with graphics METACUM: Stata module to perform cumulative meta-analysis, with graphics
  • METADATA: Stata module to enable access to metadata METADATA: Stata module to enable access to metadata
  • METADIALOG: Stata module to provide sub-menu and dialogs for meta-analysis commands METADIALOG: Stata module to provide sub-menu and dialogs for meta-analysis commands
  • METADTA: Stata module to perform fixed- and random-effects meta-analysis and meta-regression of diagnostic accuracy studies METADTA: Stata module to perform fixed- and random-effects meta-analysis and meta-regression of diagnostic accuracy studies
  • METAEFF: Stata module to perform effect sizes calculations for meta-analyses METAEFF: Stata module to perform effect sizes calculations for meta-analyses
  • METAFRAG: Stata module to compute the fragility index for meta-analysis METAFRAG: Stata module to compute the fragility index for meta-analysis
  • METAFUNNEL: Stata module to produce funnel plots for meta-analysis METAFUNNEL: Stata module to produce funnel plots for meta-analysis
  • METAGEN: Stata module to perform meta-analysis of genetic-association studies METAGEN: Stata module to perform meta-analysis of genetic-association studies
  • METAGRAPH: Stata module to draw Forrest plot after meta command METAGRAPH: Stata module to draw Forrest plot after meta command
  • METAMISS2: Stata module accounting for missing outcome data in meta-analysis METAMISS2: Stata module accounting for missing outcome data in meta-analysis
  • METAMISS: Stata module to perform meta-analysis with missing data METAMISS: Stata module to perform meta-analysis with missing data
  • METAN: Stata module for fixed and random effects meta-analysis METAN: Stata module for fixed and random effects meta-analysis
  • METANDI: Stata module to perform meta-analysis of diagnostic accuracy METANDI: Stata module to perform meta-analysis of diagnostic accuracy
  • METANINF: Stata module to evaluate influence of a single study in meta-analysis estimation METANINF: Stata module to evaluate influence of a single study in meta-analysis estimation
  • METAPOW: Stata module for simulation based sample size calculations for designing new clinical trials and diagnostic test accuracy studies to update an existing meta-analysis METAPOW: Stata module for simulation based sample size calculations for designing new clinical trials and diagnostic test accuracy studies to update an existing meta-analysis
  • METAPRED: Stata module producing outlier and influence diagnostics for meta-analysis METAPRED: Stata module producing outlier and influence diagnostics for meta-analysis
  • METAPREG: Stata module to compute fixed and random effects meta-analysis and meta-regression of proportions METAPREG: Stata module to compute fixed and random effects meta-analysis and meta-regression of proportions
  • METAPROP: Stata module to perform fixed and random effects meta-analysis of proportions METAPROP: Stata module to perform fixed and random effects meta-analysis of proportions
  • METAPROP_ONE: Stata module to perform fixed and random effects meta-analysis of proportions METAPROP_ONE: Stata module to perform fixed and random effects meta-analysis of proportions
  • METAREG: Stata module to perform meta-analysis regression METAREG: Stata module to perform meta-analysis regression
  • METASTRONG: Stata module for estimating the proportion of true effect sizes above or below a threshold in random-effects meta-analysis METASTRONG: Stata module for estimating the proportion of true effect sizes above or below a threshold in random-effects meta-analysis
  • METATEF: Stata module to perform IPD meta analysis of an interaction between treatment and a continuous covariate METATEF: Stata module to perform IPD meta analysis of an interaction between treatment and a continuous covariate
  • METATREND: Stata module to implement regression methods for detecting trends in cumulative meta-analysis METATREND: Stata module to implement regression methods for detecting trends in cumulative meta-analysis
  • METATRIM: Stata module to perform nonparametric analysis of publication bias METATRIM: Stata module to perform nonparametric analysis of publication bias
  • META_ANALYSIS: Stata module to perform subgroup and regression-type fixed- and random-effects meta-analyses META_ANALYSIS: Stata module to perform subgroup and regression-type fixed- and random-effects meta-analyses
  • META_LR: Stata module to graph positive and negative likelihood ratios in diagnostic test META_LR: Stata module to graph positive and negative likelihood ratios in diagnostic test
  • MFCURVE: Stata module for plotting results from multifactorial research designs MFCURVE: Stata module for plotting results from multifactorial research designs
  • MFELOGIT: Stata module to estimate marginal effects (AME) and average treatment effects (ATE) in fixed effect logit models MFELOGIT: Stata module to estimate marginal effects (AME) and average treatment effects (ATE) in fixed effect logit models
  • MFILEGR: Stata module to view and save multiple graphs with filenames based on a numeric identifier MFILEGR: Stata module to view and save multiple graphs with filenames based on a numeric identifier
  • MFPI: Stata module for modelling and displaying interactions MFPI: Stata module for modelling and displaying interactions
  • MFPIGEN: Stata module for modelling and displaying interactions between continuous predictors MFPIGEN: Stata module for modelling and displaying interactions between continuous predictors
  • MFPMI: Stata module to build multivariable fractional polynomial models in multiply imputed data MFPMI: Stata module to build multivariable fractional polynomial models in multiply imputed data
  • MFX2: Stata module to enhance mfx command for obtaining marginal effects or elasticities after estimation MFX2: Stata module to enhance mfx command for obtaining marginal effects or elasticities after estimation
  • MGBE: Stata module to compute Multimodel Generalized Beta Estimator MGBE: Stata module to compute Multimodel Generalized Beta Estimator
  • MGEN: Stata module to apply generate to a matrix MGEN: Stata module to apply generate to a matrix
  • MGOF: Stata module to perform goodness-of-fit tests for multinomial data MGOF: Stata module to perform goodness-of-fit tests for multinomial data
  • MHEGY: RATS procedure to implement the monthly version of the “HEGY” tests MHEGY: RATS procedure to implement the monthly version of the “HEGY” tests
  • MHTEXP: Stata module to perform multiple hypothesis testing correction procedure MHTEXP: Stata module to perform multiple hypothesis testing correction procedure
  • MHTREG: Stata module for multiple hypothesis testing controlling for FWER MHTREG: Stata module for multiple hypothesis testing controlling for FWER
  • MIBMI: Stata module for cleaning and multiple imputation algorithm for body mass index (BMI) in longitudinal datasets MIBMI: Stata module for cleaning and multiple imputation algorithm for body mass index (BMI) in longitudinal datasets
  • MICT: Stata module to provide Multiple imputation for Categorical Time-series MICT: Stata module to provide Multiple imputation for Categorical Time-series
  • MIDAS: Stata module for meta-analytical integration of diagnostic test accuracy studies MIDAS: Stata module for meta-analytical integration of diagnostic test accuracy studies
  • MIESIZE: Stata module to estimate effect sizes from multiply imputed data MIESIZE: Stata module to estimate effect sizes from multiply imputed data
  • MIF2DTA: Stata module convert MapInfo Interchange Format boundary files to Stata boundary files MIF2DTA: Stata module convert MapInfo Interchange Format boundary files to Stata boundary files
  • MIINC: Stata module to conduct multi-model inference using information criteria MIINC: Stata module to conduct multi-model inference using information criteria
  • MILDEVGOALS: HTML routine to display Millenium Development Goals indicators MILDEVGOALS: HTML routine to display Millenium Development Goals indicators
  • MIM: Stata module to analyse and manipulate multiply imputed datasets MIM: Stata module to analyse and manipulate multiply imputed datasets
  • MIMIX: Stata module to perform reference based multiple imputation for sensitivity analysis of longitudinal clinical trials with protocol deviation MIMIX: Stata module to perform reference based multiple imputation for sensitivity analysis of longitudinal clinical trials with protocol deviation
  • MIMPT: Stata module to impute missing values and persist in case of non-convergence MIMPT: Stata module to impute missing values and persist in case of non-convergence
  • MIMRGNS: Stata module to run margins after mi estimate MIMRGNS: Stata module to run margins after mi estimate
  • MIMSTACK: Stata module to stack multiply-imputed datasets into format required by mim MIMSTACK: Stata module to stack multiply-imputed datasets into format required by mim
  • MINAP: Stata module to calculate minimum average partial correlation for principal components MINAP: Stata module to calculate minimum average partial correlation for principal components
  • MINIMAX: RATS module to estimate a minimax regression MINIMAX: RATS module to estimate a minimax regression
  • MINMSE: Stata module to create balanced groups for treatment in experiments with one or several treatment arms MINMSE: Stata module to create balanced groups for treatment in experiments with one or several treatment arms
  • MINT: Stata module to examine across-groups equivalence of confirmatory factor analysis (CFA) measurement model parameters MINT: Stata module to examine across-groups equivalence of confirmatory factor analysis (CFA) measurement model parameters
  • MIPARALLEL: Stata module to perform parallel estimation for multiple imputed datasets MIPARALLEL: Stata module to perform parallel estimation for multiple imputed datasets
  • MIPOLATE: Stata module to interpolate values MIPOLATE: Stata module to interpolate values
  • MIRA: Stata module to compute Rubin’s measure for multiple imputation regression analysis MIRA: Stata module to compute Rubin’s measure for multiple imputation regression analysis
  • MISSING: Stata module to replace missing values MISSING: Stata module to replace missing values
  • MISSINGPLOT: Stata module to draw plot showing patterns of missing values in a dataset MISSINGPLOT: Stata module to draw plot showing patterns of missing values in a dataset
  • MISSINGS: Stata module to manage missing values MISSINGS: Stata module to manage missing values
  • MISUM: Stata module to calculate summary statistics in MI dataset MISUM: Stata module to calculate summary statistics in MI dataset
  • MIVCAUSAL: Stata module for testing the hypothesis about the signs of the 2SLS weights MIVCAUSAL: Stata module for testing the hypothesis about the signs of the 2SLS weights
  • MIVIF: Stata module to calculate variance inflation factors after mi estimate regress MIVIF: Stata module to calculate variance inflation factors after mi estimate regress
  • MIXLELAST: Stata module to compute mixed logit sample elasticities and marginal effects MIXLELAST: Stata module to compute mixed logit sample elasticities and marginal effects
  • MIXLOGIT: Stata module to fit mixed logit models by using maximum simulated likelihood MIXLOGIT: Stata module to fit mixed logit models by using maximum simulated likelihood
  • MIXLOGITWTP: Stata module to estimate mixed logit models in WTP space MIXLOGITWTP: Stata module to estimate mixed logit models in WTP space
  • MIXMCM: Stata module to estimate finite mixtures of non-stationary Markov chain models by maximum likelihood (ML) and the Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm MIXMCM: Stata module to estimate finite mixtures of non-stationary Markov chain models by maximum likelihood (ML) and the Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm
  • MIXMIXLOGIT: Stata module to estimate mixed-mixed multinomial logit model MIXMIXLOGIT: Stata module to estimate mixed-mixed multinomial logit model
  • MIXRANDREGRET: Stata module for fitting mixed random regret minimization models MIXRANDREGRET: Stata module for fitting mixed random regret minimization models
  • MIXVAR: RATS procedure to compute mixed estimation of an equation with a Bayesian prior MIXVAR: RATS procedure to compute mixed estimation of an equation with a Bayesian prior
  • MI_IMPUTE_FROM: Stata module to impute using an external imputation model MI_IMPUTE_FROM: Stata module to impute using an external imputation model
  • MI_IMPUTE_WLOGIT: Stata module to perform weighted multiple imputation for binary/categorical variables MI_IMPUTE_WLOGIT: Stata module to perform weighted multiple imputation for binary/categorical variables
  • MI_MVNCAT: Stata module to assign “final” values to (mvn) imputed categorical variables MI_MVNCAT: Stata module to assign “final” values to (mvn) imputed categorical variables
  • MI_TWOWAY: Stata module for computing scores on questionnaires containing missing item responses MI_TWOWAY: Stata module for computing scores on questionnaires containing missing item responses
  • MKBILOGN: Stata module to create bivariate lognormal variables MKBILOGN: Stata module to create bivariate lognormal variables
  • MKCORR: Stata module to generate correlation table formatted for easy inclusion in articles MKCORR: Stata module to generate correlation table formatted for easy inclusion in articles
  • MKDAT: Stata module providing easy SOEP retrievals MKDAT: Stata module providing easy SOEP retrievals
  • MKDENSITY: Stata module to graph kernel densities of several variables MKDENSITY: Stata module to graph kernel densities of several variables
  • MKERN: Stata module to perform multivariate nonparametric kernel regression MKERN: Stata module to perform multivariate nonparametric kernel regression
  • MKEST: Stata module to convert variables to estimates matrix MKEST: Stata module to convert variables to estimates matrix
  • MKPROFILE: Stata module to create or edit your ‘profile.do’ MKPROFILE: Stata module to create or edit your ‘profile.do’
  • MKPROJECT: Stata module to create a project folder with some boilerplate code and research log MKPROJECT: Stata module to create a project folder with some boilerplate code and research log
  • MKTAB: Stata module to print table of estimates in delimited or screen-presentation format MKTAB: Stata module to print table of estimates in delimited or screen-presentation format
  • MLAD: Stata module to perform maximum likelihood using automatic differentiation MLAD: Stata module to perform maximum likelihood using automatic differentiation
  • MLBOOLEAN: Stata module to implement Boolean logit and probit MLBOOLEAN: Stata module to implement Boolean logit and probit
  • MLCOINT: Stata module to compute Johansen cointegration tests MLCOINT: Stata module to compute Johansen cointegration tests
  • MLMR2: Stata module to compute r-squared measures for models estimated by mixed MLMR2: Stata module to compute r-squared measures for models estimated by mixed
  • MLOGITROC: Stata module to calculate multiclass ROC Curves and AUC from Multinomial Logistic Regression MLOGITROC: Stata module to calculate multiclass ROC Curves and AUC from Multinomial Logistic Regression
  • MLOGPRED: Stata module to produce predicted probabilities after mlogit and svymlog MLOGPRED: Stata module to produce predicted probabilities after mlogit and svymlog
  • MLOWESS: Stata module for lowess smoothing with multiple predictors MLOWESS: Stata module for lowess smoothing with multiple predictors

  • NW_WCC: Stata module to calculate Weighted Clustering Coefficients (WCC) in Complex Direct Networks NW_WCC: Stata module to calculate Weighted Clustering Coefficients (WCC) in Complex Direct Networks

  • OAXACA8: Stata module to compute decompositions of outcome differentials OAXACA8: Stata module to compute decompositions of outcome differentials

  • OMEGACOEF: Stata module to calculate the omega reliability coefficient OMEGACOEF: Stata module to calculate the omega reliability coefficient
  • OMNINORM: Stata module to calculate omnibus test for univariate/multivariate normality OMNINORM: Stata module to calculate omnibus test for univariate/multivariate normality
  • ONECLICK: Stata module to screen for control variables that keep the explanatory variables at a certain level of significance ONECLICK: Stata module to screen for control variables that keep the explanatory variables at a certain level of significance
  • ONEDRIVE: Stata module to find and set Microsoft OneDrive local folder as Stata’s working directory ONEDRIVE: Stata module to find and set Microsoft OneDrive local folder as Stata’s working directory
  • ONESPELL: Stata module to generate single longest spell for each unit in panel data, listwise ONESPELL: Stata module to generate single longest spell for each unit in panel data, listwise
  • ONETEXT: Stata module to perform simple Chinese text analysis ONETEXT: Stata module to perform simple Chinese text analysis
  • ONEWPLOT: Stata module for oneway plots ONEWPLOT: Stata module for oneway plots
  • OPARALLEL: Stata module providing post-estimation command for testing the parallel regression assumption OPARALLEL: Stata module providing post-estimation command for testing the parallel regression assumption
  • OPENALL: Stata module to open all specified files with append OPENALL: Stata module to open all specified files with append

  • OPENDF: Stata module to work with Open Data Format files in Stata OPENDF: Stata module to work with Open Data Format files in Stata
  • OPL: Stata module for optimal policy learning OPL: Stata module for optimal policy learning
  • OPLABDATA: Stata module to load data from the Equality of Opportunity Project OPLABDATA: Stata module to load data from the Equality of Opportunity Project
  • OPPLOT: Stata module to generate a vertical bar chart to summarize a binary outcome in cluster survey data OPPLOT: Stata module to generate a vertical bar chart to summarize a binary outcome in cluster survey data

  • OPTIFACT: Stata module to find the best summated rating scale from a list of items OPTIFACT: Stata module to find the best summated rating scale from a list of items

  • ORSE: Stata module to save odds ratios and their standard errors after logit, ologit ORSE: Stata module to save odds ratios and their standard errors after logit, ologit
  • ORTHOG: Stata module to orthogonalize variables ORTHOG: Stata module to orthogonalize variables

  • OSORT: Stata module to reorder variable(s) and sort data OSORT: Stata module to reorder variable(s) and sort data

  • OUTFIXT: Stata module to write fixed-format text file OUTFIXT: Stata module to write fixed-format text file

P

  • P2CI: Stata module to calculate confidence limits of a regression coefficient from the p-value P2CI: Stata module to calculate confidence limits of a regression coefficient from the p-value

  • PANELFM: RATS procedure to perform panel data group mean FMOLS PANELFM: RATS procedure to perform panel data group mean FMOLS

  • PANELL: Stata module to display panel length for a given set of variables PANELL: Stata module to display panel length for a given set of variables
  • PANELS: Stata module to count panels and apply a command to panel units PANELS: Stata module to count panels and apply a command to panel units
  • PANELTHIN: Stata module to identify observations for possible thinned panel dataset PANELTHIN: Stata module to identify observations for possible thinned panel dataset

  • PARALLEL: Stata module for Parallel Computing PARALLEL: Stata module for Parallel Computing
  • PARAMED: Stata module to perform causal mediation analysis using parametric regression models PARAMED: Stata module to perform causal mediation analysis using parametric regression models
  • PARAN: Stata module to compute Horn’s test of principal components/factors PARAN: Stata module to compute Horn’s test of principal components/factors
  • PARETOFIT: Stata module to fit a Type 1 Pareto distribution PARETOFIT: Stata module to fit a Type 1 Pareto distribution
  • PARIV: Stata module to perform nearly-collinear robust instrumental-variables regression PARIV: Stata module to perform nearly-collinear robust instrumental-variables regression
  • PARMEST: Stata module to create new data set with one observation per parameter of most recent model PARMEST: Stata module to create new data set with one observation per parameter of most recent model
  • PARMHET: Stata module to produce heterogeneity tests in parmest resultssets PARMHET: Stata module to produce heterogeneity tests in parmest resultssets
  • PARMPARSE: Stata module to parse a parameter name variable in a parmest resultsset PARMPARSE: Stata module to parse a parameter name variable in a parmest resultsset
  • PARPLOT: Stata module for parallel coordinates plots PARPLOT: Stata module for parallel coordinates plots
  • PARSELOC: Stata module to extract coordinates from a geolocation variable generated by Survey Solutions PARSELOC: Stata module to extract coordinates from a geolocation variable generated by Survey Solutions
  • PARSEUAS: Stata module to extract detailed information from user agent strings PARSEUAS: Stata module to extract detailed information from user agent strings
  • PARTCHART: Stata module to automatically output participant characteristics table in a variety of formats PARTCHART: Stata module to automatically output participant characteristics table in a variety of formats
  • PARTGAM: Stata module to calculate partial gamma coefficient PARTGAM: Stata module to calculate partial gamma coefficient
  • PARTPRED: Stata module to generate partial predictions PARTPRED: Stata module to generate partial predictions
  • PARTTAU: Stata module to calculate Kendall’s partial tau and confidence interval PARTTAU: Stata module to calculate Kendall’s partial tau and confidence interval
  • PASCAL: Stata module to draw Pascal’s triangle PASCAL: Stata module to draw Pascal’s triangle

  • PATHUTIL: Stata module to support file path manipulation PATHUTIL: Stata module to support file path manipulation
  • PAVERAGE: Stata module to calculate p-period-average series in a panel dataset PAVERAGE: Stata module to calculate p-period-average series in a panel dataset
  • PAYPER: Stata module to compute the periodic payment and the entire schedule of a loan or annuity PAYPER: Stata module to compute the periodic payment and the entire schedule of a loan or annuity
