  • POVDECO: Stata module to calculate poverty indices with decomposition by subgroup POVDECO: Stata module to calculate poverty indices with decomposition by subgroup
  • POVERTY: Stata module to calculate poverty measures POVERTY: Stata module to calculate poverty measures
  • POVGUIDE2: Stata module to compute Federal Poverty Guidelines by family size and year, 1973-2024 POVGUIDE2: Stata module to compute Federal Poverty Guidelines by family size and year, 1973-2024
  • POVGUIDE: Stata module to generate the U.S. Poverty Guideline value for a given family size and year POVGUIDE: Stata module to generate the U.S. Poverty Guideline value for a given family size and year
  • POVIMP: Stata module to provide poverty estimates in the absence of actual consumption data POVIMP: Stata module to provide poverty estimates in the absence of actual consumption data
  • POVTIME: Stata module to compute aggregate intertemporal poverty measures (poverty in a panel accounting for time) POVTIME: Stata module to compute aggregate intertemporal poverty measures (poverty in a panel accounting for time)
  • POWERCAL: Stata module to perform general power and sample size calculations POWERCAL: Stata module to perform general power and sample size calculations
  • POWERCLUS: Stata module to calculate sample size and/or cluster size for cluster designed studies POWERCLUS: Stata module to calculate sample size and/or cluster size for cluster designed studies
  • POWERMAP: Stata module to create power heat maps for experimental design using multiple periods POWERMAP: Stata module to create power heat maps for experimental design using multiple periods
  • POWERQ: Stata module to calculates posterior probabilities for heterogeneity in a meta-analysis POWERQ: Stata module to calculates posterior probabilities for heterogeneity in a meta-analysis
  • POWERSIM: Stata module for simulation-based power analysis for linear and generalized linear models POWERSIM: Stata module for simulation-based power analysis for linear and generalized linear models
  • POWER_CONCORD: Stata module to compute power and sample size for Lin’s concordance correlation coefficient POWER_CONCORD: Stata module to compute power and sample size for Lin’s concordance correlation coefficient
  • POWER_DIAGNOSTIC: Stata module to compute power and sample size for sensitivity and specificity of a diagnostic test POWER_DIAGNOSTIC: Stata module to compute power and sample size for sensitivity and specificity of a diagnostic test
  • POWER_ICC: Stata module to compute power and sample size for one-way random-effects intraclass correlation POWER_ICC: Stata module to compute power and sample size for one-way random-effects intraclass correlation
  • POWER_KAPPA: Stata module to compute power and sample size for the two-rater kappa statistic with two or more categories POWER_KAPPA: Stata module to compute power and sample size for the two-rater kappa statistic with two or more categories
  • POWER_LOA: Stata module to compute power and sample size for limits of agreement (LOA) analysis POWER_LOA: Stata module to compute power and sample size for limits of agreement (LOA) analysis
  • POWER_ONEROC: Stata module to compute power and sample size for a one-sample ROC test POWER_ONEROC: Stata module to compute power and sample size for a one-sample ROC test
  • POWER_ROC: Stata module to compute power and sample-size analysis for receiver operating characteristic (ROC) analysis POWER_ROC: Stata module to compute power and sample-size analysis for receiver operating characteristic (ROC) analysis
  • POWER_SWGEE: Stata module to compute power (under both a Z and t distribution) for cluster randomized stepped wedge designs POWER_SWGEE: Stata module to compute power (under both a Z and t distribution) for cluster randomized stepped wedge designs
  • POWER_TWORATES_ZHU: Stata module to calculate sample size or power for a two-sample test of rates POWER_TWORATES_ZHU: Stata module to calculate sample size or power for a two-sample test of rates
  • POWER_TWOROC: Stata module to compute power and sample size for a two-sample (independent or paired) ROC test POWER_TWOROC: Stata module to compute power and sample size for a two-sample (independent or paired) ROC test
  • PPML: Stata module to perform Poisson pseudo-maximum likelihood estimation PPML: Stata module to perform Poisson pseudo-maximum likelihood estimation
  • PPMLHDFE: Stata module for Poisson pseudo-likelihood regression with multiple levels of fixed effects PPMLHDFE: Stata module for Poisson pseudo-likelihood regression with multiple levels of fixed effects
  • PPML_FE_BIAS: Stata module to provide bias corrections for Poisson Pseudo-Maximum Likelihood (PPML) gravity models with two-way and three-way fixed effects PPML_FE_BIAS: Stata module to provide bias corrections for Poisson Pseudo-Maximum Likelihood (PPML) gravity models with two-way and three-way fixed effects
  • PPML_PANEL_SG: Stata module to estimate “structural gravity” models via Poisson PML PPML_PANEL_SG: Stata module to estimate “structural gravity” models via Poisson PML
  • PPPLOT: Stata module for P-P plots PPPLOT: Stata module for P-P plots
  • PPROB: Stata Program to compute poisson probabilities PPROB: Stata Program to compute poisson probabilities
  • PPSCHROMY: Stata module to draw sample with probability proportionate to size, using Chromy’s method of sequential random sampling PPSCHROMY: Stata module to draw sample with probability proportionate to size, using Chromy’s method of sequential random sampling
  • PPSSAMPFORD: Stata module to draw sample with probability proportionate to size, without replacement, using Sampford’s method PPSSAMPFORD: Stata module to draw sample with probability proportionate to size, without replacement, using Sampford’s method
  • PPUNIT: RATS procedure to perform Phillips-Perron Unit Root test PPUNIT: RATS procedure to perform Phillips-Perron Unit Root test
  • PRE: Stata module to calculate the proportional reduction in errors accomplished by an estimated model PRE: Stata module to calculate the proportional reduction in errors accomplished by an estimated model
  • PREDCALC: Stata module to calculate out-of-sample predictions for regression, logistic PREDCALC: Stata module to calculate out-of-sample predictions for regression, logistic
  • PREDSURV: Stata module to compute predicted survival to a specified time after streg PREDSURV: Stata module to compute predicted survival to a specified time after streg
  • PREDXCAT: Stata module to calculate predicted means, medians, or proportions for nominal X’s PREDXCAT: Stata module to calculate predicted means, medians, or proportions for nominal X’s
  • PREDXCON: Stata module to calculate predicted means, medians, or proportions for a continuous X variable PREDXCON: Stata module to calculate predicted means, medians, or proportions for a continuous X variable
  • PREPAR: Stata module to write code and data file needed to process variables in PARSCALE PREPAR: Stata module to write code and data file needed to process variables in PARSCALE
  • PREPARATION: Stata module to facilitate a one-by-one observation of varlist to make it easier to control data and labels PREPARATION: Stata module to facilitate a one-by-one observation of varlist to make it easier to control data and labels
  • PRESERVE_GLOBALS: Stata module to preserve global macros PRESERVE_GLOBALS: Stata module to preserve global macros
  • PRESS: SAS Routine to perform the PRESS calculation in regression PRESS: SAS Routine to perform the PRESS calculation in regression
  • PRETRENDS: Stata module to produce power calculations for pre-trends tests PRETRENDS: Stata module to produce power calculations for pre-trends tests
  • PRETTY_SUITE: Stata module with programs to aid with routine reporting for clinical trials PRETTY_SUITE: Stata module with programs to aid with routine reporting for clinical trials
  • PREVENT: Stata module for computing AHA 10-year and 30-year risk of cardiovascular disease–atherosclerotic and heart failure PREVENT: Stata module for computing AHA 10-year and 30-year risk of cardiovascular disease–atherosclerotic and heart failure
  • PRIMES: Stata module to generate prime numbers PRIMES: Stata module to generate prime numbers
  • PRINFACTORS: RATS procedure to perform principal components-based factor analysis PRINFACTORS: RATS procedure to perform principal components-based factor analysis
  • PRINTGPH: Stata module to execute command for each matching file PRINTGPH: Stata module to execute command for each matching file
  • PRJCONDITIONAL: RATS procedure to compute predicted probabilities for conditional logit model PRJCONDITIONAL: RATS procedure to compute predicted probabilities for conditional logit model
  • PRJMULTINOMIAL: RATS procedure to compute predicted probabilities for multinomial logit model PRJMULTINOMIAL: RATS procedure to compute predicted probabilities for multinomial logit model
  • PROBCALC: Stata module to calculate probabilities for Binomial, Poisson, and Normal Distributions PROBCALC: Stata module to calculate probabilities for Binomial, Poisson, and Normal Distributions
  • PROBEXOG-TOBEXOG: Stata modules to test exogeneity in probit/tobit PROBEXOG-TOBEXOG: Stata modules to test exogeneity in probit/tobit
  • PROBGENEXTVAL: Stata module to Estimate Binary Generalized Extreme Value (GEV) Models PROBGENEXTVAL: Stata module to Estimate Binary Generalized Extreme Value (GEV) Models
  • PROBITFE: Stata module to compute analytical and jackknife bias corrections for fixed effects estimators of panel probit models with individual and time effects PROBITFE: Stata module to compute analytical and jackknife bias corrections for fixed effects estimators of panel probit models with individual and time effects
  • PROBITIV: Stata module to perform instrumental variables probit PROBITIV: Stata module to perform instrumental variables probit
  • PROBITMISS: Stata module for Efficient Probit Estimation with Partially missing Covariates PROBITMISS: Stata module for Efficient Probit Estimation with Partially missing Covariates
  • PRODEST: Stata module for production function estimation based on the control function approach PRODEST: Stata module for production function estimation based on the control function approach
  • PRODVARS: Stata module to create product variables for two lists of input variables PRODVARS: Stata module to create product variables for two lists of input variables
  • PRODY: Stata module to calculate factor intensity and sophistication indicators PRODY: Stata module to calculate factor intensity and sophistication indicators
  • PROFHAP: Stata module to construct profile likelihood confidence intervals for haplotype analysis PROFHAP: Stata module to construct profile likelihood confidence intervals for haplotype analysis
  • PROGRES: Stata module to measure distributive effects of an income tax PROGRES: Stata module to measure distributive effects of an income tax
  • PROJECT: Stata module providing a set of tools to build and manage a Stata project PROJECT: Stata module providing a set of tools to build and manage a Stata project
  • PROLIST: Stata module to list programs, help files, dialogs PROLIST: Stata module to list programs, help files, dialogs
  • PROPCNSREG: Stata module fitting a measurement model with causal indicators PROPCNSREG: Stata module fitting a measurement model with causal indicators
  • PROPRCSPLINE: Stata module for restricted cubic spline smoothing of proportions PROPRCSPLINE: Stata module for restricted cubic spline smoothing of proportions
  • PROSPERITY: Stata module to compute Shared Prosperity Convergence Index PROSPERITY: Stata module to compute Shared Prosperity Convergence Index
  • PRTAB: Stata module to compute Precision-recall curves PRTAB: Stata module to compute Precision-recall curves
  • PRWE: Stata module to calculate the PRWE scores from your records PRWE: Stata module to calculate the PRWE scores from your records
  • PSACALC: Stata module to calculate treatment effects and relative degree of selection under proportional selection of observables and unobservables PSACALC: Stata module to calculate treatment effects and relative degree of selection under proportional selection of observables and unobservables
  • PSBAYES: Stata module to perform pseudo-Bayes smoothing of cell estimates PSBAYES: Stata module to perform pseudo-Bayes smoothing of cell estimates
  • PSEMAIL: Stata module to send email from within Stata for Windows environment PSEMAIL: Stata module to send email from within Stata for Windows environment
  • PSESTIMATE: Stata module to estimate the propensity score proposed by Imbens and Rubin PSESTIMATE: Stata module to estimate the propensity score proposed by Imbens and Rubin
  • PSHARE: Stata module to compute and graph percentile shares PSHARE: Stata module to compute and graph percentile shares
  • PSIDTOOLS: Stata module to facilitate access to Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID) PSIDTOOLS: Stata module to facilitate access to Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID)
  • PSIDUSE: Stata module providing easy PSID access PSIDUSE: Stata module providing easy PSID access
  • PSMATCH2: Stata module to perform full Mahalanobis and propensity score matching, common support graphing, and covariate imbalance testing PSMATCH2: Stata module to perform full Mahalanobis and propensity score matching, common support graphing, and covariate imbalance testing
  • PSPLINE: Stata module providing a penalized spline scatterplot smoother based on linear mixed model technology PSPLINE: Stata module providing a penalized spline scatterplot smoother based on linear mixed model technology
  • PSREG: Stata module for blocking with regression adjustments PSREG: Stata module for blocking with regression adjustments
  • PSTRATA: Stata module for optimal propensity score stratification PSTRATA: Stata module for optimal propensity score stratification
  • PSWEIGHT: Stata module to perform IPW- and CBPS-type propensity score reweighting, with various extensions PSWEIGHT: Stata module to perform IPW- and CBPS-type propensity score reweighting, with various extensions
  • PTREND: Stata module for trend analysis for proportions PTREND: Stata module for trend analysis for proportions
  • PTVTOOLS: Stata module contining various tools for PTV analysis PTVTOOLS: Stata module contining various tools for PTV analysis
  • PULLIN: Stata module to run a many-to-one merge with a specific set of options PULLIN: Stata module to run a many-to-one merge with a specific set of options
  • PUNAF: Stata module to compute population attributable fractions for cohort studies PUNAF: Stata module to compute population attributable fractions for cohort studies
  • PUNAFCC: Stata module to compute population attributable fractions for case-control and survival studies PUNAFCC: Stata module to compute population attributable fractions for case-control and survival studies

  • PUTDOCXFREQTABLE: Stata module to produce frequency oneway tables with putdocx PUTDOCXFREQTABLE: Stata module to produce frequency oneway tables with putdocx
  • PUTWRAP: Stata module to simplify creation of putdocx and putpdf documents PUTWRAP: Stata module to simplify creation of putdocx and putpdf documents
  • PV: Stata module to perform estimation with plausible values PV: Stata module to perform estimation with plausible values
  • PVENN: Stata module to create proportional Venn diagram PVENN: Stata module to create proportional Venn diagram
  • PVFIX: Stata module to compute the present value of a series of equal payments (cash flows) PVFIX: Stata module to compute the present value of a series of equal payments (cash flows)
  • PVVAR: Stata module to compute the present value of a series of payments (cash flows) PVVAR: Stata module to compute the present value of a series of payments (cash flows)
  • PVW: Stata module to perform predictive value weighting for covariate misclassification in logistic regression PVW: Stata module to perform predictive value weighting for covariate misclassification in logistic regression
  • PWCORR2: Stata module to compute pairwise correlations and return results PWCORR2: Stata module to compute pairwise correlations and return results
  • PWCORRF: Stata module to compute pairwise correlations efficiently, with builtin reshape functionality PWCORRF: Stata module to compute pairwise correlations efficiently, with builtin reshape functionality
  • PWCORRS: Stata module for enhanced correlation matrix PWCORRS: Stata module for enhanced correlation matrix
  • PWCORRW: Stata module to print wide correlation matrix with significance indicators PWCORRW: Stata module to print wide correlation matrix with significance indicators
  • PWCOV: Stata module to compute pairwise covariances PWCOV: Stata module to compute pairwise covariances
  • PWEIBULL: Stata module to generate probability plot for data vs fitted Weibull distribution PWEIBULL: Stata module to generate probability plot for data vs fitted Weibull distribution
  • PWEXP: Stata module to fit piecewise exponential model PWEXP: Stata module to fit piecewise exponential model
  • PWLAW: Stata module to test for power-law behavior PWLAW: Stata module to test for power-law behavior
  • PWMC: Stata module to compute pairwise multiple comparisons (unequal variances) PWMC: Stata module to compute pairwise multiple comparisons (unequal variances)
  • PWPLOTI: Stata module to plot power curve for sample size and power calculation PWPLOTI: Stata module to plot power curve for sample size and power calculation
  • PYCONVERTU: Stata module to convert a string variable into a classification from the default or user-provided JSON file with the help of Python 3 PYCONVERTU: Stata module to convert a string variable into a classification from the default or user-provided JSON file with the help of Python 3
  • PYDDOP: Python Module for Determining the Dimension of the Optimal Portfolio PYDDOP: Python Module for Determining the Dimension of the Optimal Portfolio
  • PYEOCPS: Python Module for the Evaluation of Options and Calculation of the Price Sensitivities PYEOCPS: Python Module for the Evaluation of Options and Calculation of the Price Sensitivities

  • PYRAMID_CHART: Stata module to generate a population pyramid chart PYRAMID_CHART: Stata module to generate a population pyramid chart
  • PYSTACKED: Stata module for stacking generalization and machine learning in Stata PYSTACKED: Stata module for stacking generalization and machine learning in Stata
  • PYTHON: Stata module for using the Python language within Stata PYTHON: Stata module for using the Python language within Stata
  • PZMS: Stata module to implement the Placebo Zone optimal Model Selection algorithm for regression discontinuity and kink designs PZMS: Stata module to implement the Placebo Zone optimal Model Selection algorithm for regression discontinuity and kink designs
  • PyCPTAM: Python Module for Constructing Portfolios via Two Alternative Methods PyCPTAM: Python Module for Constructing Portfolios via Two Alternative Methods

Q

  • QAP: Stata module to perform quadratic assignment procedure QAP: Stata module to perform quadratic assignment procedure
  • QBETA: Stata module to generate quantile-quantile plot for data vs fitted beta distribution QBETA: Stata module to generate quantile-quantile plot for data vs fitted beta distribution
  • QBPLOT: Stata module for quantile plot with box flavour QBPLOT: Stata module for quantile plot with box flavour
  • QCM: Stata module to implement quantile control method (QCM) via Random Forest QCM: Stata module to implement quantile control method (QCM) via Random Forest
  • QCONVERT: Stata module to convert a raw Q-sort file into a new Q-sort file which is ready for analysis by QFACTOR program QCONVERT: Stata module to convert a raw Q-sort file into a new Q-sort file which is ready for analysis by QFACTOR program
  • QCOUNT: Stata program to fit quantile regression models for count data QCOUNT: Stata program to fit quantile regression models for count data
  • QENV: Stata module to generate quantile envelopes for quantile-quantile plots QENV: Stata module to generate quantile envelopes for quantile-quantile plots
  • QEXP: Stata module to produce quantile-quantile plot for data vs fitted exponential distribution QEXP: Stata module to produce quantile-quantile plot for data vs fitted exponential distribution
  • QFACTOR: Stata module to perform Q-analysis on Q-sorts using different factor extraction and factor rotation techniques QFACTOR: Stata module to perform Q-analysis on Q-sorts using different factor extraction and factor rotation techniques
  • QGAMMA: Stata module to generate quantile-quantile plot for data vs fitted gamma distribution QGAMMA: Stata module to generate quantile-quantile plot for data vs fitted gamma distribution
  • QHAPIPF: Stata module to perform analysis of quantitative traits using regression and log-linear modelling when PHASE is unknown QHAPIPF: Stata module to perform analysis of quantitative traits using regression and log-linear modelling when PHASE is unknown
  • QIC: Stata module to compute model selection criterion in GEE analyses QIC: Stata module to compute model selection criterion in GEE analyses
  • QLL: Stata module to implement Elliott-Müller efficient test for general persistent time variation in regression coefficients QLL: Stata module to implement Elliott-Müller efficient test for general persistent time variation in regression coefficients
  • QLOGNORM: Stata module for diagnostic plots for lognormal distribution QLOGNORM: Stata module for diagnostic plots for lognormal distribution
  • QLQC15: Stata module for scoring of the EORTC QLQ-C15-PAL QLQC15: Stata module for scoring of the EORTC QLQ-C15-PAL
  • QOG: Stata module to access the most recent release of the “Quality of Government” data QOG: Stata module to access the most recent release of the “Quality of Government” data
  • QOGBOOK: Stata module to access Quality of Government codebooks QOGBOOK: Stata module to access Quality of Government codebooks
  • QPAIR: Stata module to perform Q-analysis on paired Q-sorts using different factor extraction and factor rotation techniques QPAIR: Stata module to perform Q-analysis on paired Q-sorts using different factor extraction and factor rotation techniques
  • QPFIT: Stata module containing various quantile and probability plots for assessing distribution fit QPFIT: Stata module containing various quantile and probability plots for assessing distribution fit
  • QQCOMPARE: Stata module to evaluate balance after matching using quantile-quantile plots QQCOMPARE: Stata module to evaluate balance after matching using quantile-quantile plots
  • QQPLOT2: Stata module to produce quantile-quantile plot QQPLOT2: Stata module to produce quantile-quantile plot
  • QQPLOT3: Stata module to plot the unweighted and weighted quantiles of one variable against the corresponding quantiles of another QQPLOT3: Stata module to plot the unweighted and weighted quantiles of one variable against the corresponding quantiles of another
  • QQPLOTG: Stata module to draw quantile-quantile plots, generalized to allow groups and plotting difference vs mean QQPLOTG: Stata module to draw quantile-quantile plots, generalized to allow groups and plotting difference vs mean
  • QQVALUE: Stata module to generate quasi-q-values by inverting multiple-test procedures QQVALUE: Stata module to generate quasi-q-values by inverting multiple-test procedures
  • QREG2: Stata module to perform quantile regression with robust and clustered standard errors QREG2: Stata module to perform quantile regression with robust and clustered standard errors
  • QREGPD: Stata module to perform Quantile Regression for Panel Data QREGPD: Stata module to perform Quantile Regression for Panel Data
  • QREGPLOT: Stata module for plotting coefficients of a Quantile Regression QREGPLOT: Stata module for plotting coefficients of a Quantile Regression
  • QREGSEL: Stata module to estimate quantile regression corrected for sample selection QREGSEL: Stata module to estimate quantile regression corrected for sample selection
  • QRISK2CMD: Stata module to run QRISK2 from within Stata QRISK2CMD: Stata module to run QRISK2 from within Stata
  • QRKD: Stata module to estimate and produce robust inference for heterogeneous causal effects of a continuous treatment in quantile regression kink designs QRKD: Stata module to estimate and produce robust inference for heterogeneous causal effects of a continuous treatment in quantile regression kink designs
  • QROWNAME: Stata module to extract lists of quoted row and column names from a matrix QROWNAME: Stata module to extract lists of quoted row and column names from a matrix
  • QRPROCESS: Stata module for quantile regression: fast algorithm, pointwise and uniform inference QRPROCESS: Stata module for quantile regression: fast algorithm, pointwise and uniform inference
  • QSIM: Stata module to produce variables for clarify routines QSIM: Stata module to produce variables for clarify routines
  • QSTAT2: MATLAB function to compute Ljung-Box Q statistic QSTAT2: MATLAB function to compute Ljung-Box Q statistic
  • QSTAT: MATLAB module to calculate Ljung-Box q statistic QSTAT: MATLAB module to calculate Ljung-Box q statistic
  • QSUB: Stata module to emulate a cluster environment using your desktop PC QSUB: Stata module to emulate a cluster environment using your desktop PC
  • QUADAS: Stata module to provide graphical depiction of quality assessment in diagnostic accuracy reviews QUADAS: Stata module to provide graphical depiction of quality assessment in diagnostic accuracy reviews
  • QUAIDSCE: Stata module to estimate censored almost-ideal demand systems QUAIDSCE: Stata module to estimate censored almost-ideal demand systems
  • QUALTRICSLOAD: Stata module to download survey results from Qualtrics server and optionally convert to Stata dataset QUALTRICSLOAD: Stata module to download survey results from Qualtrics server and optionally convert to Stata dataset
  • QUANDL: Stata module to obtain data from Quandl using the Quandl API QUANDL: Stata module to obtain data from Quandl using the Quandl API
  • QUANTIL2: Stata module to generate multivariate quantile plot QUANTIL2: Stata module to generate multivariate quantile plot
  • QUANTILEREG: MATLAB function to estimate quantile regression QUANTILEREG: MATLAB function to estimate quantile regression
  • QUANTILES: Stata module to categorize by quantiles QUANTILES: Stata module to categorize by quantiles
  • QUARTIMAX: RATS procedure to perform factor rotation using quartimax criterion QUARTIMAX: RATS procedure to perform factor rotation using quartimax criterion
  • QUICKICC: Stata module to compute intraclass correlation and standard error calculation after xtmixed QUICKICC: Stata module to compute intraclass correlation and standard error calculation after xtmixed
  • QUINE: Stata module providing a self-producing program QUINE: Stata module providing a self-producing program
  • QV: Stata module to compute quasi-variances QV: Stata module to compute quasi-variances
  • QWEIBULL: Stata module to generate quantile-quantile plot for data vs fitted Weibull distribution QWEIBULL: Stata module to generate quantile-quantile plot for data vs fitted Weibull distribution

R

  • R2C: Stata module to compute several fit statistics for count data models R2C: Stata module to compute several fit statistics for count data models
  • R2NLSUR: Stata module to perform Overall System (NL-SUR) System R2, Adj. R2, F-Test, and Chi2-Test R2NLSUR: Stata module to perform Overall System (NL-SUR) System R2, Adj. R2, F-Test, and Chi2-Test
  • R2O: Stata module to calculate an ordinal explained variation statistic R2O: Stata module to calculate an ordinal explained variation statistic
  • R2REG3: Stata module to compute System R2, Adj. R2, F-Test, and Chi2-Test after reg3 or sureg R2REG3: Stata module to compute System R2, Adj. R2, F-Test, and Chi2-Test after reg3 or sureg
  • R2SEM: Stata module to perform Overall System Structural Equation Modeling (SEM) R2, Adj. R2, F-Test, and Chi2-Test R2SEM: Stata module to perform Overall System Structural Equation Modeling (SEM) R2, Adj. R2, F-Test, and Chi2-Test
  • R2VAR: Stata Module to Compute (VAR) Overall System R2, F-Test, and Chi2-Test R2VAR: Stata Module to Compute (VAR) Overall System R2, F-Test, and Chi2-Test
  • R2_MZ: Stata module to compute McKelvey & Zavoina’s R2 R2_MZ: Stata module to compute McKelvey & Zavoina’s R2
  • R2_NAKAGAWA: Stata module for computing Nakagawa’s R-squared statistic for multilevel mixed-effects linear regression R2_NAKAGAWA: Stata module for computing Nakagawa’s R-squared statistic for multilevel mixed-effects linear regression
  • RADAR: Stata module to draw radar (spider) plots RADAR: Stata module to draw radar (spider) plots
  • RADF: Stata module to calculate unit root tests for explosive behaviour RADF: Stata module to calculate unit root tests for explosive behaviour
  • RADIUSMATCH: Stata module to perform distance-weighted radius matching with bias adjustment RADIUSMATCH: Stata module to perform distance-weighted radius matching with bias adjustment
  • RAEWMA: Stata module to plot the risk adjusted exponentially weighted moving average RAEWMA: Stata module to plot the risk adjusted exponentially weighted moving average
  • RALPHA: Stata module to generate pseudo-random characters or words RALPHA: Stata module to generate pseudo-random characters or words
  • RANDCMD: Stata module to compute randomization inference p-values RANDCMD: Stata module to compute randomization inference p-values
  • RANDCMDCI: Stata module to produce robust randomization-t p-values and confidence intervals for regression coefficients RANDCMDCI: Stata module to produce robust randomization-t p-values and confidence intervals for regression coefficients
  • RANDCOEF: Stata module to estimate correlated random effects and correlated random coefficients models RANDCOEF: Stata module to estimate correlated random effects and correlated random coefficients models
  • RANDINF: Stata module to calculate the treatment effect and p-value of a stratified randomized controlled experiment RANDINF: Stata module to calculate the treatment effect and p-value of a stratified randomized controlled experiment
  • RANDOMID: Stata module to identify every observation in the dataset with random alphanumeric characters RANDOMID: Stata module to identify every observation in the dataset with random alphanumeric characters
  • RANDOMIZE: Stata module to create random assignments for experimental trials, including blocking, balance checking, and automated rerandomization RANDOMIZE: Stata module to create random assignments for experimental trials, including blocking, balance checking, and automated rerandomization
  • RANDOMIZR: Stata module to implement random assignment procedures RANDOMIZR: Stata module to implement random assignment procedures
  • RANDOMSELECT: Stata module to randomly select and tag observations RANDOMSELECT: Stata module to randomly select and tag observations
  • RANDOMTAG: Stata module to draw observations without replacement RANDOMTAG: Stata module to draw observations without replacement
  • RANDTREAT: Stata module to randomly assign treatments uneven treatments and deal with misfits RANDTREAT: Stata module to randomly assign treatments uneven treatments and deal with misfits
  • RANDTREATSEQ: Stata module for generating treatments in a random sequence for each individual in the sample RANDTREATSEQ: Stata module for generating treatments in a random sequence for each individual in the sample
  • RANGEJOIN: Stata module to form pairwise combinations if a key variable is within range RANGEJOIN: Stata module to form pairwise combinations if a key variable is within range
  • RANGERUN: Stata module to run Stata commands on observations within range RANGERUN: Stata module to run Stata commands on observations within range
  • RANGESTAT: Stata module to generate statistics using observations within range RANGESTAT: Stata module to generate statistics using observations within range
  • RANKSEG: Stata module to compute rank-order segregation measures with finite sample-bias correction RANKSEG: Stata module to compute rank-order segregation measures with finite sample-bias correction
  • RANKTEST: Stata module to test the rank of a matrix RANKTEST: Stata module to test the rank of a matrix
  • RANMIXTURE: RATS procedure to perform random draws from a mixture of Normals RANMIXTURE: RATS procedure to perform random draws from a mixture of Normals
  • RANOVA: Stata module to estimate single factor repeated measures ANOVA RANOVA: Stata module to estimate single factor repeated measures ANOVA
  • RANVAR: Stata module to compute the random group variance estimator of the mean for survey data RANVAR: Stata module to compute the random group variance estimator of the mean for survey data
  • RAS: Stata module to implement biproportional scaling (RAS) method RAS: Stata module to implement biproportional scaling (RAS) method
  • RASCHCVT: Stata module to produce data in WINSTEPS format RASCHCVT: Stata module to produce data in WINSTEPS format
  • RASCHFIT: Stata module to implement the Raschfit algorithm defined by Hardouin and Mesbah (2004) RASCHFIT: Stata module to implement the Raschfit algorithm defined by Hardouin and Mesbah (2004)
  • RASCHIFY: Stata module to transform 1PL model estimates to Rasch metric RASCHIFY: Stata module to transform 1PL model estimates to Rasch metric
  • RASCHPOWER: Stata module to estimate power of the Wald test in order to compare the means of the latent trait in two groups of individuals RASCHPOWER: Stata module to estimate power of the Wald test in order to compare the means of the latent trait in two groups of individuals
  • RASCHTEST: Stata module to estimate parameters of the Rasch model by CML, MML or GEE RASCHTEST: Stata module to estimate parameters of the Rasch model by CML, MML or GEE
  • RASCHTESTV7: Stata module to estimate parameters of the Rasch model by CML, MML or GEE (v7) RASCHTESTV7: Stata module to estimate parameters of the Rasch model by CML, MML or GEE (v7)
  • RASPRT: Stata module to plot the risk adjusted sequential probability ratio test (+/- risk adjusted cusum) RASPRT: Stata module to plot the risk adjusted sequential probability ratio test (+/- risk adjusted cusum)
  • RASSIGN: Stata module to perform regression-based test for random assignment to peer groups RASSIGN: Stata module to perform regression-based test for random assignment to peer groups
  • RATIO_PLOT: Stata module to plot ratios and confidence intervals of specified variables RATIO_PLOT: Stata module to plot ratios and confidence intervals of specified variables

  • RBC: Mathematica notebook to solve and simulate Real Business Cycle models RBC: Mathematica notebook to solve and simulate Real Business Cycle models
  • RBIPROBIT: Stata module to estimate recursive bivariate probit regressions RBIPROBIT: Stata module to estimate recursive bivariate probit regressions
  • RBOUNDS: Stata module to perform Rosenbaum sensitivity analysis for average treatment effects on the treated RBOUNDS: Stata module to perform Rosenbaum sensitivity analysis for average treatment effects on the treated
  • RC2: Stata module to estimate Goodman’s Row and Columns model 2 RC2: Stata module to estimate Goodman’s Row and Columns model 2
  • RCA: Stata module to compute various revealed comparative advantage (RCA) indices RCA: Stata module to compute various revealed comparative advantage (RCA) indices
  • RCD: Stata module to run commands recursively RCD: Stata module to run commands recursively
  • RCENTILE: Stata module to compute robust confidence intervals for percentiles RCENTILE: Stata module to compute robust confidence intervals for percentiles
  • RCL: Stata module for estimation and simulation of random coefficient logit models RCL: Stata module for estimation and simulation of random coefficient logit models
  • RCM: Stata module to implement regression control method / panel data approach to program evaluation RCM: Stata module to implement regression control method / panel data approach to program evaluation
  • RCOLP2MAT: Stata module to produce a two-way table with row and column percentages as a matrix RCOLP2MAT: Stata module to produce a two-way table with row and column percentages as a matrix
  • RCSGEN: Stata module to generate restricted cubic splines and their derivatives RCSGEN: Stata module to generate restricted cubic splines and their derivatives
  • RCSPLINE: Stata module for restricted cubic spline smoothing RCSPLINE: Stata module for restricted cubic spline smoothing
  • RCTABLE: Stata module to create a table used in randomized controlled trials RCTABLE: Stata module to create a table used in randomized controlled trials
  • RCTMISS: Stata module to analyse a randomised controlled trial (RCT) allowing for informatively missing outcome data RCTMISS: Stata module to analyse a randomised controlled trial (RCT) allowing for informatively missing outcome data
  • RCT_MINIM: Stata module to assign treatments to subjects in a controlled trial RCT_MINIM: Stata module to assign treatments to subjects in a controlled trial
  • RC_SPLINE: Stata module to generate restricted cubic splines RC_SPLINE: Stata module to generate restricted cubic splines
  • RD: Stata module for regression discontinuity estimation RD: Stata module for regression discontinuity estimation
  • RDATASETS: Stata module to access R datasets available in CSV format from GitHub RDATASETS: Stata module to access R datasets available in CSV format from GitHub
  • RDBALANCE: Stata module to compute covariate balance statistics with formatted table output in treatment effect analysis and RDD RDBALANCE: Stata module to compute covariate balance statistics with formatted table output in treatment effect analysis and RDD
  • RDCI: Stata module to calculate risk difference confidence intervals RDCI: Stata module to calculate risk difference confidence intervals
  • RDCONT: Stata module to compute non-randomized approximate sign test of density continuity RDCONT: Stata module to compute non-randomized approximate sign test of density continuity
  • RDCV: Stata module to perform Sharp Regression Discontinuity Design with Cross Validation Bandwidth Selection RDCV: Stata module to perform Sharp Regression Discontinuity Design with Cross Validation Bandwidth Selection
  • RDDENSITY: Stata module to perform Manipulation Testing Using Local Polynomial Density Estimation RDDENSITY: Stata module to perform Manipulation Testing Using Local Polynomial Density Estimation
  • RDDSGA: Stata module to conduct subgroup analysis for regression discontinuity designs RDDSGA: Stata module to conduct subgroup analysis for regression discontinuity designs
  • RDECOMPOSE: Stata module to implements Gupta’s rate decomposition method for aggregated data RDECOMPOSE: Stata module to implements Gupta’s rate decomposition method for aggregated data
  • RDESIGNI: Stata module to perform design analysis RDESIGNI: Stata module to perform design analysis
  • RDEXO: Stata module to produces relevant estimates for testing the external validity of LATE RDEXO: Stata module to produces relevant estimates for testing the external validity of LATE
  • RDIFF: Stata module to calculate 95% confidence intervals for the differences of binomial proportions RDIFF: Stata module to calculate 95% confidence intervals for the differences of binomial proportions
  • RDMSE: Stata module to estimate the mean squared error of a local polynomial regression discontinuity or regression kink estimator RDMSE: Stata module to estimate the mean squared error of a local polynomial regression discontinuity or regression kink estimator
  • RDPERMUTE: Stata module to perform a permutation test for the Regression Kink (RK) and Regression Discontinuity (RD) Design RDPERMUTE: Stata module to perform a permutation test for the Regression Kink (RK) and Regression Discontinuity (RD) Design
  • RDPOWER: Stata module to perform power calculations for random designs RDPOWER: Stata module to perform power calculations for random designs
  • RDQTE: Stata module for estimation and robust inference for quantile treatment effects (QTE) in regression discontinuity designs (RDD) RDQTE: Stata module for estimation and robust inference for quantile treatment effects (QTE) in regression discontinuity designs (RDD)
  • RDROBUST: Stata module to provide robust data-driven inference in the regression-discontinuity design RDROBUST: Stata module to provide robust data-driven inference in the regression-discontinuity design
  • RDS: Stata module for respondent driven sampling RDS: Stata module for respondent driven sampling
  • READLOG: Stata module to read and process a file READLOG: Stata module to read and process a file
  • READREPLACE: Stata module to make replacements that are specified in an external dataset READREPLACE: Stata module to make replacements that are specified in an external dataset
  • READSHARE: Stata module to access Survey of Health Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE) data READSHARE: Stata module to access Survey of Health Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE) data
  • READWIND: Stata module to read the data downloaded from the Wind into Stata in a long form READWIND: Stata module to read the data downloaded from the Wind into Stata in a long form
  • REALCOMIMPUTE: Stata module to export and import data to the realcomImpute software package REALCOMIMPUTE: Stata module to export and import data to the realcomImpute software package
  • RECAP: Stata module to perform capture-recapture analysis for three sources with Goodness-of-Fit based confidence intervals RECAP: Stata module to perform capture-recapture analysis for three sources with Goodness-of-Fit based confidence intervals
  • RECAST2: Stata module to change storage type of variable RECAST2: Stata module to change storage type of variable
  • RECLINK: Stata module to probabilistically match records RECLINK: Stata module to probabilistically match records
  • RECOCL: Stata module to recode municipal codes for Chile (CL) RECOCL: Stata module to recode municipal codes for Chile (CL)
  • RECODE2: Stata module to provide extended recode capabilities RECODE2: Stata module to provide extended recode capabilities
  • RECOL: Stata module to Dynamically Resize Columns in Stata’s Data Browser RECOL: Stata module to Dynamically Resize Columns in Stata’s Data Browser
  • REDI: RATS module to estimate a robust regression REDI: RATS module to estimate a robust regression
  • REDI: Stata module providing a Random Empirical Distribution Imputation method for estimating continuous incomes REDI: Stata module providing a Random Empirical Distribution Imputation method for estimating continuous incomes
  • REFFADJUST: Stata module to estimate adjusted regression coefficients for the association between two random effects variables REFFADJUST: Stata module to estimate adjusted regression coefficients for the association between two random effects variables
  • REFFECT: Stata module to compute Pearson’s r Effect Size Computation for Analysis of Variance (ANOVA) REFFECT: Stata module to compute Pearson’s r Effect Size Computation for Analysis of Variance (ANOVA)
  • REFORMAT: Stata module to reformat regression output REFORMAT: Stata module to reformat regression output
  • REG2DOCX: Stata module to report regression results to formatted table in DOCX file REG2DOCX: Stata module to report regression results to formatted table in DOCX file
  • REG2HDFE: Stata module to estimate a Linear Regression Model with two High Dimensional Fixed Effects REG2HDFE: Stata module to estimate a Linear Regression Model with two High Dimensional Fixed Effects
  • REG2LOGIT: Stata module to approximate logistic regression parameters using OLS linear regression REG2LOGIT: Stata module to approximate logistic regression parameters using OLS linear regression
  • REGALL: Stata module to run and compare all regressions derived from complete sets of regressors REGALL: Stata module to run and compare all regressions derived from complete sets of regressors
  • REGANAT: Stata module to perform graphical inspection of linear multivariate models based on regression anatomy REGANAT: Stata module to perform graphical inspection of linear multivariate models based on regression anatomy
  • REGAXIS: Stata module to make regular linear and logarithmic axis scales, ranges and tick lists REGAXIS: Stata module to make regular linear and logarithmic axis scales, ranges and tick lists
  • REGCHECK: Stata module to examine regression assumptions REGCHECK: Stata module to examine regression assumptions
  • REGCOEF: Stata module to compute coefficients for quantifying relative importance of predictors REGCOEF: Stata module to compute coefficients for quantifying relative importance of predictors
  • REGDIS: Stata module to control variables and decimals in regression displays REGDIS: Stata module to control variables and decimals in regression displays
  • REGDPLOT: Stata module to produce regression diagnostics plot REGDPLOT: Stata module to produce regression diagnostics plot
  • REGEN: Stata module to create new or change existing variable REGEN: Stata module to create new or change existing variable
  • REGEXACTDW: RATS procedure to compute the exact significance level for the Durbin-Watson REGEXACTDW: RATS procedure to compute the exact significance level for the Durbin-Watson
  • REGFIT: Stata module to Output The Equation of a Regression REGFIT: Stata module to Output The Equation of a Regression
  • REGGAE_MUSIC: Stata module for rasta Stata users REGGAE_MUSIC: Stata module for rasta Stata users
  • REGHBREAK: RATS procedure to perform structural break test with bootstrapped p-values REGHBREAK: RATS procedure to perform structural break test with bootstrapped p-values
  • REGHDFE: Stata module to perform linear or instrumental-variable regression absorbing any number of high-dimensional fixed effects REGHDFE: Stata module to perform linear or instrumental-variable regression absorbing any number of high-dimensional fixed effects
  • REGHDFEJL: Stata module to estimate high-dimensional fixed-effect linear models using Julia REGHDFEJL: Stata module to estimate high-dimensional fixed-effect linear models using Julia
  • REGIFE: Stata module to estimate linear models with interactive fixed effects REGIFE: Stata module to estimate linear models with interactive fixed effects
  • REGINTFE: Stata module to estimate a linear regression model with one interacted high dimensional fixed effect REGINTFE: Stata module to estimate a linear regression model with one interacted high dimensional fixed effect
  • REGLIKE: Stata module to calculate log-likelihood function value from regress REGLIKE: Stata module to calculate log-likelihood function value from regress
  • REGMAIN: Stata module to perform Quasi-Maximum Likelihood Regression REGMAIN: Stata module to perform Quasi-Maximum Likelihood Regression
  • REGOPROB2: Stata module to estimate random effects generalized ordered probit models (update) REGOPROB2: Stata module to estimate random effects generalized ordered probit models (update)
  • REGOPROB: Stata module to estimate random effects generalized ordered probit models REGOPROB: Stata module to estimate random effects generalized ordered probit models
  • REGPAR: Stata module to compute population attributable risks from binary regression models REGPAR: Stata module to compute population attributable risks from binary regression models
  • REGPCSE: RATS procedure to compute panel-corrected standard error calculation REGPCSE: RATS procedure to compute panel-corrected standard error calculation
  • REGPRED: Stata module to calculate linear regression predictions REGPRED: Stata module to calculate linear regression predictions
  • REGRESBY: Stata module to generate regression residuals by byvarlist REGRESBY: Stata module to generate regression residuals by byvarlist
  • REGRESET: RATS procedure to perform Ramsey RESET test on regression REGRESET: RATS procedure to perform Ramsey RESET test on regression
  • REGSAVE: Stata module to save regression results to a Stata-formatted dataset REGSAVE: Stata module to save regression results to a Stata-formatted dataset
  • REGSENSITIVITY: Stata module for regression sensitivity analysis REGSENSITIVITY: Stata module for regression sensitivity analysis
  • REGSTRTEST: RATS procedure to perform a test for linearity vs nonlinear in the form of smooth transition REGSTRTEST: RATS procedure to perform a test for linearity vs nonlinear in the form of smooth transition
  • REGTABLE: Stata module to produce file of conditional average treatment effects REGTABLE: Stata module to produce file of conditional average treatment effects
  • REGTOTEX: RATS procedure to create a TeX equation from the most recent regression REGTOTEX: RATS procedure to create a TeX equation from the most recent regression
  • REGTREE: RATS procedure to perform a CART (Classification and Regression Trees) analysis REGTREE: RATS procedure to perform a CART (Classification and Regression Trees) analysis
  • REGWHITENNTEST: RATS procedure to perform White neural network test on regression REGWHITENNTEST: RATS procedure to perform White neural network test on regression
  • REGWHITETEST: RATS procedure to perform White heteroscedasticity test on regression REGWHITETEST: RATS procedure to perform White heteroscedasticity test on regression
  • REGWLS: Stata module to estimate Weighted Least Squares with factor variables REGWLS: Stata module to estimate Weighted Least Squares with factor variables
  • REGWUTEST: RATS procedure to perform Wu (or Durbin-Wu-Hausman) specification test on regression REGWUTEST: RATS procedure to perform Wu (or Durbin-Wu-Hausman) specification test on regression
  • REGXFE: Stata module to fit a linear high-order fixed-effects model REGXFE: Stata module to fit a linear high-order fixed-effects model
  • REG_SANDWICH: Stata module to compute cluster-robust (sandwich) variance estimators with small-sample corrections for linear regression REG_SANDWICH: Stata module to compute cluster-robust (sandwich) variance estimators with small-sample corrections for linear regression
  • REG_SS: Stata module to compute confidence intervals, standard errors, and p-values in a linear regression in which the regressor of interest has a shift-share structure REG_SS: Stata module to compute confidence intervals, standard errors, and p-values in a linear regression in which the regressor of interest has a shift-share structure
  • RELDIST: Stata module for relative distribution analysis RELDIST: Stata module for relative distribution analysis
  • RELICOEF: Stata module to compute Raykov’s factor reliability coefficient RELICOEF: Stata module to compute Raykov’s factor reliability coefficient
  • RELOGIT: Stata module to perform Rare Event Logistic Regression RELOGIT: Stata module to perform Rare Event Logistic Regression
  • RELRANK: Stata module to generate relative data (grade transformation) RELRANK: Stata module to generate relative data (grade transformation)
  • RELYPLOT: Stata module to graph reliability plot of predictions for linear or logistic regression models RELYPLOT: Stata module to graph reliability plot of predictions for linear or logistic regression models
  • REL_CLUST: Stata module to compute indices of relative clusterability of variables REL_CLUST: Stata module to compute indices of relative clusterability of variables
  • REMEDIAN: RATS module to compute the median for large datasets REMEDIAN: RATS module to compute the median for large datasets
  • REMR: Stata module to implement robust error meta-regression method for dose–response meta-analysis REMR: Stata module to implement robust error meta-regression method for dose–response meta-analysis
  • REMST: MATLAB function to remove trend and seasonal component using the moving average method REMST: MATLAB function to remove trend and seasonal component using the moving average method
  • RENAMES: Stata module to rename variables RENAMES: Stata module to rename variables
  • RENFILES: Stata module providing a convenient way to change filenames for (a matched subset of) files in a directory of choice (and, if wanted, also recursively in a matched subset of offspring-directories) RENFILES: Stata module providing a convenient way to change filenames for (a matched subset of) files in a directory of choice (and, if wanted, also recursively in a matched subset of offspring-directories)
  • RENLABV: Stata module to rename (all) value labels to match the names of the assigned variables RENLABV: Stata module to rename (all) value labels to match the names of the assigned variables
  • RENSHEET: Stata module to edit variable names and labels RENSHEET: Stata module to edit variable names and labels
  • RENVARLAB: Stata module to rename variables, with option of using variable labels to create new variable names RENVARLAB: Stata module to rename variables, with option of using variable labels to create new variable names
  • REORDER: Stata module to reorder variables in dataset, reversibly REORDER: Stata module to reorder variables in dataset, reversibly
  • REPEATABILITY: Stata module to compute the repeatability coefficient REPEATABILITY: Stata module to compute the repeatability coefficient
  • REPEST: Stata module to run estimations with weighted replicate samples and plausible values REPEST: Stata module to run estimations with weighted replicate samples and plausible values
  • REPKIT: Stata module providing utility toolkit for reproducibility REPKIT: Stata module providing utility toolkit for reproducibility
  • REPLACEBYLAB: Stata module to replace values by drawing on value labels REPLACEBYLAB: Stata module to replace values by drawing on value labels
  • REPLACEN: Stata module to replace contents in exactly n observations REPLACEN: Stata module to replace contents in exactly n observations
  • REPORT: Stata module to produce tables for XML REPORT: Stata module to produce tables for XML
  • REPORTERROR: Stata module to estimate true distribution from noisy measurements REPORTERROR: Stata module to estimate true distribution from noisy measurements
  • REPSAMPLE: Stata module to perform representative sampling from a population or theoretical distributions REPSAMPLE: Stata module to perform representative sampling from a population or theoretical distributions
  • REQUIRE: Stata module to ensure that installed packages have a minimum or exact version REQUIRE: Stata module to ensure that installed packages have a minimum or exact version
  • RESDIAG: RATS module to perform residual diagnostics RESDIAG: RATS module to perform residual diagnostics
  • RESET2: Stata module to calculate specification tests in 2SLS-IV regression analysis RESET2: Stata module to calculate specification tests in 2SLS-IV regression analysis
  • RESET: Stata module to calculate specification tests in regression analysis RESET: Stata module to calculate specification tests in regression analysis
  • RESETXT: Stata Module to Compute Panel Data REgression Specification Error Tests (RESET) RESETXT: Stata Module to Compute Panel Data REgression Specification Error Tests (RESET)
  • RESHAPE3: Stata module to enhance reshape for multilevel data RESHAPE3: Stata module to enhance reshape for multilevel data
  • RESHAPE7: Stata module to provide improved reshape RESHAPE7: Stata module to provide improved reshape
  • RESHAPE8: Stata module to reshape while preserving variable labels RESHAPE8: Stata module to reshape while preserving variable labels
  • RESIZE: Stata module to change the graph size but keep the font size unchanged RESIZE: Stata module to change the graph size but keep the font size unchanged
  • RESP: Stata module to compute Index of Relative Specialization RESP: Stata module to compute Index of Relative Specialization
  • RESPDIFF: Stata module for generating response differentiation indices RESPDIFF: Stata module for generating response differentiation indices
  • RESWAGE: Stata module to estimate a reservation wage model with endogenous selection RESWAGE: Stata module to estimate a reservation wage model with endogenous selection
  • RETRODESIGN: Stata module to compute type-S (Sign) and type-M (Magnitude) errors RETRODESIGN: Stata module to compute type-S (Sign) and type-M (Magnitude) errors
  • REU: Stata module to compute number of random error units (REU) in epidemiological studies REU: Stata module to compute number of random error units (REU) in epidemiological studies
  • REV: Stata module to reverse value order of variables REV: Stata module to reverse value order of variables
  • REVCAT: Stata module to fit reversible catalytic models REVCAT: Stata module to fit reversible catalytic models
  • REVRS: Stata module to reverse variable value order REVRS: Stata module to reverse variable value order
  • REWEIGHT2: Stata module to reweight survey data to user-defined control totals REWEIGHT2: Stata module to reweight survey data to user-defined control totals
  • REWRITE: Stata module to rewrite text files from disk performing macro substitutions REWRITE: Stata module to rewrite text files from disk performing macro substitutions
  • RFL: Stata module to maintain lists of recently accessed files RFL: Stata module to maintain lists of recently accessed files
  • RFOREST: Stata module to implement Random Forest algorithm RFOREST: Stata module to implement Random Forest algorithm
  • RFREGK: Stata module to estimate random-effects model with weights RFREGK: Stata module to estimate random-effects model with weights
  • RGB2: Stata module to generate GB2 random numbers RGB2: Stata module to generate GB2 random numbers
  • RGLM: Stata module to estimate robust generalized linear models RGLM: Stata module to estimate robust generalized linear models
  • RGROUP: Stata module for Random Group Variance Estimation RGROUP: Stata module for Random Group Variance Estimation
  • RGSE: RATS procedure to compute fractional differencing parameter using semiparametric methods RGSE: RATS procedure to compute fractional differencing parameter using semiparametric methods
  • RHAUSMAN: Stata module to perform Robust Hausman Specification Test RHAUSMAN: Stata module to perform Robust Hausman Specification Test

  • RIDGELINE_PLOT: Stata module to produce ridgeline plots RIDGELINE_PLOT: Stata module to produce ridgeline plots
  • RIDGEREG: Stata module to compute Ridge Regression Models RIDGEREG: Stata module to compute Ridge Regression Models

  • RIFLE: Stata module to perform Randomization Inference for Leader Effects RIFLE: Stata module to perform Randomization Inference for Leader Effects

  • RITEST: Stata module to perform randomization inference and permutation tests RITEST: Stata module to perform randomization inference and permutation tests

  • RMANOVA: Stata module to estimate repeated measures ANOVA RMANOVA: Stata module to estimate repeated measures ANOVA
  • RMCLASS: Stata module to compute classification statistics for data with repeated measures RMCLASS: Stata module to compute classification statistics for data with repeated measures
  • RMCORR: Stata module to compute a correlation for data with repeated measures RMCORR: Stata module to compute a correlation for data with repeated measures
  • RMFILES: Stata module to provide a convenient way to remove matched files within a specified directory and possibly, if applicable, corresponding empty directories (which will also, if wanted, be applied recursively to a matched subset of offspring-directories) RMFILES: Stata module to provide a convenient way to remove matched files within a specified directory and possibly, if applicable, corresponding empty directories (which will also, if wanted, be applied recursively to a matched subset of offspring-directories)
  • RMHBOUNDS: Stata module to refine mhbounds to remove the cap on the number of strata and replace the large sample approximation for E and V with exact moments RMHBOUNDS: Stata module to refine mhbounds to remove the cap on the number of strata and replace the large sample approximation for E and V with exact moments

  • ROBLGT: RATS module to estimate binomial logit robustly ROBLGT: RATS module to estimate binomial logit robustly

  • ROBMV: Stata module for robust multivariate estimation of location and covariance ROBMV: Stata module for robust multivariate estimation of location and covariance
  • ROBNOVA: Stata module to calculate two robust ANOVA statistics, Welch’s and Brown-Forsythe’s ROBNOVA: Stata module to calculate two robust ANOVA statistics, Welch’s and Brown-Forsythe’s

  • ROBREG: RATS module to estimate regression robustly and reliably ROBREG: RATS module to estimate regression robustly and reliably
  • ROBREG: Stata module providing robust regression estimators ROBREG: Stata module providing robust regression estimators
  • ROBSCALE: RATS module to compute robust alternative to standard deviation ROBSCALE: RATS module to compute robust alternative to standard deviation
  • ROBSKEW: RATS module for computation of quartile skewness measure ROBSKEW: RATS module for computation of quartile skewness measure
  • ROBSTAT: Stata module to compute robust univariate statistics ROBSTAT: Stata module to compute robust univariate statistics
  • ROBUMETA: Stata module to perform robust variance estimation in meta-regression with dependent effect size estimates ROBUMETA: Stata module to perform robust variance estimation in meta-regression with dependent effect size estimates
  • ROBUSTATE: Stata module for estimation and inference for the average treatment effect (ATE) robustly against the limited overlap ROBUSTATE: Stata module for estimation and inference for the average treatment effect (ATE) robustly against the limited overlap
  • ROBUSTLMTEST: RATS procedure to perform robust LM test for orthogonality of residuals and input series ROBUSTLMTEST: RATS procedure to perform robust LM test for orthogonality of residuals and input series

  • ROCMIC: Stata module to estimate minimally important change (MIC) thresholds for continuous clinical outcome measures using ROC curves ROCMIC: Stata module to estimate minimally important change (MIC) thresholds for continuous clinical outcome measures using ROC curves
  • ROCSS: Stata module to calculate ROC curve and other statistics for any classification method ROCSS: Stata module to calculate ROC curve and other statistics for any classification method
  • ROCTABI: Stata module for performing nonparametric ROC analysis using summarized data ROCTABI: Stata module for performing nonparametric ROC analysis using summarized data
  • ROLLING2: Stata module to perform rolling window and recursive estimation ROLLING2: Stata module to perform rolling window and recursive estimation
  • ROLLING3: Stata module to compute predicted values for rolling regressions ROLLING3: Stata module to compute predicted values for rolling regressions
  • ROLLREG: RATS module to perform rolling and moving-window regressions ROLLREG: RATS module to perform rolling and moving-window regressions
  • ROLLREG: RATS procedure to compute rolling regressions for least squares ROLLREG: RATS procedure to compute rolling regressions for least squares
  • ROLLREG: Stata module to perform rolling regression estimation ROLLREG: Stata module to perform rolling regression estimation
  • ROLLSTAT: Stata module to compute rolling-window statistics for time series or panel data ROLLSTAT: Stata module to compute rolling-window statistics for time series or panel data
  • ROMAN: Stata module for handling Roman numerals and decimal equivalents ROMAN: Stata module for handling Roman numerals and decimal equivalents
  • ROMANTOARABIC: Stata module for converting roman numerals to arabic numbers ROMANTOARABIC: Stata module for converting roman numerals to arabic numbers
  • RORI: Stata module for estimation of selection bias through relative odds ratio (ROR) with large sample confidence interval RORI: Stata module for estimation of selection bias through relative odds ratio (ROR) with large sample confidence interval
  • ROS: Stata module for estimation of regression order statistics ROS: Stata module for estimation of regression order statistics
  • ROSALI: Stata module to detect of response shift at item-level between two times of measurement ROSALI: Stata module to detect of response shift at item-level between two times of measurement
  • ROSNER: Stata module implementing Rosner’s generalized extreme studentized deviate (ESD) procedure to detect multiple outliers ROSNER: Stata module implementing Rosner’s generalized extreme studentized deviate (ESD) procedure to detect multiple outliers
  • ROTATE2: Stata module to produce sorted and labeled rotated matrix ROTATE2: Stata module to produce sorted and labeled rotated matrix
  • ROWMAT_UTILS: Stata module to perform parallel computation on sequences of matrices in Mata ROWMAT_UTILS: Stata module to perform parallel computation on sequences of matrices in Mata
  • ROWRANKS: Stata module to create row ranks of a set of variables ROWRANKS: Stata module to create row ranks of a set of variables
  • ROWSORT: Stata module to row sort a set of integer variables ROWSORT: Stata module to row sort a set of integer variables
  • ROWSUM: Stata module for summing up values of observations and saving results to a new observation ROWSUM: Stata module for summing up values of observations and saving results to a new observation

  • RPME: Stata module to compute Robust Pareto midpoint estimator RPME: Stata module to compute Robust Pareto midpoint estimator

  • RQRS: Stata module to install required community-contributed packages RQRS: Stata module to install required community-contributed packages
  • RRCALC: Stata module to calculate AAPOR compliant response rates RRCALC: Stata module to calculate AAPOR compliant response rates
  • RRGQTEST: RATS procedure to compute a Goldfeld-Quandt test on recursive residuals RRGQTEST: RATS procedure to compute a Goldfeld-Quandt test on recursive residuals

  • RRP: Stata module to compute Rescaled Regression Prediction (RRP) using two samples RRP: Stata module to compute Rescaled Regression Prediction (RRP) using two samples
  • RRR: Stata module to perform Reduced rank regression RRR: Stata module to perform Reduced rank regression
  • RRREG: Stata module to estimate linear probability model for randomized response data RRREG: Stata module to estimate linear probability model for randomized response data
  • RSCORE: Stata module for estimation of responsiveness scores RSCORE: Stata module for estimation of responsiveness scores
  • RSCRIPT: Stata module to call an R script from Stata RSCRIPT: Stata module to call an R script from Stata
  • RSENS: Stata module to perform sensitivity analysis after matching with multiple nearest neighbours RSENS: Stata module to perform sensitivity analysis after matching with multiple nearest neighbours
  • RSGT: Stata module to generate skewed generalized t random numbers RSGT: Stata module to generate skewed generalized t random numbers
  • RSOORT: Stata module to perform Oort’s Structural Equations Modeling (SEM) based procedure to detect Response Shift RSOORT: Stata module to perform Oort’s Structural Equations Modeling (SEM) based procedure to detect Response Shift
  • RSORT: Stata module to perform reproducible random sorting of dataset RSORT: Stata module to perform reproducible random sorting of dataset
  • RSOURCE: Stata module to run R from inside Stata using an R source file RSOURCE: Stata module to run R from inside Stata using an R source file
  • RSPEEDINDEX: Stata module to compute a response speed index and perform outlier identification RSPEEDINDEX: Stata module to compute a response speed index and perform outlier identification
  • RSSTATISTIC: RATS procedure to compute R/S Statistic (classical or Lo’s modified) RSSTATISTIC: RATS procedure to compute R/S Statistic (classical or Lo’s modified)
  • RSZ: Stata module to draw a stratified simple random sample, a systematic sample, or a randomly split zones sample, with probabilities proportional to size RSZ: Stata module to draw a stratified simple random sample, a systematic sample, or a randomly split zones sample, with probabilities proportional to size
  • RTFUTIL: Stata module to provide utilities for writing Rich Text Format (RTF) files RTFUTIL: Stata module to provide utilities for writing Rich Text Format (RTF) files
  • RTMCI: Stata module to estimate regression to the mean effects with confidence intervals RTMCI: Stata module to estimate regression to the mean effects with confidence intervals
  • RTNORM: Stata Mata module to produce truncated normal pseudorandom variates RTNORM: Stata Mata module to produce truncated normal pseudorandom variates
  • RUNBY: Stata module to run a user’s program on by-groups of observations RUNBY: Stata module to run a user’s program on by-groups of observations
  • RUNMIXREGLS: Stata module to run the MIXREGLS software from within Stata RUNMIXREGLS: Stata module to run the MIXREGLS software from within Stata
  • RUNMLWIN: Stata module to run the MLwiN multilevel modelling software from within Stata RUNMLWIN: Stata module to run the MLwiN multilevel modelling software from within Stata
  • RUNMPLUS: Stata module to run Mplus from Stata RUNMPLUS: Stata module to run Mplus from Stata
  • RUNNING: Stata module for symmetric nearest neighbour smoothing RUNNING: Stata module for symmetric nearest neighbour smoothing
  • RUNNINGPROD: Stata Mata module to obtain the running product of a vector RUNNINGPROD: Stata Mata module to obtain the running product of a vector
  • RUNPARSCALE: Stata module to run PARSCALE from Stata RUNPARSCALE: Stata module to run PARSCALE from Stata
  • RUNTEST: RATS procedure to compute a run test for a two-state series RUNTEST: RATS procedure to compute a run test for a two-state series
  • RUSS_STATA: Stata tutorial in Russian RUSS_STATA: Stata tutorial in Russian
  • RWG: Stata module to compute within group interrater reliability RWG: Stata module to compute within group interrater reliability
  • RWOLF2: Stata module to calculate Romano-Wolf stepdown p-values for multiple hypothesis testing RWOLF2: Stata module to calculate Romano-Wolf stepdown p-values for multiple hypothesis testing
  • RWOLF: Stata module to calculate Romano-Wolf stepdown p-values for multiple hypothesis testing RWOLF: Stata module to calculate Romano-Wolf stepdown p-values for multiple hypothesis testing

S

  • SADI: Stata module to compute Sequence Analysis Distance Measures SADI: Stata module to compute Sequence Analysis Distance Measures
  • SAE: Stata module to provide commands and mata functions devoted to unit level small area estimation SAE: Stata module to provide commands and mata functions devoted to unit level small area estimation
  • SAFEDROP: Stata module to drop variables if and only if varnames specified in full SAFEDROP: Stata module to drop variables if and only if varnames specified in full
  • SAMPICC: Stata module to compute sample size for an intra-class correlation (ICC) SAMPICC: Stata module to compute sample size for an intra-class correlation (ICC)
  • SAMPLEPPS: Stata module to draw a random sample with probabilities proportional to size SAMPLEPPS: Stata module to draw a random sample with probabilities proportional to size
  • SAMPLESIZE: Stata module to execute sampsi multiple times and produce a graph SAMPLESIZE: Stata module to execute sampsi multiple times and produce a graph
  • SAMPSI_FLEMING: Stata module to compute exact sample size calculation for single-stage designs SAMPSI_FLEMING: Stata module to compute exact sample size calculation for single-stage designs
  • SAMPSI_GEHAN: Stata module to give the parameters of the single stage Gehan design SAMPSI_GEHAN: Stata module to give the parameters of the single stage Gehan design
  • SAMPSI_MCC: Stata module to calculate Sample Size or Power for Matched Case-Control Studies SAMPSI_MCC: Stata module to calculate Sample Size or Power for Matched Case-Control Studies
  • SAMPSI_REG: Stata module to calculate the sample size/power for linear regression SAMPSI_REG: Stata module to calculate the sample size/power for linear regression
  • SAMPSI_RHO: Stata module to compute sample size for a Pearson correlation SAMPSI_RHO: Stata module to compute sample size for a Pearson correlation
  • SAMPSI_SCCS: Stata module to calculate the sample size for self controlled case series study designs SAMPSI_SCCS: Stata module to calculate the sample size for self controlled case series study designs
  • SANKEY: Stata module for Sankey diagrams SANKEY: Stata module for Sankey diagrams
  • SANKEYPLOT: Stata module to produce Sankey diagramms SANKEYPLOT: Stata module to produce Sankey diagramms
  • SANKEY_PLOT: Stata module to produce Sankey plots SANKEY_PLOT: Stata module to produce Sankey plots
  • SASWRAPPER: Stata module to run a SAS program from within Stata SASWRAPPER: Stata module to run a SAS program from within Stata
  • **SAVAS: c-shell script for *nix which makes Stata versions of SAS data files SAVAS: c-shell script for *nix which makes Stata versions of SAS data files**
  • SAVASAS: Stata module to save your dataset as a SAS dataset SAVASAS: Stata module to save your dataset as a SAS dataset
  • SAVASTATA: SAS macro to save a SAS dataset as a Stata dataset SAVASTATA: SAS macro to save a SAS dataset as a Stata dataset
  • SAVE12: Stata module to save data in version 12 format SAVE12: Stata module to save data in version 12 format
  • SAVE13: Stata module to save data in version 13 format SAVE13: Stata module to save data in version 13 format
  • SAVE9: Stata module to save dataset in Stata 9 format SAVE9: Stata module to save dataset in Stata 9 format
  • SAVEASCII: Stata module to provide wrapper for saveold, incorporating translation of unicode characters to extended ASCII encodings SAVEASCII: Stata module to provide wrapper for saveold, incorporating translation of unicode characters to extended ASCII encodings
  • SAVERESULTS: Stata module to save output from a command in a file on disk SAVERESULTS: Stata module to save output from a command in a file on disk
  • SAVESOME: Stata module to save subset of data SAVESOME: Stata module to save subset of data
  • SAVESPSS: Stata module to save data to SPSS (.sav) system file SAVESPSS: Stata module to save data to SPSS (.sav) system file
  • SBBQ: Stata module to implement the Harding and Pagan (2002) business cycle dating algorithm SBBQ: Stata module to implement the Harding and Pagan (2002) business cycle dating algorithm
  • SBLDO: Stata module to access Stata do-files of songbl command SBLDO: Stata module to access Stata do-files of songbl command
  • SBLSF: Stata module to easily browse and access the posts of The Stata Forum SBLSF: Stata module to easily browse and access the posts of The Stata Forum
  • SBMEFF: Stata module to estimate slack-based measure efficiency of decision-making units SBMEFF: Stata module to estimate slack-based measure efficiency of decision-making units
  • SBPLOT5: Stata module to generate scatter plot with one y variable shown by vertical bars SBPLOT5: Stata module to generate scatter plot with one y variable shown by vertical bars
  • SBPLOT: Stata module to generate scatter plot with one y variable shown by vertical bars SBPLOT: Stata module to generate scatter plot with one y variable shown by vertical bars
  • SBRI: Stata module to calculate the Spearman-Brown reliability SBRI: Stata module to calculate the Spearman-Brown reliability
  • SBROWNI: Stata module to calculate Spearman-Brown reliability correction for test length SBROWNI: Stata module to calculate Spearman-Brown reliability correction for test length
  • SCALE_TRANSFORMATION: Stata module to find a 6th-degree monotonic polynomial transformation for a test score scale SCALE_TRANSFORMATION: Stata module to find a 6th-degree monotonic polynomial transformation for a test score scale
  • SCANDATA: Stata module to scan a dataset for specified characteristics SCANDATA: Stata module to scan a dataset for specified characteristics
  • SCAT3: Stata module for crude three-dimensional graphics SCAT3: Stata module for crude three-dimensional graphics
  • SCATTER3D: Stata module to create 3D scatter plots for the web, using HTML5 3D feature and java api developped by CanvasXpress SCATTER3D: Stata module to create 3D scatter plots for the web, using HTML5 3D feature and java api developped by CanvasXpress
  • SCATTERFIT: Stata module to produce scatter plots with fit lines SCATTERFIT: Stata module to produce scatter plots with fit lines
  • SCCSDTA: Stata module to generate a dataset for the self-controlled case series method (SCCS) SCCSDTA: Stata module to generate a dataset for the self-controlled case series method (SCCS)
  • SCDENSITY: Stata module to perform univariate self-consistent density estimation SCDENSITY: Stata module to perform univariate self-consistent density estimation
  • SCENREG: Stata module for estimating effects in models for binary variables given a scenario concerning unobserved variables SCENREG: Stata module for estimating effects in models for binary variables given a scenario concerning unobserved variables
  • SCENTTEST: Stata module to compute scenario arithmetic means and their difference SCENTTEST: Stata module to compute scenario arithmetic means and their difference
  • SCFCOMBO: Stata module to estimate errors using the Survey of Consumer Finances SCFCOMBO: Stata module to estimate errors using the Survey of Consumer Finances
  • SCHEME-BURD: Stata module to provide a ColorBrewer-inspired graphics scheme with qualitative and blue-to-red diverging colors SCHEME-BURD: Stata module to provide a ColorBrewer-inspired graphics scheme with qualitative and blue-to-red diverging colors
  • SCHEME-MRC: Stata module to provide graphics scheme for UK Medical Research Council SCHEME-MRC: Stata module to provide graphics scheme for UK Medical Research Council

  • STACKREG: Stata module to perform stacked linear regression analysis to facilitate testing of multiple hypotheses STACKREG: Stata module to perform stacked linear regression analysis to facilitate testing of multiple hypotheses
