  • STRBEE: Stata module to estimate a treatment effect adjusting for treatment switches STRBEE: Stata module to estimate a treatment effect adjusting for treatment switches
  • STRCS: Stata module to estimate flexible parametric survival models on the log hazard scale STRCS: Stata module to estimate flexible parametric survival models on the log hazard scale
  • STRDATE: Stata module to replace string date variables with numeric date variables with the same names STRDATE: Stata module to replace string date variables with numeric date variables with the same names
  • STRDIST: Stata module to calculate the Levenshtein distance, or edit distance, between strings STRDIST: Stata module to calculate the Levenshtein distance, or edit distance, between strings
  • STREAMPLOT: Stata module to produce streamplots STREAMPLOT: Stata module to produce streamplots
  • STRGEN: Stata module to generate string variables without knowing string type STRGEN: Stata module to generate string variables without knowing string type
  • STRGROUP: Stata module to match strings based on their Levenshtein edit distance STRGROUP: Stata module to match strings based on their Levenshtein edit distance
  • STRIPPLOT: Stata module for strip plots (one-way dot plots) STRIPPLOT: Stata module for strip plots (one-way dot plots)
  • STRKEEP: Stata module to clean string variables by keeping only whitelisted characters STRKEEP: Stata module to clean string variables by keeping only whitelisted characters
  • STRMST2: Stata module to compare restricted mean survival time STRMST2: Stata module to compare restricted mean survival time
  • STRPARSE: Stata module to parse string variables STRPARSE: Stata module to parse string variables
  • STRREC: Stata module to recode string variables according to rules STRREC: Stata module to recode string variables according to rules

  • STSURVIMPUTE: Stata module for flexible imputation of censored survival data STSURVIMPUTE: Stata module for flexible imputation of censored survival data

  • STUDYSI: Stata module to calculates sample size and power for comparative studies STUDYSI: Stata module to calculates sample size and power for comparative studies
  • STUTE_TEST: Stata module to compute Stute (1997) linearity test STUTE_TEST: Stata module to compute Stute (1997) linearity test

  • SVVARLBL: Stata module to save variable labels to a file SVVARLBL: Stata module to save variable labels to a file

  • SVYPXCON: Stata module to calculate predicted means or proportions for a continuous X variable for survey data SVYPXCON: Stata module to calculate predicted means or proportions for a continuous X variable for survey data

  • SVYSD: Stata module to compute pooled standard deviation weighted by within-group sample size SVYSD: Stata module to compute pooled standard deviation weighted by within-group sample size
  • SVYSELMLOG: Stata module to compute selectivity adjustment based on the multinomial logit for survey design SVYSELMLOG: Stata module to compute selectivity adjustment based on the multinomial logit for survey design

  • SWBOOT: Stata module to bootstrap stepwise linear or logistic regression models SWBOOT: Stata module to bootstrap stepwise linear or logistic regression models

  • SWINDEX: Stata module to create a standardized weighted index of multiple indicator variables SWINDEX: Stata module to create a standardized weighted index of multiple indicator variables
  • SWITCH: Stata module to evaluate a given value against possible cases and their corresponding values SWITCH: Stata module to evaluate a given value against possible cases and their corresponding values

  • SXPOSE: Stata module to transpose string variable dataset SXPOSE: Stata module to transpose string variable dataset

  • TRNBIN0: Stata module to estimate zero-truncated negative binomial regression TRNBIN0: Stata module to estimate zero-truncated negative binomial regression
  • TRUECRYPT: Stata module to mount or dismount TrueCrypt volumes TRUECRYPT: Stata module to mount or dismount TrueCrypt volumes
  • TRUERND: Stata module to generate true random numbers TRUERND: Stata module to generate true random numbers
  • TRY: Stata module to call a Stata command repeatedly until it succeeds TRY: Stata module to call a Stata command repeatedly until it succeeds
  • TRYEM: Stata module to run all possible subset regressions TRYEM: Stata module to run all possible subset regressions
  • TSAYNLTEST: RATS procedure to perform Tsay test for neglected non-linearities TSAYNLTEST: RATS procedure to perform Tsay test for neglected non-linearities
  • TSAYTEST: RATS procedure to perform Tsay arranged regression test for threshold autoregression (TAR) TSAYTEST: RATS procedure to perform Tsay arranged regression test for threshold autoregression (TAR)
  • TSCB: Stata module to implement the two-stage cluster bootstrap estimator TSCB: Stata module to implement the two-stage cluster bootstrap estimator
  • TSCOLLAP: Stata module to compact timeseries into dataset of means, sums, end-of-period values TSCOLLAP: Stata module to compact timeseries into dataset of means, sums, end-of-period values
  • TSECCTEST: RATS procedure to perform Tse test for constant correlation in MV-GARCH model TSECCTEST: RATS procedure to perform Tse test for constant correlation in MV-GARCH model
  • TSEGEN: Stata module to call an egen function using a time-series varlist TSEGEN: Stata module to call an egen function using a time-series varlist
  • TSGRAPH: Stata module to produce time series line graph TSGRAPH: Stata module to produce time series line graph
  • TSLIST: Stata module to list time series data TSLIST: Stata module to list time series data
  • TSLSTARMOD: Stata module to estimate a Logistic Smooth Transition Autoregressive Regression (LSTAR) Model for Time Series Data TSLSTARMOD: Stata module to estimate a Logistic Smooth Transition Autoregressive Regression (LSTAR) Model for Time Series Data
  • TSMKTIM: Stata module to generate time-series calendar variable TSMKTIM: Stata module to generate time-series calendar variable
  • TSPLOT: Stata module to produce a time series plot TSPLOT: Stata module to produce a time series plot
  • TSSPELL: Stata module for identification of spells or runs in time series TSSPELL: Stata module for identification of spells or runs in time series
  • TSTF: Stata module to compute intervention time-series models TSTF: Stata module to compute intervention time-series models
  • TTAB: Stata module to produce formatted tables with t-test for two-groups mean-comparison TTAB: Stata module to produce formatted tables with t-test for two-groups mean-comparison
  • TTABLE2: Stata module to produce Mean Comparison for many variables between two groups with formatted table output TTABLE2: Stata module to produce Mean Comparison for many variables between two groups with formatted table output
  • TTABLE3: Stata module to perform Mean or Median Comparison TTABLE3: Stata module to perform Mean or Median Comparison
  • TTEIR: Stata module to prepare time-to-event data for incidence rates TTEIR: Stata module to prepare time-to-event data for incidence rates
  • TTESTEX: Stata module to perform t-tests and export the results to excel for multiple dependent and by multiple binary variables/across sub-samples TTESTEX: Stata module to perform t-tests and export the results to excel for multiple dependent and by multiple binary variables/across sub-samples
  • TTESTPLUS: Stata module to automate t-tests TTESTPLUS: Stata module to automate t-tests
  • TTESTTABLE: Stata module to compute differences in means by groups including the T-test TTESTTABLE: Stata module to compute differences in means by groups including the T-test
  • TUPLES: Stata module for selecting all possible tuples from a list TUPLES: Stata module for selecting all possible tuples from a list
  • TURNBULL: Stata module to estimate the Turnbull empirical distribution estimator of willingness to pay TURNBULL: Stata module to estimate the Turnbull empirical distribution estimator of willingness to pay
  • TVDIFF: Stata module to compute pre- and post-treatment estimation of the Average Treatment Effect (ATE) with binary time-varying treatment TVDIFF: Stata module to compute pre- and post-treatment estimation of the Average Treatment Effect (ATE) with binary time-varying treatment
  • TVGC: Stata module to perform Time-Varying Granger Causality tests TVGC: Stata module to perform Time-Varying Granger Causality tests
  • TW3XLS: Stata module to export publication-ready three-way and four-way tables into xls or xlsx TW3XLS: Stata module to export publication-ready three-way and four-way tables into xls or xlsx
  • TWBY: Stata module to create a cross-tabulation of graphs TWBY: Stata module to create a cross-tabulation of graphs
  • TWEXP: Stata module to estimate exponential-regression models with two-way fixed effects TWEXP: Stata module to estimate exponential-regression models with two-way fixed effects
  • TWFE: Stata module to perform regressions with two-way fixed effects or match effects for large datasets TWFE: Stata module to perform regressions with two-way fixed effects or match effects for large datasets
  • TWFEM: Stata module to efficiently estimate a two-way fixed effects model based on Somaini and Wolak (2015) TWFEM: Stata module to efficiently estimate a two-way fixed effects model based on Somaini and Wolak (2015)
  • TWGRAVITY: Stata module to estimate exponential-regression models with two-way fixed effects from a cross-section of data on dyadic interactions TWGRAVITY: Stata module to estimate exponential-regression models with two-way fixed effects from a cross-section of data on dyadic interactions
  • TWITTER2STATA: Stata module to import data from Twitter TWITTER2STATA: Stata module to import data from Twitter
  • TWOFOLD: Stata module to perform multiple imputation using the two-fold fully conditional specification algorithm to impute missing values in longitudinal data TWOFOLD: Stata module to perform multiple imputation using the two-fold fully conditional specification algorithm to impute missing values in longitudinal data
  • TWOPM: Stata module to estimate two-part models TWOPM: Stata module to estimate two-part models
  • TWOSTEP: Stata module to perform twostep multilevel analysis TWOSTEP: Stata module to perform twostep multilevel analysis
  • TWOSTEPWEAKIV: Stata module to implement two-step weak-instrument-robust confidence sets for linear instrumental-variable (IV) models TWOSTEPWEAKIV: Stata module to implement two-step weak-instrument-robust confidence sets for linear instrumental-variable (IV) models
  • TWOWAYFEWEIGHTS: Stata module to estimate the weights and measure of robustness to treatment effect heterogeneity attached to two-way fixed effects regressions TWOWAYFEWEIGHTS: Stata module to estimate the weights and measure of robustness to treatment effect heterogeneity attached to two-way fixed effects regressions
  • TWOWAY_ESTFIT: Stata module to enable graph twoway estfit TWOWAY_ESTFIT: Stata module to enable graph twoway estfit
  • TWOWAY_PAREA: Stata module to generate area graph with pattern fills (Windows only) TWOWAY_PAREA: Stata module to generate area graph with pattern fills (Windows only)
  • **TWOWAY__WHISTOGRAM_GEN: Stata module for generating histogram variables using aweights or iweights TWOWAY__WHISTOGRAM_GEN: Stata module for generating histogram variables using aweights or iweights**
  • TXT2QR: Stata module to produce QR codes containing plain text TXT2QR: Stata module to produce QR codes containing plain text
  • TXTLABDEF: Stata module to define value labels from ASCII (text) file TXTLABDEF: Stata module to define value labels from ASCII (text) file
  • TXTTOOL: Stata module providing utilities for text analysis TXTTOOL: Stata module providing utilities for text analysis

U

  • UA: Stata module to provide prefix command for unicode utilities UA: Stata module to provide prefix command for unicode utilities
  • UCGOF: Stata module to perform univariate categorical goodness-of-fit tests UCGOF: Stata module to perform univariate categorical goodness-of-fit tests

  • UHLIGFUNCS: RATS procedure to compute criteria for Uhlig sign-restricted shocks UHLIGFUNCS: RATS procedure to compute criteria for Uhlig sign-restricted shocks
  • UIRT: Stata module to fit unidimensional Item Response Theory models UIRT: Stata module to fit unidimensional Item Response Theory models
  • UIRT_SIM: Stata module to simulate data from unidimensional Item Response Theory models UIRT_SIM: Stata module to simulate data from unidimensional Item Response Theory models

  • UNDERID: Stata module producing postestimation tests of under- and over-identification after linear IV estimation UNDERID: Stata module producing postestimation tests of under- and over-identification after linear IV estimation
  • UNEMP: Stata module module to compute aggregate households employment deprivation (or unemployment) measures UNEMP: Stata module module to compute aggregate households employment deprivation (or unemployment) measures
  • UNICODE2ASCII: Stata modules to translate between Unicode and ASCII UNICODE2ASCII: Stata modules to translate between Unicode and ASCII
  • UNIFORMPARMS: RATS procedure to compute required parameters for uniform distribution UNIFORMPARMS: RATS procedure to compute required parameters for uniform distribution
  • UNIQUE: Stata module to report number of unique values in variable(s) UNIQUE: Stata module to report number of unique values in variable(s)
  • UNIQUESTRATA: Stata module to abort the program if the specified variables don’t collectively account for every observation UNIQUESTRATA: Stata module to abort the program if the specified variables don’t collectively account for every observation
  • UNIQUEVALUES: RATS procedure to extract unique values from a series UNIQUEVALUES: RATS procedure to extract unique values from a series
  • UNITAB: Stata program to display a univariate table for a binary outcome variable UNITAB: Stata program to display a univariate table for a binary outcome variable
  • UNITROOT: MATLAB module to calculate (Augmented) Dickey-Fuller and Phillips-Perron tests UNITROOT: MATLAB module to calculate (Augmented) Dickey-Fuller and Phillips-Perron tests
  • UNIVSTAT: Stata module to produce summary statistics in matrix form UNIVSTAT: Stata module to produce summary statistics in matrix form
  • UPSETPLOT: Stata module to show Euler or Venn diagrams mapped to bar charts, upsetplot style UPSETPLOT: Stata module to show Euler or Venn diagrams mapped to bar charts, upsetplot style
  • URCOVAR: Stata module to perform Elliott-Jansson test for unit roots with stationary covariates URCOVAR: Stata module to perform Elliott-Jansson test for unit roots with stationary covariates
  • USAGELOG: Stata module to log usage of Stata programs in an existing text file USAGELOG: Stata module to log usage of Stata programs in an existing text file
  • USD: Stata module to get US dollar exchange rates from the Federal Reserve USD: Stata module to get US dollar exchange rates from the Federal Reserve
  • USE10: Stata module to use and describe version 10 datafiles in Stata 9.2 USE10: Stata module to use and describe version 10 datafiles in Stata 9.2
  • USE10SAVE9: Stata module to save matched Stata 10/11 files, from within Stata 9+, in Stata 9 format - either as new files in an automatically created directory or through replacing previous Stata 10/11 files USE10SAVE9: Stata module to save matched Stata 10/11 files, from within Stata 9+, in Stata 9 format - either as new files in an automatically created directory or through replacing previous Stata 10/11 files

  • USE13SAVE12: Stata module to load sets of matched Stata 13-files into Stata 10-12 and saving them in older formats readable for the Stata 10-12 user USE13SAVE12: Stata module to load sets of matched Stata 13-files into Stata 10-12 and saving them in older formats readable for the Stata 10-12 user
  • USELAB: Stata module to list value labels and variables using them USELAB: Stata module to list value labels and variables using them
  • USEOLD: Stata module to provide a convenient wrapper for unicode translate in Stata 14+ USEOLD: Stata module to provide a convenient wrapper for unicode translate in Stata 14+
  • USEPACKAGE: Stata module to find and install a list of user-written packages needed to run a do-file USEPACKAGE: Stata module to find and install a list of user-written packages needed to run a do-file
  • USESAS: Stata module to use a SAS dataset USESAS: Stata module to use a SAS dataset
  • USESOME: Stata module to use subset of Stata dataset USESOME: Stata module to use subset of Stata dataset
  • **USESPSS: Stata module to import SPSS (*.sav) data (Windows only) USESPSS: Stata module to import SPSS (*.sav) data (Windows only)**
  • USEXMLEX: Stata module to import data stored in XML format USEXMLEX: Stata module to import data stored in XML format

  • USMAPS: Stata module to provide US state map coordinates for tmap USMAPS: Stata module to provide US state map coordinates for tmap
  • USORT: Stata module to perform locale-based ascending and descending sort that supports conditional statements, observation ranges, and user-defined handling of substrings and missing values USORT: Stata module to perform locale-based ascending and descending sort that supports conditional statements, observation ranges, and user-defined handling of substrings and missing values
  • USOS: Stata module for computing the unweighted sum of squares test for global goodness of fit after logistic model USOS: Stata module for computing the unweighted sum of squares test for global goodness of fit after logistic model
  • USSWM: Stata module to provide US state and county spatial weight (contiguity) matrices USSWM: Stata module to provide US state and county spatial weight (contiguity) matrices
  • UTEST: Stata module to test for a U-shaped relationship UTEST: Stata module to test for a U-shaped relationship

  • VAF: Stata module to compute mediation effect in SEM VAF: Stata module to compute mediation effect in SEM

  • VARFROMDLM: RATS procedure to translate a state space representation to its implied VAR VARFROMDLM: RATS procedure to translate a state space representation to its implied VAR
  • VARIMAX: RATS procedure to perform factor rotation using varimax criterion VARIMAX: RATS procedure to perform factor rotation using varimax criterion

  • WEAVER: Stata module to produce dynamic reports in HTML, LaTeX and PDF WEAVER: Stata module to produce dynamic reports in HTML, LaTeX and PDF
  • WEBDOC: Stata module to create a HTML or Markdown document including Stata output WEBDOC: Stata module to create a HTML or Markdown document including Stata output
  • WEBIMAGE: Stata module to print images from web files in pdf, png, jpeg, gif, and bmp format WEBIMAGE: Stata module to print images from web files in pdf, png, jpeg, gif, and bmp format
  • WEEKLYCLAIMS: Stata module to Get Weekly Initial Jobless Claims from the US Dept. of Labor WEEKLYCLAIMS: Stata module to Get Weekly Initial Jobless Claims from the US Dept. of Labor
  • WEIBULLFIT: Stata module to fit a two-parameter Weibull distribution WEIBULLFIT: Stata module to fit a two-parameter Weibull distribution

  • WESTCHOTEST: RATS procedure to perform Heteroscedasticity-robust serial correlation test WESTCHOTEST: RATS procedure to perform Heteroscedasticity-robust serial correlation test
  • WGTDISTRIM: Stata module for trimming extreme sampling weights WGTDISTRIM: Stata module for trimming extreme sampling weights
  • WGTTEST: Stata module to test the impact of sampling weights in regression analysis WGTTEST: Stata module to test the impact of sampling weights in regression analysis
  • WHEREIS: Stata module to keep track of ancillary programs and files WHEREIS: Stata module to keep track of ancillary programs and files
  • WHICHLIST: Stata module to input list of package file items and output lists of present and absent items WHICHLIST: Stata module to input list of package file items and output lists of present and absent items
  • WHICHPKG: Stata module to display information on components of a Stata package WHICHPKG: Stata module to display information on components of a Stata package
  • WHICH_VERSION: Stata module to return location and programmer’s version of ado-files WHICH_VERSION: Stata module to return location and programmer’s version of ado-files
  • WHITETST: Stata module to perform White’s test for heteroskedasticity WHITETST: Stata module to perform White’s test for heteroskedasticity
  • WHITTLE: Stata module to compute long-memory parameter via Whittle method WHITTLE: Stata module to compute long-memory parameter via Whittle method
  • WHOTDECK: Stata module to perform multiple imputation using the Approximate Bayesian Bootstrap with weights WHOTDECK: Stata module to perform multiple imputation using the Approximate Bayesian Bootstrap with weights
  • WID: Stata module to download data from the World Inequality Database (WID.world) WID: Stata module to download data from the World Inequality Database (WID.world)
  • WILLIAMS: Stata module to estimate logistic regression via Williams procedure WILLIAMS: Stata module to estimate logistic regression via Williams procedure
  • WINDOWSMONITOR: Stata module to send a winexec command to a Windows operating system and display the output in the Stata results window in (almost) real time WINDOWSMONITOR: Stata module to send a winexec command to a Windows operating system and display the output in the Stata results window in (almost) real time
  • WINRATIOTEST: Stata module to calculate the unmatched Win Ratio for prioritised outcomes WINRATIOTEST: Stata module to calculate the unmatched Win Ratio for prioritised outcomes
  • WINSOR2: Stata module to winsorize data WINSOR2: Stata module to winsorize data
  • WINSOR4: Stata module to winsorize a variable based on outliers defined by either percentiles or interquartile range WINSOR4: Stata module to winsorize a variable based on outliers defined by either percentiles or interquartile range
  • WINSOR: Stata module to Winsorize a variable WINSOR: Stata module to Winsorize a variable
  • WITCH: Stata module to mystically manage files on adopath WITCH: Stata module to mystically manage files on adopath
  • WNTSTMVQ: Stata module to compute multivariate Ljung-Box Q test WNTSTMVQ: Stata module to compute multivariate Ljung-Box Q test
  • WOOLDID: Stata module to estimate Difference-in-Differences Treatment Effects with Staggered Treatment Onset Using Heterogeneity-Robust Two-Way Fixed Effects Regressions WOOLDID: Stata module to estimate Difference-in-Differences Treatment Effects with Staggered Treatment Onset Using Heterogeneity-Robust Two-Way Fixed Effects Regressions
  • WORDCB: Stata module to create a codebook in MS Word format WORDCB: Stata module to create a codebook in MS Word format
  • WORDCLOUD: Stata module for drawing word cloud figure based on echarts developed by Baidu WORDCLOUD: Stata module for drawing word cloud figure based on echarts developed by Baidu
  • WORDCONVERT: Stata module to transfer files among several types in Windows WORDCONVERT: Stata module to transfer files among several types in Windows
  • WORDY: Stata module to play a silly word game and show your guesses on a Stata graph WORDY: Stata module to play a silly word game and show your guesses on a Stata graph
  • WORKDAYS: Stata module to compute elapsed workdays WORKDAYS: Stata module to compute elapsed workdays
  • WORLDSTAT: Stata module to produce a visualisation of the state of world development WORLDSTAT: Stata module to produce a visualisation of the state of world development
  • WOSADDRESS: Stata module to convert datasets from Web of Science data from wide to long WOSADDRESS: Stata module to convert datasets from Web of Science data from wide to long
  • WOSLOAD: Stata module to load datasets from Web of Science data WOSLOAD: Stata module to load datasets from Web of Science data
  • WRIDIT: Stata module to generate weighted ridits WRIDIT: Stata module to generate weighted ridits
  • WRITEINPUT: Stata module to write dataset in memory to new do-file as an input command WRITEINPUT: Stata module to write dataset in memory to new do-file as an input command
  • WRITEKML: Stata module to write Keyhole Markup Language file WRITEKML: Stata module to write Keyhole Markup Language file
  • WRITEPSFRAG: Stata module to translate Stata text to EPS WRITEPSFRAG: Stata module to translate Stata text to EPS
  • WSCV: Stata module to compute the within-subject coefficient of variation WSCV: Stata module to compute the within-subject coefficient of variation
  • WTD: Stata module to produce analysis of waiting time distribution WTD: Stata module to produce analysis of waiting time distribution
  • WTDTTT: Stata module to estimate parameters of the ordinary and reverse Waiting Time Distribution (WTD) by maximum likelihood WTDTTT: Stata module to estimate parameters of the ordinary and reverse Waiting Time Distribution (WTD) by maximum likelihood
  • WTD_PERC: Stata module to calculate percentile of inter-arrival density based on the parametric Waiting Time Distribution (WTD) WTD_PERC: Stata module to calculate percentile of inter-arrival density based on the parametric Waiting Time Distribution (WTD)
  • WTP: Stata module to estimate confidence intervals for willingness to pay measures WTP: Stata module to estimate confidence intervals for willingness to pay measures
  • WTPCIKR: Stata module to estimate Krinsky and Robb Confidence Intervals for Mean and Median Willingness to Pay WTPCIKR: Stata module to estimate Krinsky and Robb Confidence Intervals for Mean and Median Willingness to Pay
  • WWWHELP: Stata module to display the help document in PDF format of the specified command via browsers WWWHELP: Stata module to display the help document in PDF format of the specified command via browsers
  • WYOUNG: Stata module to perform multiple testing corrections WYOUNG: Stata module to perform multiple testing corrections

X

  • XAUTO: Stata module to input an extended version of the auto data XAUTO: Stata module to input an extended version of the auto data
  • XB2PI: Stata module to transform the logit scores into probabilities XB2PI: Stata module to transform the logit scores into probabilities
  • XBALANCE: Stata module to compute standardized differences for stratified comparisons via R XBALANCE: Stata module to compute standardized differences for stratified comparisons via R
  • XBRCSPLINE: Stata module to tabulate differences in predicted responses after restricted cubic spline models XBRCSPLINE: Stata module to tabulate differences in predicted responses after restricted cubic spline models
  • XCOLLAPSE: Stata module to make data set of summary statistics on disk or in memory XCOLLAPSE: Stata module to make data set of summary statistics on disk or in memory
  • XCONTRACT: Stata module to make a data set of frequencies and percents on disk or in memory XCONTRACT: Stata module to make a data set of frequencies and percents on disk or in memory
  • XCORPLOT: Stata module to calculate and graph cross-correlation function XCORPLOT: Stata module to calculate and graph cross-correlation function
  • XDATELIST: Stata module to create ascending numeric lists of dates XDATELIST: Stata module to create ascending numeric lists of dates
  • XDIR: Stata module to create a resultsset with one observation per file in a directory XDIR: Stata module to create a resultsset with one observation per file in a directory
  • XFRAC: Stata module to produce tabulation using categories defined by fractions of a cut-off value XFRAC: Stata module to produce tabulation using categories defined by fractions of a cut-off value
  • XFRAMEAPPEND: Stata module to append data frames to the end of the current data frame XFRAMEAPPEND: Stata module to append data frames to the end of the current data frame
  • XGLM: Stata module to extend glm XGLM: Stata module to extend glm
  • XGROUP: Stata module to create a grouping variable with key values in an output dataset XGROUP: Stata module to create a grouping variable with key values in an output dataset
  • XLINCOM: Stata module to estimate multiple linear combinations of parameters XLINCOM: Stata module to estimate multiple linear combinations of parameters
  • XLINK: Stata module to provide extra link functions for use with glm XLINK: Stata module to provide extra link functions for use with glm
  • XLS2DTA: Stata module to save Excel files as Stata datasets XLS2DTA: Stata module to save Excel files as Stata datasets
  • XLS2STATA: Stata module to provide Stata Dialog Box to Import Excel Files into Stata XLS2STATA: Stata module to provide Stata Dialog Box to Import Excel Files into Stata
  • XMISS: Stata module to perform cross-tabulation of missing data XMISS: Stata module to perform cross-tabulation of missing data
  • XML_TAB: Stata module to save results in Excel XML format XML_TAB: Stata module to save results in Excel XML format
  • XPREDICT: Stata module to extend predict command XPREDICT: Stata module to extend predict command
  • XREWIDE: Stata module to extend reshape wide command XREWIDE: Stata module to extend reshape wide command
  • XRIGLS: Stata module to calculate reference intervals via generalised least squares XRIGLS: Stata module to calculate reference intervals via generalised least squares
  • XRIML: Stata module for estimation of reference intervals (‘normal ranges’) by maximum likelihood XRIML: Stata module for estimation of reference intervals (‘normal ranges’) by maximum likelihood
  • XSAMPSI: Stata module to calculate sample size for cross-over trials with continuous measures XSAMPSI: Stata module to calculate sample size for cross-over trials with continuous measures
  • XSMLE: Stata module for spatial panel data models estimation XSMLE: Stata module for spatial panel data models estimation
  • XSVMAT: Stata module to convert a matrix to variables in an output dataset XSVMAT: Stata module to convert a matrix to variables in an output dataset
  • XT2TREATMENTS: Stata module to estimate event studies with two treatments XT2TREATMENTS: Stata module to estimate event studies with two treatments
  • XTAB: Stata module to tabulate longitudinal data XTAB: Stata module to tabulate longitudinal data
  • XTABLE: Stata module for exporting table output to Excel XTABLE: Stata module for exporting table output to Excel
  • XTABOND2: Stata module to extend xtabond dynamic panel data estimator XTABOND2: Stata module to extend xtabond dynamic panel data estimator
  • XTARIMAU: Stata module to find the best SARIMAX models in heterogeneous panels with the help of arimaauto XTARIMAU: Stata module to find the best [S]ARIMA[X] models in heterogeneous panels with the help of arimaauto
  • XTARSIM: Stata module to perform Monte Carlo analysis for dynamic panel data models XTARSIM: Stata module to perform Monte Carlo analysis for dynamic panel data models
  • XTAVPLOT: Stata module to produce added-variable plots for panel data estimation XTAVPLOT: Stata module to produce added-variable plots for panel data estimation
  • XTBALANCE2: Stata module to create a balanced subsample from unbalanced panel data XTBALANCE2: Stata module to create a balanced subsample from unbalanced panel data
  • XTBALANCE: Stata module to transform the dataset into balanced Panel Data XTBALANCE: Stata module to transform the dataset into balanced Panel Data
  • XTBCFE: Stata module to perform bootstrap-corrected Fixed Effects estimation and inference in dynamic panel models XTBCFE: Stata module to perform bootstrap-corrected Fixed Effects estimation and inference in dynamic panel models
  • XTBREAK: Stata module for detecting and dating multiple structural breaks in time series and panel data XTBREAK: Stata module for detecting and dating multiple structural breaks in time series and panel data
  • XTBUNITROOT: Stata module to perform unit root tests for panel data with structural breaks XTBUNITROOT: Stata module to perform unit root tests for panel data with structural breaks
  • XTCAEC: Stata module to estimate heterogeneous error correction models in cross-sectional dependent panel data XTCAEC: Stata module to estimate heterogeneous error correction models in cross-sectional dependent panel data
  • XTCCE: Stata module to implement the Common Correlated Effects estimator XTCCE: Stata module to implement the Common Correlated Effects estimator
  • XTCD2: Stata module to test for weak cross sectional dependence XTCD2: Stata module to test for weak cross sectional dependence
  • XTCD: Stata module to investigate Variable/Residual Cross-Section Dependence XTCD: Stata module to investigate Variable/Residual Cross-Section Dependence
  • XTCDF: Stata module to perform Pesaran’s CD-test for cross-sectional dependence in panel context XTCDF: Stata module to perform Pesaran’s CD-test for cross-sectional dependence in panel context
  • XTCENTER: Stata module to disaggregate within and between-person effects by centering variables for mixed and melogit models XTCENTER: Stata module to disaggregate within and between-person effects by centering variables for mixed and melogit models
  • XTCIPS: Stata module to compute Pesaran Panel Unit Root Test in the Presence of Cross-section Dependence XTCIPS: Stata module to compute Pesaran Panel Unit Root Test in the Presence of Cross-section Dependence
  • XTCOINTREG: Stata module for panel data generalization of cointegration regression using fully modified ordinary least squares, dynamic ordinary least squares, and canonical correlation regression methods XTCOINTREG: Stata module for panel data generalization of cointegration regression using fully modified ordinary least squares, dynamic ordinary least squares, and canonical correlation regression methods
  • XTCSD: Stata module to test for cross-sectional dependence in panel data models XTCSD: Stata module to test for cross-sectional dependence in panel data models
  • XTCSE2: Stata module to estimate the exponent of cross-sectional dependence in large panels XTCSE2: Stata module to estimate the exponent of cross-sectional dependence in large panels
  • XTCSI: Stata module to investigate Residual Cross-Section Independence XTCSI: Stata module to investigate Residual Cross-Section Independence
  • XTDCCE2: Stata module to estimate heterogeneous coefficient models using common correlated effects in a dynamic panel XTDCCE2: Stata module to estimate heterogeneous coefficient models using common correlated effects in a dynamic panel
  • XTDOLSHM: Stata module to perform panel data cointegration XTDOLSHM: Stata module to perform panel data cointegration
  • XTDPDBC: Stata module to perform bias-corrected estimation of linear dynamic panel data models XTDPDBC: Stata module to perform bias-corrected estimation of linear dynamic panel data models
  • XTDPDGMM: Stata module to perform generalized method of moments estimation of linear dynamic panel data models XTDPDGMM: Stata module to perform generalized method of moments estimation of linear dynamic panel data models
  • XTDPDML: Stata module to estimate Dynamic Panel Data Models using Maximum Likelihood XTDPDML: Stata module to estimate Dynamic Panel Data Models using Maximum Likelihood
  • XTDPDQML: Stata module to perform quasi-maximum likelihood linear dynamic panel data estimation XTDPDQML: Stata module to perform quasi-maximum likelihood linear dynamic panel data estimation
  • XTDPDSERIAL: Stata module to perform panel data serial correlation tests XTDPDSERIAL: Stata module to perform panel data serial correlation tests
  • XTENDOTHRESDPD: Stata module to estimate a Dynamic Panel Data Threshold Effects Model with Endogenous Regressors XTENDOTHRESDPD: Stata module to estimate a Dynamic Panel Data Threshold Effects Model with Endogenous Regressors
  • XTEUROSTAT: Stata module to import data from Eurostat in panel data structure XTEUROSTAT: Stata module to import data from Eurostat in panel data structure
  • XTEVENT: Stata module to estimate and visualize linear panel event-study models XTEVENT: Stata module to estimate and visualize linear panel event-study models
  • XTEWREG: Stata module to estimate errors-in-variable model with mismeasured regressors XTEWREG: Stata module to estimate errors-in-variable model with mismeasured regressors
  • XTFEIS: Stata module to estimate linear Fixed-Effects model with Individual-specific Slopes (FEIS) XTFEIS: Stata module to estimate linear Fixed-Effects model with Individual-specific Slopes (FEIS)
  • XTFISHER: Stata module to compute Fisher type unit root test for panel data XTFISHER: Stata module to compute Fisher type unit root test for panel data
  • XTFIXEDCOEFTVCU: Stata module to estimate Panel Data Models with Coefficients that Vary over Time and Cross-sectional Units XTFIXEDCOEFTVCU: Stata module to estimate Panel Data Models with Coefficients that Vary over Time and Cross-sectional Units
  • XTFMB: Stata module to execute Fama-MacBeth two-step panel regression XTFMB: Stata module to execute Fama-MacBeth two-step panel regression
  • XTGCAUSE: Stata module to test for Granger non-causality in heterogeneous panels XTGCAUSE: Stata module to test for Granger non-causality in heterogeneous panels
  • XTGEEBCV: Stata module to compute bias-corrected (small-sample) standard errors for generalized estimating equations XTGEEBCV: Stata module to compute bias-corrected (small-sample) standard errors for generalized estimating equations
  • XTGLSR: Stata module to calculate robust, or cluster-robust variance after xtgls XTGLSR: Stata module to calculate robust, or cluster-robust variance after xtgls
  • XTGPS: Stata module to estimate Hoechle, Schmid, and Zimmermann’s (2024) GPS regression model for analyzing asset returns XTGPS: Stata module to estimate Hoechle, Schmid, and Zimmermann’s (2024) GPS regression model for analyzing asset returns
  • XTGRANGERT: Stata module for improved Granger non-causality testing in heterogeneous and homogeneous panel data XTGRANGERT: Stata module for improved Granger non-causality testing in heterogeneous and homogeneous panel data
  • XTGRAPH: Stata module to produce graphs of cross-sectional time series (xt) data XTGRAPH: Stata module to produce graphs of cross-sectional time series (xt) data
  • XTHECKMANFE: Stata module to fit panel data models in the presence of endogeneity and selection XTHECKMANFE: Stata module to fit panel data models in the presence of endogeneity and selection
  • XTHRTEST: Stata module to perform Born & Breitung Bias-corrected HR-test for first order panel serial correlation XTHRTEST: Stata module to perform Born & Breitung Bias-corrected HR-test for first order panel serial correlation
  • XTHST: Stata module to test slope homogeneity in large panels XTHST: Stata module to test slope homogeneity in large panels
  • XTHYBRID: Stata module to estimate hybrid and correlated random effect (Mundlak) models within the framework of generalized linear mixed models (GLMM) XTHYBRID: Stata module to estimate hybrid and correlated random effect (Mundlak) models within the framework of generalized linear mixed models (GLMM)
  • XTIDT: Stata module to compute Identification Variables in Panel Data XTIDT: Stata module to compute Identification Variables in Panel Data
  • XTILE2: Stata module to create a new variable that categorizes exp by its quantiles XTILE2: Stata module to create a new variable that categorizes exp by its quantiles
  • XTILETEST: Stata module to test equality of percentiles across groups of observations XTILETEST: Stata module to test equality of percentiles across groups of observations
  • XTIMPORTU: Stata module to import monthly, quarterly, half-yearly or yearly time series and panel data as panelvar timevar valuevar from a supported file format to memory or a file XTIMPORTU: Stata module to import monthly, quarterly, half-yearly or yearly time series and panel data as panelvar timevar valuevar from a supported file format to memory or a file
  • XTINE: Stata module to calculate percentile and quantile for a numeric variable XTINE: Stata module to calculate percentile and quantile for a numeric variable
  • XTISTEST: Stata module to perform Portmanteau test for panel serial correlation XTISTEST: Stata module to perform Portmanteau test for panel serial correlation
  • XTITSA: Stata module for performing interrupted time-series analysis for panel data XTITSA: Stata module for performing interrupted time-series analysis for panel data
  • XTIVDFREG: Stata module to perform defactored instrumental variables estimation of large panel data models XTIVDFREG: Stata module to perform defactored instrumental variables estimation of large panel data models
  • XTIVREG28: Stata module to perform extended IV/2SLS, GMM and AC/HAC, LIML and k-class regression for panel data models (version 8) XTIVREG28: Stata module to perform extended IV/2SLS, GMM and AC/HAC, LIML and k-class regression for panel data models (version 8)
  • XTIVREG2: Stata module to perform extended IV/2SLS, GMM and AC/HAC, LIML and k-class regression for panel data models XTIVREG2: Stata module to perform extended IV/2SLS, GMM and AC/HAC, LIML and k-class regression for panel data models
  • XTKR: Stata module to implement the Keane and Runkle estimator for dynamic panel data models XTKR: Stata module to implement the Keane and Runkle estimator for dynamic panel data models
  • XTLOGLIN: Stata module to perform robust Lagrange multiplier test of linear and log-linear models against Box-Cox alternatives after regress or xtreg XTLOGLIN: Stata module to perform robust Lagrange multiplier test of linear and log-linear models against Box-Cox alternatives after regress or xtreg
  • XTLSDVC: Stata module to estimate bias corrected LSDV dynamic panel data models XTLSDVC: Stata module to estimate bias corrected LSDV dynamic panel data models
  • XTMG: Stata module to estimate panel time series models with heterogeneous slopes XTMG: Stata module to estimate panel time series models with heterogeneous slopes
  • XTMIPOLATEU: Stata module to replace missing values in a time series, two- or multidimensional varlist with interpolated (extrapolated) ones XTMIPOLATEU: Stata module to replace missing values in a time series, two- or multidimensional varlist with interpolated (extrapolated) ones
  • XTMIS: Stata module to report missing observations for each variable in xt data XTMIS: Stata module to report missing observations for each variable in xt data

  • XTMIXED_CORR: Stata module to compute model-implied intracluster correlations after xtmixed XTMIXED_CORR: Stata module to compute model-implied intracluster correlations after xtmixed
  • XTMOD: Stata module to analyze and display interactions based on time-series data XTMOD: Stata module to analyze and display interactions based on time-series data
  • XTMORAN: Stata module to calculate Moran’s I and Moran’s Ii statistics for panel data and displaying a Moran scatterplot XTMORAN: Stata module to calculate Moran’s I and Moran’s Ii statistics for panel data and displaying a Moran scatterplot
  • XTMRHO: Stata module to calculate intra-class correlations after xtmixed XTMRHO: Stata module to calculate intra-class correlations after xtmixed

  • XTNPTIMEVAR: Stata module to estimate non-parametric time-varying coefficients panel data models with fixed effects XTNPTIMEVAR: Stata module to estimate non-parametric time-varying coefficients panel data models with fixed effects
  • XTNUMFAC: Stata module to estimate the number of factors in panel data XTNUMFAC: Stata module to estimate the number of factors in panel data
  • XTOOS: Stata module for evaluating the out-of-sample prediction performance of panel-data models XTOOS: Stata module for evaluating the out-of-sample prediction performance of panel-data models

  • XTPATTERN: Stata module to generate code showing pattern of xt data XTPATTERN: Stata module to generate code showing pattern of xt data
  • XTPATTERNVAR: Stata module to generate string variable describing panel patterns XTPATTERNVAR: Stata module to generate string variable describing panel patterns
  • XTPDYN: Stata module to estimate dynamic random effects probit model with unobserved heterogeneity XTPDYN: Stata module to estimate dynamic random effects probit model with unobserved heterogeneity
  • XTPEDRONI: Stata module to perform Pedroni’s panel cointegration tests and Panel Dynamic OLS estimation XTPEDRONI: Stata module to perform Pedroni’s panel cointegration tests and Panel Dynamic OLS estimation
  • XTPMG: Stata module for estimation of nonstationary heterogeneous panels XTPMG: Stata module for estimation of nonstationary heterogeneous panels
  • XTPQML: Stata module to estimate Fixed-effects Poisson (Quasi-ML) regression with robust standard errors XTPQML: Stata module to estimate Fixed-effects Poisson (Quasi-ML) regression with robust standard errors

  • XTQREG: Stata module to compute quantile regression with fixed effects XTQREG: Stata module to compute quantile regression with fixed effects

  • XTREGRE2: Stata module to estimate random effects model with weights XTREGRE2: Stata module to estimate random effects model with weights

  • XTREGWEM: Stata module to estimate Within-Effects Panel Data: Ridge and Weighted Regression XTREGWEM: Stata module to estimate Within-Effects Panel Data: Ridge and Weighted Regression
  • XTREGWHM: Stata module to estimate Wallace-Hussain Random-Effects Panel Data: Ridge and Weighted Regression XTREGWHM: Stata module to estimate Wallace-Hussain Random-Effects Panel Data: Ridge and Weighted Regression
  • XTREVU: Stata module to reverse the order of values of time series and panel data variables XTREVU: Stata module to reverse the order of values of time series and panel data variables
  • XTROBREG: Stata module providing pairwise-differences and first-differences robust regression estimators XTROBREG: Stata module providing pairwise-differences and first-differences robust regression estimators
  • XTSCC: Stata module to calculate robust standard errors for panels with cross-sectional dependence XTSCC: Stata module to calculate robust standard errors for panels with cross-sectional dependence
  • XTSEL: Stata module for selection of variables and specification in a panel-data framework XTSEL: Stata module for selection of variables and specification in a panel-data framework
  • XTSEMIPAR: Stata module to compute Semiparametric Fixed-Effects Estimator of Baltagi and Li XTSEMIPAR: Stata module to compute Semiparametric Fixed-Effects Estimator of Baltagi and Li
  • XTSEQREG: Stata module to perform sequential estimation of linear panel data models XTSEQREG: Stata module to perform sequential estimation of linear panel data models
  • XTSERIALPM: Stata module to perform a portmanteau test for serial correlation in panel data XTSERIALPM: Stata module to perform a portmanteau test for serial correlation in panel data
  • XTSFKK: Stata module to estimate endogenous panel stochastic frontier models in the style of Karakaplan and Kutlu XTSFKK: Stata module to estimate endogenous panel stochastic frontier models in the style of Karakaplan and Kutlu
  • XTSPJ: Stata module for split-panel jackknife estimation XTSPJ: Stata module for split-panel jackknife estimation
  • XTSS: Stata module to estimate (S,s) rule regression models for panel data XTSS: Stata module to estimate (S,s) rule regression models for panel data
  • XTSTFETCHCOVID19: Stata module to Download COVID-19 Datasets from the COVID-19 Data Hub XTSTFETCHCOVID19: Stata module to Download COVID-19 Datasets from the COVID-19 Data Hub
  • XTSUM2DOCX: Stata module to report summary statistics of panel data to a formatted table in the DOCX format XTSUM2DOCX: Stata module to report summary statistics of panel data to a formatted table in the DOCX format
  • XTSUR: Stata module to estimate seemingly unrelated regression model on unbalanced panel data XTSUR: Stata module to estimate seemingly unrelated regression model on unbalanced panel data
  • XTTEIFECI: Stata module to provide Estimation and Inference of Treatment Effects through a Factor-Based Approach XTTEIFECI: Stata module to provide Estimation and Inference of Treatment Effects through a Factor-Based Approach
  • XTTEST2: Stata module to perform Breusch-Pagan LM test for cross-sectional correlation in panel data model XTTEST2: Stata module to perform Breusch-Pagan LM test for cross-sectional correlation in panel data model
  • XTTEST3: Stata module to compute Modified Wald statistic for groupwise heteroskedasticity XTTEST3: Stata module to compute Modified Wald statistic for groupwise heteroskedasticity
  • XTTRANS2: Stata module to compute tables of transition probabilities XTTRANS2: Stata module to compute tables of transition probabilities
  • XTUSREG: Stata module to estimate dynamic panel models under irregular time spacing XTUSREG: Stata module to estimate dynamic panel models under irregular time spacing
  • XTVAR2: Stata module to compute panel vector autoregression XTVAR2: Stata module to compute panel vector autoregression
  • XTVC: Stata module to compute confidence intervals for the variance component of random-intercept linear models XTVC: Stata module to compute confidence intervals for the variance component of random-intercept linear models
  • XTWEST: Stata module for testing for cointegration in heterogeneous panels XTWEST: Stata module for testing for cointegration in heterogeneous panels
  • XVALOLS: Stata module to crossvalidate an OLS regression XVALOLS: Stata module to crossvalidate an OLS regression

Y

  • YALESCHEME: Stata module providing a modern Stata scheme for Yale University-branded data visualizations YALESCHEME: Stata module providing a modern Stata scheme for Yale University-branded data visualizations
  • YATCHEW_TEST: Stata module to perform Yatchew (1997), de Chaisemartin, D’Haultfoeuille & Gurgand (2024) linearity test YATCHEW_TEST: Stata module to perform Yatchew (1997), de Chaisemartin, D’Haultfoeuille & Gurgand (2024) linearity test
  • YRDIF: Stata module to calculate daily date differences YRDIF: Stata module to calculate daily date differences
  • YULELAGS: RATS procedure to compute Information Criteria for AR models using Yule-Walker YULELAGS: RATS procedure to compute Information Criteria for AR models using Yule-Walker
  • YULEVAR: RATS procedure to estimate a VAR on stationary data using Yule-Walker Equations YULEVAR: RATS procedure to estimate a VAR on stationary data using Yule-Walker Equations

Z

  • ZANDREWS: Stata module to calculate Zivot-Andrews unit root test in presence of structural break ZANDREWS: Stata module to calculate Zivot-Andrews unit root test in presence of structural break
  • ZB_QRM: Stata module to Recoding multiple responses into binary variables ZB_QRM: Stata module to Recoding multiple responses into binary variables
  • ZCQ: Stata module to score Zurich Claudication Questionnaire ZCQ: Stata module to score Zurich Claudication Questionnaire
  • ZICEN: Stata module to estimate a finite mixture model of a degenerate distribution with mass at zero and one or two censored (Tobit) normals ZICEN: Stata module to estimate a finite mixture model of a degenerate distribution with mass at zero and one or two censored (Tobit) normals
  • ZINB: Stata module to estimate zero inflated negative binomial model on count data ZINB: Stata module to estimate zero inflated negative binomial model on count data
  • ZIP: Stata module to estimate zero inflated Poisson model on count data ZIP: Stata module to estimate zero inflated Poisson model on count data
  • ZIPFFIT: Stata module to fit the Zipf distribution or the Zipf-Mandelbrot distribution by maximum likelihood ZIPFFIT: Stata module to fit the Zipf distribution or the Zipf-Mandelbrot distribution by maximum likelihood
  • ZIPPKG: Stata module to create ZIP archives of community-contributed content for offline distribution ZIPPKG: Stata module to create ZIP archives of community-contributed content for offline distribution
  • ZIPSAVE: Stata module to save and use datasets compressed by zip ZIPSAVE: Stata module to save and use datasets compressed by zip
  • ZIVOT: RATS procedure to perform Zivot-Andrews Unit Root Test ZIVOT: RATS procedure to perform Zivot-Andrews Unit Root Test
  • ZMAP: Stata module for binned scatter maps ZMAP: Stata module for binned scatter maps
  • ZOIB: Stata module to fit a zero-one inflated beta distribution by maximum likelihood ZOIB: Stata module to fit a zero-one inflated beta distribution by maximum likelihood
  • ZSCORE06: Stata module to calculate anthropometric z-scores using the 2006 WHO child growth standards ZSCORE06: Stata module to calculate anthropometric z-scores using the 2006 WHO child growth standards
  • ZTG: Stata module to estimate zero-truncated geometric regression ZTG: Stata module to estimate zero-truncated geometric regression
  • ZTNBP: Stata module to estimate zero-truncated NegBin-P regression ZTNBP: Stata module to estimate zero-truncated NegBin-P regression
  • ZTPFLEX: Stata module to estimate zero-truncated Poisson mixture regression ZTPFLEX: Stata module to estimate zero-truncated Poisson mixture regression
  • ZTREE2STATA: Stata module to import data created by z-Tree ZTREE2STATA: Stata module to import data created by z-Tree

_

  • **_GAPPORT: Stata module to calculates seats in party-list proportional representation _GAPPORT: Stata module to calculates seats in party-list proportional representation**
  • **_GCLSORT: Stata module to sort a single variable via egen _GCLSORT: Stata module to sort a single variable via egen**
  • **_GDISTINCT: Stata module providing egen function to count distinct values _GDISTINCT: Stata module providing egen function to count distinct values**
  • **_GPROD: Stata module to extend egen for product of observations _GPROD: Stata module to extend egen for product of observations**
  • **_GRMEDF: Stata module to compute row medians with egen _GRMEDF: Stata module to compute row medians with egen**

  • **_GRPOS: Stata module to identify observations with at least n positive values _GRPOS: Stata module to identify observations with at least n positive values**
  • **_GRPROD: Stata module to extend generate to produce row products _GRPROD: Stata module to extend generate to produce row products**
  • **_GSLOPE: Stata module to compute simple regression slope _GSLOPE: Stata module to compute simple regression slope**
  • **_GSOUNDEX: Stata module to implement soundex algorithm _GSOUNDEX: Stata module to implement soundex algorithm**
  • **_GSTD01: Stata modules to standardize a variable _GSTD01: Stata modules to standardize a variable**
  • **_GVRELDIF: Stata module to compute relative difference between successive observations _GVRELDIF: Stata module to compute relative difference between successive observations**
  • **_GWMEAN: Stata module to compute optionally weighted means _GWMEAN: Stata module to compute optionally weighted means**
  • **_GWTMEAN: Stata module containing extensions to generate to implement weighted mean _GWTMEAN: Stata module containing extensions to generate to implement weighted mean**
  • **_PEERS: Stata module to allow egen to compute the average characteristics of peers in a given unit (school, firm, etc.) specified by by() _PEERS: Stata module to allow egen to compute the average characteristics of peers in a given unit (school, firm, etc.) specified by by()**
